| **Last night we held a town hall in one of the most vulnerable Republican-held districts in our state.** David Valadao represents CA-22 and has turned his back on thousands of constituents who depend on Medicaid to survive. All because Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to cut Medicaid to pay for billionaire tax cuts. So, we showed up to talk to everyday people about it. **[We got to hear from countless Californians who are frustrated, scared, and angry with how things are going in this country. And we are going to keep holding Republicans accountable who are enabling the worst impulses of Trump and Elon Musk. Will you rush a rapid response donation to keep funding our town hall events today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104292520/534889184/803820036?refcode=20250321_FR_45DO_Townhall&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2U3ODY5Mi1iMTA2LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5A7vbx6edREudMBXwUIUmSio3_5-riiSRUn4TT7EZ-8=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104292521/534889185/803820036?refcode=20250321_FR_45DO_Townhall&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2U3ODY5Mi1iMTA2LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5A7vbx6edREudMBXwUIUmSio3_5-riiSRUn4TT7EZ-8=) [CHIP IN $35 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104292522/534889186/803820036?&refcode=20250321_FR_45DO_Townhall&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2U3ODY5Mi1iMTA2LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5A7vbx6edREudMBXwUIUmSio3_5-riiSRUn4TT7EZ-8=) **Even though Republicans are telling their U.S. House Members to stop having in-person town halls, we showed up.** We showed up for everyone worried about the Republican plan to cut the phone helplines at the Social Security Administration. clean_body: GOP is afraid of town halls. We aren’t. | = | Last night we held a town hall in one of the most vulnerable Republican-held districts in our state. David Valadao represents CA-22 and has turned his back on thousands of constituents who depend on Medicaid to survive. All because Donald Trump and Elon Musk want to cut Medicaid to pay for billionaire tax cuts. So, we showed up to talk to everyday people about it. = = = Even though Republicans are telling their U.S. House Members to stop having in-person town halls, we showed up. We showed up for everyone worried about the Republican plan to cut the phone helplines at the Social Security Administration. We showed up for the 22 million Americans who could lose their healthcare coverage. We showed up for everyone dealing with rising grocery prices, including eggs which cost up to $15. = = = = = = Thank you so much, \- The entire CADEM HQ team | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. subject: Hands off the USPS

body:
|
#
---
Peter, Postmaster General Louis DeJoy just greenlit Elon Musk and DOGE to take a chainsaw to the USPS to find “efficiencies.” We’ve seen how Musk and his associates operate — by firing tens of thousands of employees within the Department of Education, the Department of Veteran Affairs, and USAID just to name a few. Nothing good can come of this. We have to protect the Postal Service. In rural areas, the USPS is a lifeline for seniors who depend on the service to receive their medications. The USPS also ensures voter registration forms and mail-in ballots reach Americans. Any layoffs or subsequent disruptions in service could be detrimental. We can’t stand by until care for seniors or voter registration efforts are disrupted to take action. It will take all of us working together now to address the challenges created by DeJoy and this administration. We MUST start preparing today with open seats in Michigan, Minnesota, and now New Hampshire.

name: Josh Harder
subject: Trump’s order to abolish the Department of Education
body:
Just terrible

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104292772/534895665/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE4MDAxNDUtYjMwNi1mMDExLTkwY2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=EkT8icYVqYAGd6_Gv6v99_99YME0kqfE04w0Q2dhfXY=) | Peter, Yesterday, Donald Trump signed an executive order to abolish the Department of Education. As a dad, I find it completely unfathomable. What could be worse than taking away funding for our kids’ education? Here’s what’s at stake: The Department of Education is responsible for giving every student in America the opportunity to learn and grow. They have all kinds of important programs that now face an uncertain future... student loan forgiveness, funding for special needs teachers, education grants, civil rights laws, etc. **I know there is a ton of news right now. But we cannot throw up our hands. If you are a parent, or even just someone who cares about our future, this should disgust you. We must do everything in our power to fight back.** [_**I’m starting a nationwide petition calling on Congress to protect the Department of Education! clean_body: Just terrible | = | Peter, Yesterday, Donald Trump signed an executive order to abolish the Department of Education. As a dad, I find it completely unfathomable. What could be worse than taking away funding for our kids’ education? Here’s what’s at stake: The Department of Education is responsible for giving every student in America the opportunity to learn and grow. They have all kinds of important programs that now face an uncertain future... student loan forgiveness, funding for special needs teachers, education grants, civil rights laws, etc. I know there is a ton of news right now. But we cannot throw up our hands. If you are a parent, or even just someone who cares about our future, this should disgust you. We must do everything in our power to fight back. We’ve got to make our voices heard. \- Josh *

subject: re: Steve Bannon CONFIRMS Trump’s third term?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This is outright unconstitutional:
| | **TRUMP IS DEFYING THE CONSTITUTION!
HE’S OVERSTEPPING CONGRESS AND THE COURTS!
__AND HE COULD GET AWAY WITH IT:__ ** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-third-term/?source=VPP_20250321_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=6&akid=19340%2E878179%2ELHuZI4) The MAGA mob isn’t even trying to hide their plans for Trump’s authoritarian regime anymore.

**A third term is blatantly _UNCONSTITUTIONAL_ — WE CAN’T SIT IDLY BY AND LET HIM BECOME A KING.**

That’s we’re calling on 500 of our most dedicated local Democrats to stand up to this heinous attack. **_But we’re still missing your response:_**

[**Should Donald Trump be Allowed to Serve a Third Term?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-third-term/?source=VPP_20250321_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=19340%2E878179%2ELHuZI4) | [ABSOLUTELY NOT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-third-term/?source=VPP_20250321_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=19340%2E878179%2ELHuZI4)
---
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-third-term/?source=VPP_20250321_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=19340%2E878179%2ELHuZI4)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-third-term/?source=VPP_20250321_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=10&akid=19340%2E878179%2ELHuZI4)
Thank you for joining our fight,

Team Voter Protection Project
* * *
**_**500 local responses needed by MIDNIGHT for results to be statistically significant.**_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19340%2E878179%2ELHuZI4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19340%2E878179%2ELHuZI4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19340%2E878179%2ELHuZI4) to request fewer emails. body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104293332/534915688/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg1YzRmOS1iODA2LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73HrM6sYEDq1nO6FgECtqZsiiS3y8UmojS9xsOFD8HE=&emci=ad379df7-a406-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0485c4f9-b806-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9818364)
---

| | This is a five-alarm fire. Trump's billionaire Commerce Secretary, Howard Lutnick, just said the quiet part out loud. During an interview, he said that **seniors shouldn't complain if their Social Security checks get disrupted, and that anyone who does is a fraudster.** Yep, you read that right. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104293333/534915689/-2044921950?refcode=2025-03-21-ss&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0485c4f9-b806-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDg1YzRmOS1iODA2LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73HrM6sYEDq1nO6FgECtqZsiiS3y8UmojS9xsOFD8HE=) They're not even trying to hide it anymore. Trump and Musk are coming for Americans' hard-earned Social Security checks. Social Security checks have gone out each month like clockwork since the program was established in 1935. For the first time in its history, there's a very real possibility that seniors won't get their checks on time once Trump and Musk take hold of the agency. This is another out-of-touch billionaire in Trump's inner circle who doesn't even know what Social Security means to the millions of seniors who rely on it. They rely on it to pay rent, buy groceries, pay for prescription medications, and retire with dignity. Not to mention, this is YOUR money. This is money that you have paid into the Social Security program paycheck after paycheck, year after year, with the guarantee that you'll get it back when you retire. **And now Trump and Musk want to take away YOUR money.** There's no doubt in my mind that gutting Social Security is a top priority for Trump and Musk. Just last week it was reported that Musk sent one of his closest advisors, a private equity manager, to head up DOGE operations at the Social Security Administration (SSA). It says a lot about Musk's priorities that he sent twenty-year-olds to the Department of Education and USAID while sending his closest advisor to head things up at SSA. But here's something else I know: **I've never seen our movement more fired up and ready to fight back. And when you come for seniors' Social Security, you'll have hell to pay.** Call your members of Congress, call the organizations you're a member of, and tell them to put pressure on Congress to fight back. The time to get loud is now. I'm in this with you every step of the way. _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I wrote this with a heavy heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But every word is God's honest truth.
| [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/i8NlNl_-q9CaWiyAieRWnonGAEWiAbtcbOLFBuD5vmx9-fAEAPE7EnzFRVqw5iwR8P_0PthQ41bEu1jXyr177foYPHMhsQl8pfa9KEXO9BWgZD9x3ugdOR5R0k1kg_WSNpeZ0H7XRhjuRkbd0oD6Hi_VSt7VKklc266CGjRquoymnz4ALvohoJ4wz1x6oyuPuTZAKb0eTIDdk-kUta5Fx4qKCs4tEZZhjXKxv1ytgyRO0SkjuKPtd3PHmJT_uER6pzuJg9P66XbKW5Z5fSj859Aw510DrfB2KdJSdc8elCr_jX5_dXXUjI1aV8GJzo3v2PfGm3jeF4pkuc7uMLsOOaTxS-l5XVquvCJelpuSlhmwVkWMj7QuGpnI7FV0-7L8_zZik6DYDGLfXXUlZ0pcdF1DCBEPEYDss3_-PYJlXit6cwXl9ENk6TQOElicRqtPvtvn63tDq5JdquphLdelzuN1IeOc5bLDTacGhcsxUB-YKsITieGmG76C5YnWkw/kWrd4YmkguO_9u-W2YCfoggXTiT9gC3N/7)
---
Peter,
---
At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that _“our nation has suffered greatly,”_ but _“after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.”_
---
Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time.
---
_But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason._
---
I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth...
---
**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __not__ yet finished.**
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a **“ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,”** **RAIDED** my home, **ARRESTED** me, took a **MUGSHOT** of me, and forced me into **BANKRUPTCY** , the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757** ...
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/0deQY5pYnuI8WklcsR9PyMjqx53-Ajbyjo0mhI54jIv2IepmVZ6xmpXhsWxagxn3Vy2jZOvU-3PFmAhNIVxqIN8_30VcLdM3isU8R2Tv4OYZdiuvhmhtAh6L8LlbXVlLn06RK1xoJU2yeOkTavD_87UNs6l8m5A_Nsbn7Kg3HmyhAt1NuvgtaSDHgoQz1LADxfxq_ewgf32WiDu-W-LWQJBgqZ4Y4h4kr89a7OBEcspyUv_jWqhUT0xrs8c7wroM6W760EusYPdeLpCvfl6v16bRT-x_TyU-XMsm80Hzr1SffZMsozaThFd9xqFDSxBO-6VaUkW2KBjFA_oV_Q34nzwW1M9BmijHtwyV5T0sS1B4BrdNs9dweucprrWYwYmMInF2GuPomtta80Nl2Rayibf6Mw9iBjs2Rfog6sapkUbWXwNpA8APeEonWRD3cxwC-lsW3VHO4GthLsKkUnKBh-9NM91HyULSR0gLPzirTbNs1uY90oA_mIsThU_HNA/2NNbNTqEoWltMaHi3y1OPAo3HX2coNYJ/7)
__
---
And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice.
---

clean_body: But every word is God's honest truth. | Peter, At President Trump’s inauguration, he expressed that “our nation has suffered greatly,” but “after all we have been through together, we stand on the verge of the four greatest years in American history.” Those inspiring words – and President Trump’s historic leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in just a few weeks’ time. But today, sadly, I have to write to you for a far more somber reason. I say this with a heavy heart, but every word is God's honest truth... While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is not yet finished. If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY , the TRUTH remains... ...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter. Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m still FIGHTING BACK. When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757 ... And today, to show them that good and honest Americans like YOU are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Election Victory
body:
Trump Ends Deep State Propaganda Machine

[INSIDE JW]

FEDERAL JUDGE UPHOLDS THE RIGHT TO INSPECT MARYLAND VOTER ROLLS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34815&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1rNlNTV0RiR0U0TSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=b5d9904398b22ee0d1c1d6871aee43210e3711dd9ef257262dd8bca0fd2e585c]

Maryland is finally learning what other states have learned: federal
law requires transparency in the voting process.

District Court Judge Matthew J. Maddox of the U.S. District Court for
the District of Maryland struck down
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34803&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3N1bGxpdmFuLXYtc3VtbWVycy1tYXJ5bGFuZC1udnJhLWFtaWN1cy1hbmQtb3Bpbmlvbi0wMDE3Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6fd36893b28c0449f8c77300d605c28c1ff03f02780a701808ff5322be1e1c92]
a Maryland State Board of Elections regulation that restricted and
criminalized the use of voter registration lists for voter fraud and
other “investigations.”

Citing a separate Judicial Watch court victory in Maryland that opened
up voter rolls to public scrutiny under federal law, the court
recognized that restricting the use of the state’s voter rolls
presented an obstacle to upholding federal voter roll maintenance as
required by the National Voter Registration Act’s
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=435&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3YvY3J0L25hdGlvbmFsLXZvdGVyLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbi1hY3QtMTk5My1udnJhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f158da4a5ae1de35e565a6a8f53da89cd8322253d93d918bf210c72ca3be414b]
(NVRA).

This ruling comes in the case _Katherine Strauch Sullivan, et al., v.
Michael G. Summers, et al., _(No. 1:24-cv-00172), in which we filed
an _amicus curiae_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34803&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3N1bGxpdmFuLXYtc3VtbWVycy1tYXJ5bGFuZC1udnJhLWFtaWN1cy1hbmQtb3Bpbmlvbi0wMDE3Mi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=6fd36893b28c0449f8c77300d605c28c1ff03f02780a701808ff5322be1e1c92]
(friend of the court) brief in support of the Maryland voters who
challenged the new rule:

> One of the many necessary documents in order to determine whether a
> jurisdiction is in compliance with the NVRA’s list maintenance
> provisions are the voter registration list with voter history for
> prior general federal elections. These records were at issue in
> 2017, when Judicial Watch sued in this Court alleging that the state
> law requirement to be a Maryland registered voter was unlawful and
> preempted by the NVRA’s public disclosure provision.... This Court
> agreed, finding that both the records requested in the voter
> registration list were subject to disclosure under the NVRA and the
> state’s requirement to be a registered voter frustrated the
> purposes of the federal law and was preempted by it.

As several federal courts have recognized, the public records
provisions of the National Voter Registration Act were intended to
enhance the ability of private groups to monitor whether states are
removing ineligible voters from their voter rolls. In August 2019, a
federal court in Maryland
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=18613&F=T&&hash=f9cd3d9e6cad361e01200d53e08c9a877feb8785547f446508071d6bbef12f01]
noted that organizations “such as Judicial Watch” have “the
resources and expertise that few individuals can marshal. By excluding
these organizations from access to voter registration lists,” the
purpose of the federal law is undermined. That court ordered Maryland
to produce the voter registration list, with fields indicating name,
home address, most recent voter activity, and active or inactive
status. In April 2020, the same court ordered Maryland to provide
Judicial Watch with the dates of birth.

Judge Maddox notes in his opinion: “On or around June 2023, the SBE
[Maryland State Board of Elections
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34804&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9lbGVjdGlvbnMubWFyeWxhbmQuZ292L2luZGV4Lmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=2064f89a734fd7c61b880bccf906d2fef985d9dc5e4b8c22eaa7350327d626dc]]
adopted the regulation
restricting the use of voter registration lists by Maryland voters who
request them.”

> A voter requesting access to the voter registration list, including
> voting history, must provide a signed and sworn statement that the
> list is not intended for commercial solicitation or any other
> purpose “not related to the electoral process.” ...
>
> As they have done in the past, Plaintiffs [Sullivan] anticipate
> using the registered voter list from the SBE [State Board of
> Elections] and voting histories for registered voters to conduct
> statewide investigative canvasses to identify and analyze what they
> believe are potential errors, irregularities, or anomalies within
> MDVOTERS [voter database going back to 2006].

Judge Maddox’s opinion concludes:

> In sum, the Court concludes as a matter of law that the Use
> Restriction in COMAR [Code of Maryland Regulations
>

This new federal court ruling affirming a transparency requirement for
voter registration lists is an important victory for Maryland voters
and election integrity. It was truly outrageous that Maryland election
officials tried to criminalize voters asking questions about election
integrity.

As you know, we are a national leader in voting integrity and voting
rights. As part of our work, Judicial Watch assembled a team of highly
experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory
elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio,
Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=21208&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL252cmEvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6895639061ab0e9dd273a0f81e79d0c7c0d5d5fea1149f126ef741e00ac8c21d].

FULL APPELLATE COURT TAKES HISTORIC STEP TO END COUNTING OF VOTES
RECEIVED AFTER ELECTION DAY

This is an important victory for Judicial Watch. The U.S. Court of
Appeals for the Fifth Circuit declined to rehear
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34783&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xpYmVydGFyaWFuLXBhcnR5LW9mLW1pc3Npc3NpcHBpLXYtd2V0emVsLWVuLWJhbmMtZGVuaWVkLTYwMzk1LTAwMDM3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=0569f8427af1e5501bd6dae266864e2d4076710e8573031bfb8bd89b30abed21]
its previous ruling, in which it agreed with Judicial Watch that it
was unlawful for Mississippi to count ballots that arrived after
Election Day. The full Circuit declined to hear the case by a vote of
5 to 10.

We filed a civil rights lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=31320&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY291bnRpbmctYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=30445c04db80403014cf6801c0a539109bdf148b2ee17d0c66123ba49e0dfac1]
in
February 2024, challenging the Mississippi election law on behalf of
the Libertarian Party of Mississippi (_Libertarian Party of
Mississippi v Wetzel et al_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=31309&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xpYmVydGFyaWFuLXBhcnR5LW9mLW1zLXYtd2V0emVsLWV0LWFsLWVsZWN0aW9uLWRheS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAwMzcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8b17a67db0b78887d0c4e1b32c94a7094cecaf7f1d08afbcdb222102c195103c].
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=31309&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2xpYmVydGFyaWFuLXBhcnR5LW9mLW1zLXYtd2V0emVsLWV0LWFsLWVsZWN0aW9uLWRheS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDAwMzcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=8b17a67db0b78887d0c4e1b32c94a7094cecaf7f1d08afbcdb222102c195103c]

(We filed the first challenge
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=27407&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdC1hZ2FpbnN0LWlsbGlub2lzLXRvLXN0b3AtY291bnRpbmctb2YtYmFsbG90cy1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=1b8b2e7ef9a18e3f797a44d49d3fad7b007089973d519a020f4f559472dd9712]
to require all ballots to be received by Election Day in 2022 against
Illinois.)

The October 25, 2024, Fifth Circuit appellate opinion
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34781&F=T&&hash=9a03da0f39a326b1583d9b03b2fba14021abdf4ced5af55fc691c141b692340d]
at issue found:

> Congress statutorily designated a singular “day for the
> election” of members of Congress and the appointment of
> presidential electors. Text, precedent, and historical practice
> confirm this “day for the election” is the day by which ballots
> must be both cast by voters and received by state officials. Because
> Mississippi’s statute allows ballot receipt up to five days after
> the federal election day, it is preempted by federal law. We reverse
> the district court’s contrary judgment and remand for further
> proceedings.

Earlier this month, we filed a federal lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34772&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmFsbG90cy1yZWNlaXZlZC1hZnRlci1lbGVjdGlvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=4c35f56617ad58c6489f018f4427a297e3b065189372590fbb86fed463faa76a]
against California on behalf of U.S. Rep. Darrell Issa to prevent
state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days
beyond the date established by federal law. California counts ballots
received up to seven days after Election Day.

In an Illinois “Election Day” lawsuit in November 2024 we filed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=33940&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcG9zdC1lbGVjdGlvbi1kYXktY291bnRpbmcvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=200db680ce3c703e447d311dde7b46d7b573ff10009ce8fd96a03975cfd9caab]
a petition
for a _writ of certiorari_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=33926&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2Jvc3Qtdi1pbC1ib2FyZC1vZi1lbGVjdGlvbnMtY2VydC1wZXRpdGlvbi0wMjc1NC0yNjQ0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=23539006d03a054aef9db0a20694e1898f606f800005d801ce5df8e14a970367]
to the United States Supreme Court challenging the decision by the
U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in the case filed on
behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors from
Illinois to prevent state election officials from counting ballots
received up to 14 days after Election Day.

This Fifth Circuit action is a historic victory for honest elections.
Federal law sets “Election Day” not “Election Week.”
California and the 17 other states should take notice. Our lawsuit
just filed against California for counting ballots received for up to
seven days after Election Day has even more urgency and strength.

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR DHS RECORDS ON TRUMP ASSASSINATION ATTEMPT AT
BUTLER, PA

Why is there so much secrecy surrounding the assassination attempt on
Donald Trump?

To find out, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34788&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdS1zLWRocy1yYWxseS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA3MDQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=31c56e03a03e0232f09620a790032779705700c7ec2fb4672d5a52960289d867]
against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for records
related to security provided for the July 13, 2024, rally in Butler,
PA, during which there was an assassination attempt on President Trump
(_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34788&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdS1zLWRocy1yYWxseS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDA3MDQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=31c56e03a03e0232f09620a790032779705700c7ec2fb4672d5a52960289d867]
(No. 1:25-cv-00704)).

The lawsuit was filed after the agency failed to comply with a July
15, 2024, FOIA request for:

> All records, including emails, email chains, email attachments, text
> messages, video or audio recordings, photographs, outlook calendars,
> meeting minutes, correspondence, statements, letters, memoranda,
> reports, briefings, presentations, notes, summaries, requests for
> assistance, agreements, travel records, receipts, or other form of
> record, regarding providing support or manpower to President Donald
> Trump’s presidential campaign rally that was held in Butler, PA,
> on July 13, 2024.

The request specifically sought records from the agency’s Homeland
Security Investigations
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34789&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaWNlLmdvdi9hYm91dC1pY2UvaHNpP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a36762243f3a4f3b79c0d349a5652a5c201e2bea1a0ba2c32c20843925d11e3c],
which is
believed to have helped provide security at the Butler event.

On July 13, 2024, at a campaign rally in Butler, PA, 20-year-old
Thomas Matthew Crooks attempted to assassinate
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34817&F=T&&hash=ecb1f9b7e116a64de1d5f5ae1a9d80877ba93ab008ff783381f701eb0513533f
Donald Trump. After the attempt on President Trump’s life, former
Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro N. Mayorkas named
a bipartisan panel to conduct a 45-day independent review
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34791&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGhzLmdvdi9pbmRlcGVuZGVudC1yZXZpZXctMjAyNC1hdHRlbXB0ZWQtYXNzYXNzaW5hdGlvbj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a530a78bfa1f422cd502898b8d84998658c539119f6612a5ec769e8699855844]
of the planning for and actions before, during, and after the rally.

Federal agencies need to come clean on the events that led up to the
assassination attempts on President Trump. It is now eight months
since the first attempt, and the American people have yet to receive
any answers under FOIA on the failures of the Biden administration to
protect President Trump.

We are extensively investigating the assassination attempts on
President Trump.

In August 2024, we received Secret Service records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=33294&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtZGVpLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=a201f5b8566f7b3082e54500875d04224125ac2f77cde791c2550d7495410ce4]
that showed the
Secret Service has made it a top priority that “diversity and
inclusion is not just ‘talked about’ – but demonstrated by all
employees through ‘EVERY ACTION, EVERY DAY.’” [Emphasis in
original]

We also uncovered records

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=33235&F=T&&hash=0eb8c23d782e571d776cf1b6d18d1eb656be4e5c892ff6bc773ad8987d162467]

We reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=33212&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdHJ1bXAtYXNzYXNzaW5hdGlvbi1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=2f214a19e232fe0b6a9533606b4c8a7eccf87ba7271af77ebf7e18ba0c662a5b]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=33146&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXNzYXNzaW5hdGlvbi1hdHRlbXB0LXRydW1wLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=df0f691741c7c14424d00c7ac64405fccff369da6825258cd61d1a62a1674738]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FILES ON FORMER TRUMP LAWYER CHRISTINA BOBB

We’re taking another step to expose the Biden administration’s
legal persecution of Donald Trump.

We filed lawsuits
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34807&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3RhZ3MvYm9iYi1jb21wbGFpbnQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4b01a3888274f002d50b21f3c29b13453ea54da31615e16d2585a9e949a0368f]
against
the U.S. Department of Justice and the Department of Homeland Security
for records regarding Christina Bobb, a former lawyer for President
Trump.

We also announced that Bobb has joined the litigation team at Judicial
Watch.

We sued the Justice Department after the FBI failed to respond to a
January 24, 2025, FOIA request for records about Bobb (_Judicial Watch
Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34813&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLWJvYmItY29tcGxhaW50LTAwNTg4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=20b793778b8bcc7fcbd68ba5a8355f64dbdaf91adf2720b7978421f1eaeaf73d]
(No. 1:25-cv-00588)).

Among other records, the lawsuit seeks all related investigative
reports, intelligence products, or similar records, as well as all
records of communication between any official or employee of the FBI
and any official, employee, or representative of any other branch,
department, agency, or office of the federal government mentioning or
referring to Bobb.

We sued Homeland Security after the Transportation Safety
Administration (TSA) failed to respond to January 24, 2025, FOIA
request for all records regarding Bobb’s enrollment in the
TSA PreCheck Program
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34809&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHNhLmdvdi9wcmVjaGVjaz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=42e671b7521e8bdec56d65831f008c9d2828565fc1c24f68165276dcd28d684e]
and any
cancellation or suspension of that enrollment, as well as all records
of communication between any official or employee of TSA and any
official, employee, or representative of any other branch, department,
agency, or office of the federal government mentioning or referring to
Bobb (_Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34814&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWJvYmItY29tcGxhaW50LTAwODM0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=691fef9fcd7c106f88f6443c225d4b18a07a02dcc47755fda4c3bd81a8d09dd7]
(No. 1:25-cv-00834)).

Bobb
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34811&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbWVtYmVycy9jaHJpc3RpbmEtYm9iYi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0f946bb44093e0b0dddf4e715fc18bb0331caa4a97175ee8682aabd2c69f1edd]
was an
attorney for President Trump from 2022-2024 before joining the
Republican National Committee to assist election integrity efforts for
the 2024 election.

She was a part of Trump’s legal team during the Biden Justice
Department’s pursuit of the classified documents case.

On August 8, 2022, FBI agents executed a search warrant at Trump’s
Mar-a-Lago residence in Florida. Bobb was Trump’s custodian of
record at the time and was at Mar-a-Lago during the raid.

The classified documents case was ultimately dismissed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34157&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvdHJ1bXAtY2xhc3NpZmllZC1kb2N1bWVudHMtc21pdGgtYzY2ZDVmZmI3YmE4NmMxYjk5MWY5NWU4OWJkZWJhMGM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=b7fff38ab9fd89c364d68ff9975d6a299d5d0f6cee246c6c455013ed42b14c55]
by U.S. District Judge Aileen Cannon in July 2024.

Bobb, a former on-air host for One America News Network, is also the
author of _Stealing Your Vote: The Inside Story of the 2020 Election
and What it Means for 2024._

Bobb joins the Judicial Watch team after working for President Trump
and his campaign to secure the 2024 election. In 2022, she joined
President Trump’s PAC Save America to help secure America’s
elections and ensure President Trump received a fair opportunity to
win the White House again.

Bobb has been a long-time friend of Judicial Watch and an advocate for
government accountability.

Shortly after she began working for the president, the Department of
Justice and FBI embroiled her in both Jack Smith investigations of the
Mar-a-Lago documents and January 6. She saw firsthand how partisan
government operatives abuse their authority to eliminate political
opposition, and she’s now determined to eliminate partisan threats
from the government.

Prior to working for President Trump, Bobb held executive level
positions in the Department of Homeland Security, served in the United
States Marine Corps as a Judge Advocate, practiced civil litigation in
San Diego, and now returns to her litigation roots with Judicial Watch
in Washington, D.C.

Bobb commented: “I am thrilled to be joining the litigation team at
Judicial Watch. There is no better organization to hold government
officials accountable for their actions. At this time in history,
there is no greater mission than to root out government corruption.
I’m grateful to be on the team.” Christina’s unique experience
and dedication make her a perfect fit for our mission. We’re happy
to have her join the team and look forward to having her skills and
expertise help expose the full extent of anti-Trump lawfare and
government corruption.

> to retaliate against journalists and producers behind a
> newscast—that cited Judicial Watch as a source—critical of
> leftwing billionaire George Soros. The taxpayer-funded news agency
> also ordered
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34820&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvYXJ0aWNsZXMvMjAyNS8wMy90aGUtdm9pY2Utb2YtcmFkaWNhbC1hbWVyaWNhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=fe855e1a4ce9811c90bf3e3b0b46c9b260c5d50e6d5cd21e7c9e720e1e8f9c86]
> staff to refrain from calling Hamas terrorists, suppresses negative
> stories about Iran, has been infiltrated by anti-American,
> pro-Islamic state interests and employed a Russian anti-U.S.
> propagandist. This history indicates that scrutiny of the public
> conglomerate, known as U.S. Agency for Global Media (USAGM), was
> long overdue. The president’s recent executive order
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34821&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvcHJlc2lkZW50aWFsLWFjdGlvbnMvMjAyNS8wMy9jb250aW51aW5nLXRoZS1yZWR1Y3Rpb24tb2YtdGhlLWZlZGVyYWwtYnVyZWF1Y3JhY3kvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=db9aa8d201f1497ea611a5b2ef03953518188a9b0e0c7db36f9d847237c65b10]
> to gut it will save American taxpayers around $900 million a year
> that could easily be applied to a myriad of domestic programs.

> Five international media networks—Office of Cuba Broadcasting
> (OCB), Voice of America (VOA), Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty
> (RFE/RL), Radio Free Asia and Middle East Broadcasting—operate
> under USAGM and reportedly reach 345 million people worldwide in 59
> languages. The global media agency was created to counter
> disinformation spread by oppressive regimes abroad. The USAGM
> website
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=12652&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNhZ20uZ292L3doby13ZS1hcmUvbWlzc2lvbi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=7cca6ee6ac92c09089c4c629cfa28bf6941413d554715559eaddba74d4151a6e]
states that its
> mission is “to inform, engage and connect people around the world
> in support of freedom and democracy.” The editorial objective of
> this government-funded media was developed during the Cold War and
> is supposed to support the national strategic objectives of the
> United States. It was specifically created to provide people in
> communist nations, via outlets such as Radio Liberty and Radio Free
> Europe, with information about the free world that is prohibited by
> their totalitarian rulers.

> It makes no sense for American taxpayers to fund anti-U.S.
> propaganda that gets broadcast and published worldwide. That
> apparently is what has been occurring for many years at USAGM, which
> has a workforce of around 3,500 and an $886 million budget in 2024.
> The agency requested a substantial budget increase of $950 million
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34822&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNhZ20uZ292L3dwLWNvbnRlbnQvdXBsb2Fkcy8yMDI0LzAzL1VTQUdNQnVkZ2V0X0ZZMjVfQ0JKXzAzLTA4LTI0LTEucGRmP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3d425fc2a8e21227b4ca5b4d216911d2cbf3c13f16d19e3b1a27c809629db1e8]
> for fiscal year 2025. In its Congressional Budget Justification,
> USAGM touts its Diversity and Inclusion Initiative with the
> appointment of an inaugural Chief Diversity Officer (CDO) who will
> collaborate closely with the Office of Civil Rights to align
> Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Accessibility (DEIA) training with
> a focus on crucial conversations, cultural diversity, and
> inclusivity. In the document, the agency assures that the new
> diversity chief will implement greater visibility and awareness of
> USAGM’s DEIA initiatives, identify new opportunities for DEIA
> initiatives agency-wide, and advance equity for underserved
> communities.

> Since Trump ordered USAGM’s shutdown, the administration official
> charged with the job, senior adviser Kari Lake, has found a
> multitude of problems
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34823&F=T&&hash=52d5a3073082c22305e280270732ca5fb8e5838daf73afd14b1465e253375bcc],
> including massive national security violations in which spies and
> terrorist sympathizers infiltrated the agency, eye-popping
> self-dealing involving contracts, hundreds of millions of dollars
> spent on fake news companies, and obscene overspending on building
> leases with no broadcasting facilities. Lake’s team even uncovered
> a $9 million commission to a private real estate agency with
> connections. “Waste, fraud and abuse run rampant in this agency
> and American taxpayers shouldn’t have to fund it,” said Lake, a
> former television news broadcaster. She has determined that, from
> top to bottom, the USAGM is a giant rot and burden to the American
> taxpayer as well as a national security risk. It is not salvageable,
> and Lake’s team will clean it up so it can meet the “core
> mission of telling America’s story throughout the world in a
> meaningful, impactful and effective way.”
>
> Liberals have long been in charge at USAGM, and the previously
> mentioned Soros broadcast is just one of many examples. The
> Spanish-language segment, which focused on the Hungarian
> philanthropist’s efforts to cripple sovereign governments in Latin
> America, aired on Television Martí (which operates under OCB) and
> was available for months online before a scandal-plagued Democratic
> senator discovered it and demanded an investigation. The disgraced
> veteran lawmaker, Bob Menendez of New Jersey, was
> recently sentenced to 11 years in prison
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34824&F=T&&hash=967a1a20dc53ff7de2850102572bab7100c396ff73684ad9e35e16fb8cece093]
> for bribery, extortion and conspiracy. At his request, Obama’s

>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72967&L=34825&F=T&&hash=2085bd618e262f7826c0d299270731cdfe13db006bcf30fe135428c8487ec060]

clean_body: Trump Ends Deep State Propaganda Machine [INSIDE JW] FEDERAL JUDGE UPHOLDS THE RIGHT TO INSPECT MARYLAND VOTER ROLLS [] Maryland is finally learning what other states have learned: federal law requires transparency in the voting process. District Court Judge Matthew J. Maddox of the U.S. District Court for the District of Maryland struck down [] a Maryland State Board of Elections regulation that restricted and criminalized the use of voter registration lists for voter fraud and other “investigations.” Citing a separate Judicial Watch court victory in Maryland that opened up voter rolls to public scrutiny under federal law, the court recognized that restricting the use of the state’s voter rolls presented an obstacle to upholding federal voter roll maintenance as required by the National Voter Registration Act’s [] (NVRA). This ruling comes in the case Katherine Strauch Sullivan, et al., v. Michael G. Summers, et al., (No. 1:24-cv-00172), in which we filed an amicus curiae [] (friend of the court) brief in support of the Maryland voters who challenged the new rule: One of the many necessary documents in order to determine whether a jurisdiction is in compliance with the NVRA’s list maintenance provisions are the voter registration list with voter history for prior general federal elections. These records were at issue in 2017, when Judicial Watch sued in this Court alleging that the state law requirement to be a Maryland registered voter was unlawful and preempted by the NVRA’s public disclosure provision.... This Court agreed, finding that both the records requested in the voter registration list were subject to disclosure under the NVRA and the state’s requirement to be a registered voter frustrated the purposes of the federal law and was preempted by it. As several federal courts have recognized, the public records provisions of the National Voter Registration Act were intended to enhance the ability of private groups to monitor whether states are removing ineligible voters from their voter rolls. In August 2019, a federal court in Maryland [] noted that organizations “such as Judicial Watch” have “the resources and expertise that few individuals can marshal. By excluding these organizations from access to voter registration lists,” the purpose of the federal law is undermined. That court ordered Maryland to produce the voter registration list, with fields indicating name, home address, most recent voter activity, and active or inactive status. In April 2020, the same court ordered Maryland to provide Judicial Watch with the dates of birth. Judge Maddox notes in his opinion: “On or around June 2023, the SBE [Maryland State Board of Elections []] adopted the regulation restricting the use of voter registration lists by Maryland voters who request them.” A voter requesting access to the voter registration list, including voting history, must provide a signed and sworn statement that the list is not intended for commercial solicitation or any other purpose “not related to the electoral process.” ... As they have done in the past, Plaintiffs [Sullivan] anticipate using the registered voter list from the SBE [State Board of Elections] and voting histories for registered voters to conduct statewide investigative canvasses to identify and analyze what they believe are potential errors, irregularities, or anomalies within MDVOTERS [voter database going back to 2006]. Judge Maddox’s opinion concludes: In sum, the Court concludes as a matter of law that the Use Restriction in COMAR [Code of Maryland Regulations []] ... presents an obstacle to accomplishing and executing the purposes and objectives of the NVRA [National Voter Registration Act] and is, therefore, preempted. This new federal court ruling affirming a transparency requirement for voter registration lists is an important victory for Maryland voters and election integrity. It was truly outrageous that Maryland election officials tried to criminalize voters asking questions about election integrity. As you know, we are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As part of our work, Judicial Watch assembled a team of highly experienced voting rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii, and cleaned up voter rolls in California, Ohio, Indiana, and Kentucky, among other achievements []. Earlier this month, we sent a notice letter [] to Lt. Governor Deidre M. Henderson, notifying her that Utah is currently in violation of federal NVRA public disclosure requirements. The notice letter warns of a lawsuit after 90 days if the issues are not resolved. In July 2023, we filed an amicus curiae [] (friend of the court) brief [], supporting the decision [] of the U.S. District Court for the District of Maine, which struck down Maine’s policy restricting the use and distribution of the state’s voter registration list. The lawsuit is now in the U.S. Court of Appeals for the First Circuit. According to a national study [ by Judicial Watch in 2020, Maine’s statewide registration rate was 101% of eligible voters. Also in July 2023, we settled [] a federal lawsuit against the Illinois State Board of Elections, requiring it to grant access to its centralized statewide list of registered voters. State officials had refused to allow the nonprofit Illinois Conservative Union and three lawfully registered Illinois voters to obtain a copy of the state’s voter registration list, despite their lawful request for those records under federal law. In recent years, Judicial Watch’s [] analysis and use of voter registration lists has led to lawsuits and legal actions that have resulted in the removal of four million [] names from voter rolls in nearly a dozen states and localities, including Los Angeles County and New York City. FULL APPELLATE COURT TAKES HISTORIC STEP TO END COUNTING OF VOTES RECEIVED AFTER ELECTION DAY This is an important victory for Judicial Watch. The U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit declined to rehear [] its previous ruling, in which it agreed with Judicial Watch that it was unlawful for Mississippi to count ballots that arrived after Election Day. The full Circuit declined to hear the case by a vote of 5 to 10. We filed a civil rights lawsuit [] in February 2024, challenging the Mississippi election law on behalf of the Libertarian Party of Mississippi (Libertarian Party of Mississippi v Wetzel et al []. [] (No. 1:24-cv-00037)). The suit was consolidated with one filed by the Republican National Committee, the Mississippi Republican Party, and other complainants. (We filed the first challenge [] to require all ballots to be received by Election Day in 2022 against Illinois.) The October 25, 2024, Fifth Circuit appellate opinion [] at issue found: Congress statutorily designated a singular “day for the election” of members of Congress and the appointment of presidential electors. Text, precedent, and historical practice confirm this “day for the election” is the day by which ballots must be both cast by voters and received by state officials. Because Mississippi’s statute allows ballot receipt up to five days after the federal election day, it is preempted by federal law. We reverse the district court’s contrary judgment and remand for further proceedings. Earlier this month, we filed a federal lawsuit [] against California on behalf of U.S. Rep. Darrell Issa to prevent state election officials from extending Election Day for seven days beyond the date established by federal law. California counts ballots received up to seven days after Election Day. In an Illinois “Election Day” lawsuit in November 2024 we filed [] a petition for a writ of certiorari [] to the United States Supreme Court challenging the decision by the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit in the case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors from Illinois to prevent state election officials from counting ballots received up to 14 days after Election Day. This Fifth Circuit action is a historic victory for honest elections. Federal law sets “Election Day” not “Election Week.” California and the 17 other states should take notice. Our lawsuit just filed against California for counting ballots received for up to seven days after Election Day has even more urgency and strength. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR DHS RECORDS ON TRUMP ASSASSINATION ATTEMPT AT BUTLER, PA Why is there so much secrecy surrounding the assassination attempt on Donald Trump? To find out, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit [] against the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) for records related to security provided for the July 13, 2024, rally in Butler, PA, during which there was an assassination attempt on President Trump (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:25-cv-00704)). The lawsuit was filed after the agency failed to comply with a July 15, 2024, FOIA request for: All records, including emails, email chains, email attachments, text messages, video or audio recordings, photographs, outlook calendars, meeting minutes, correspondence, statements, letters, memoranda, reports, briefings, presentations, notes, summaries, requests for assistance, agreements, travel records, receipts, or other form of record, regarding providing support or manpower to President Donald Trump’s presidential campaign rally that was held in Butler, PA, on July 13, 2024. The request specifically sought records from the agency’s Homeland Security Investigations [], which is believed to have helped provide security at the Butler event. On July 13, 2024, at a campaign rally in Butler, PA, 20-year-old Thomas Matthew Crooks attempted to assassinate [ Donald Trump. After the attempt on President Trump’s life, former Department of Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro N. Mayorkas named a bipartisan panel to conduct a 45-day independent review [] of the planning for and actions before, during, and after the rally. Federal agencies need to come clean on the events that led up to the assassination attempts on President Trump. It is now eight months since the first attempt, and the American people have yet to receive any answers under FOIA on the failures of the Biden administration to protect President Trump. We are extensively investigating the assassination attempts on President Trump. In August 2024, we received Secret Service records [] that showed the Secret Service has made it a top priority that “diversity and inclusion is not just ‘talked about’ – but demonstrated by all employees through ‘EVERY ACTION, EVERY DAY.’” [Emphasis in original] We also uncovered records [] from the district attorney’s office in Butler County, PA, detailing the extensive preparation of local police for the rally at which former President Trump was shot, including sniper teams, counter assault teams and a quick response force. In response to a separate open records request, we obtained [] bodycam footage of the July 13 assassination events from the Butler Township Police Department. We reported [] that the FBI withheld information on a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request for information about its coordination with the U.S. Secret Service regarding the July 13 Butler, PA, rally. On July 31, we reported [] that the United States Secret Service completely denied multiple FOIA requests for documents about the assassination attempt on former President Trump. JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR FILES ON FORMER TRUMP LAWYER CHRISTINA BOBB We’re taking another step to expose the Biden administration’s legal persecution of Donald Trump. We filed lawsuits [] against the U.S. Department of Justice and the Department of Homeland Security for records regarding Christina Bobb, a former lawyer for President Trump. We also announced that Bobb has joined the litigation team at Judicial Watch. We sued the Justice Department after the FBI failed to respond to a January 24, 2025, FOIA request for records about Bobb (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:25-cv-00588)). Among other records, the lawsuit seeks all related investigative reports, intelligence products, or similar records, as well as all records of communication between any official or employee of the FBI and any official, employee, or representative of any other branch, department, agency, or office of the federal government mentioning or referring to Bobb. We sued Homeland Security after the Transportation Safety Administration (TSA) failed to respond to January 24, 2025, FOIA request for all records regarding Bobb’s enrollment in the TSA PreCheck Program [] and any cancellation or suspension of that enrollment, as well as all records of communication between any official or employee of TSA and any official, employee, or representative of any other branch, department, agency, or office of the federal government mentioning or referring to Bobb (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [] (No. 1:25-cv-00834)). Bobb [] was an attorney for President Trump from 2022-2024 before joining the Republican National Committee to assist election integrity efforts for the 2024 election. She was a part of Trump’s legal team during the Biden Justice Department’s pursuit of the classified documents case. On August 8, 2022, FBI agents executed a search warrant at Trump’s Mar-a-Lago residence in Florida. Bobb was Trump’s custodian of record at the time and was at Mar-a-Lago during the raid. The classified documents case was ultimately dismissed [] by U.S. District Judge Aileen Cannon in July 2024. Bobb, a former on-air host for One America News Network, is also the author of Stealing Your Vote: The Inside Story of the 2020 Election and What it Means for 2024. Bobb joins the Judicial Watch team after working for President Trump and his campaign to secure the 2024 election. In 2022, she joined President Trump’s PAC Save America to help secure America’s elections and ensure President Trump received a fair opportunity to win the White House again. Bobb has been a long-time friend of Judicial Watch and an advocate for government accountability. Shortly after she began working for the president, the Department of Justice and FBI embroiled her in both Jack Smith investigations of the Mar-a-Lago documents and January 6. She saw firsthand how partisan government operatives abuse their authority to eliminate political opposition, and she’s now determined to eliminate partisan threats from the government. Prior to working for President Trump, Bobb held executive level positions in the Department of Homeland Security, served in the United States Marine Corps as a Judge Advocate, practiced civil litigation in San Diego, and now returns to her litigation roots with Judicial Watch in Washington, D.C. Bobb commented: “I am thrilled to be joining the litigation team at Judicial Watch. There is no better organization to hold government officials accountable for their actions. At this time in history, there is no greater mission than to root out government corruption. I’m grateful to be on the team.” Christina’s unique experience and dedication make her a perfect fit for our mission. We’re happy to have her join the team and look forward to having her skills and expertise help expose the full extent of anti-Trump lawfare and government corruption. U.S. GLOBAL MEDIA AGENCY FIRED JOURNALISTS BEHIND NEWSCAST CRITICAL OF SOROS The tax-funded agency meant to proclaim U.S. values to the world was turned into an anti-American propaganda machine, which the Trump administration is now moving to shut down. Our Corruption Chronicles blog explains []. The government-funded media syndicate being dismantled by President Trump spreads anti-U.S. propaganda, covers news with a distinct leftist bias and even utilized Stalinist techniques [] to retaliate against journalists and producers behind a newscast—that cited Judicial Watch as a source—critical of leftwing billionaire George Soros. The taxpayer-funded news agency also ordered [] staff to refrain from calling Hamas terrorists, suppresses negative stories about Iran, has been infiltrated by anti-American, pro-Islamic state interests and employed a Russian anti-U.S. propagandist. This history indicates that scrutiny of the public conglomerate, known as U.S. Agency for Global Media (USAGM), was long overdue. The president’s recent executive order [] to gut it will save American taxpayers around $900 million a year that could easily be applied to a myriad of domestic programs. Five international media networks—Office of Cuba Broadcasting (OCB), Voice of America (VOA), Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty (RFE/RL), Radio Free Asia and Middle East Broadcasting—operate under USAGM and reportedly reach 345 million people worldwide in 59 languages. The global media agency was created to counter disinformation spread by oppressive regimes abroad. The USAGM website [] states that its mission is “to inform, engage and connect people around the world in support of freedom and democracy.” The editorial objective of this government-funded media was developed during the Cold War and is supposed to support the national strategic objectives of the United States. It was specifically created to provide people in communist nations, via outlets such as Radio Liberty and Radio Free Europe, with information about the free world that is prohibited by their totalitarian rulers. It makes no sense for American taxpayers to fund anti-U.S. propaganda that gets broadcast and published worldwide. That apparently is what has been occurring for many years at USAGM, which has a workforce of around 3,500 and an $886 million budget in 2024. The agency requested a substantial budget increase of $950 million [] for fiscal year 2025. In its Congressional Budget Justification, USAGM touts its Diversity and Inclusion Initiative with the appointment of an inaugural Chief Diversity Officer (CDO) who will collaborate closely with the Office of Civil Rights to align Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Accessibility (DEIA) training with a focus on crucial conversations, cultural diversity, and inclusivity. In the document, the agency assures that the new diversity chief will implement greater visibility and awareness of USAGM’s DEIA initiatives, identify new opportunities for DEIA initiatives agency-wide, and advance equity for underserved communities. Since Trump ordered USAGM’s shutdown, the administration official charged with the job, senior adviser Kari Lake, has found a multitude of problems [], including massive national security violations in which spies and terrorist sympathizers infiltrated the agency, eye-popping self-dealing involving contracts, hundreds of millions of dollars spent on fake news companies, and obscene overspending on building leases with no broadcasting facilities. Lake’s team even uncovered a $9 million commission to a private real estate agency with connections. “Waste, fraud and abuse run rampant in this agency and American taxpayers shouldn’t have to fund it,” said Lake, a former television news broadcaster. She has determined that, from top to bottom, the USAGM is a giant rot and burden to the American taxpayer as well as a national security risk. It is not salvageable, and Lake’s team will clean it up so it can meet the “core mission of telling America’s story throughout the world in a meaningful, impactful and effective way.” Liberals have long been in charge at USAGM, and the previously mentioned Soros broadcast is just one of many examples. The Spanish-language segment, which focused on the Hungarian philanthropist’s efforts to cripple sovereign governments in Latin America, aired on Television Martí (which operates under OCB) and was available for months online before a scandal-plagued Democratic senator discovered it and demanded an investigation. The disgraced veteran lawmaker, Bob Menendez of New Jersey, was recently sentenced to 11 years in prison [] for bribery, extortion and conspiracy. At his request, Obama’s USAGM chief, John F. Lansing, fired eight reporters and editors involved in the Soros broadcast. Judicial Watch was cited as a source because it investigated [] State Department funding of Soros groups in Colombia and published a report [] on Soros’ initiatives to advance a radical globalist agenda in Guatemala. 4/26: [Milwaukee County Informational Meeting on Running for Local Office](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cduxdk-didthutlhu-dj/)**** **Upcoming WisGOP Events** **Buffalo County**
Republicans in Buffalo County hosted their Lincoln Day Dinner at Alma, along with Trempealeau, Pepin, and Pierce counties. Great turnout and a very energized crowd! **Calumet County**
Calumet County Republicans are gearing up for the Spring General Election! **Crawford County**
The Republican Party of Crawford County hosted their annual St. Patrick's Day Parade over the weekend. Congressman Derrick Van Orden joined in on the fun! **Dane County**
Brad Schimel joined Dane County Republicans at their annual caucus to discuss the upcoming Supreme Court Election in Wisconsin and encourage all members to GOTV! **Dunn County**
Dunn County Republicans posed for a quick photo before their door-knocking campaign over the weekend! We are so grateful for our amazing volunteers. **Fond du Lac**
Congressman Glenn Grothman joined Fond du Lac Republicans to get the message about about voting in the upcoming Spring General Election. **Grant County**
The Republican Party of Grant County teamed up with Young Republicans from UW-Platteville to support Brad Schimel at their Debate Watch Party. **Kenosha County**
Kenosha County Republicans came out in full force on St. Patrick's Day to show off their amazing parade float and support for our candidates! **Manitowoc County**
Never know who you are going to run into while knocking doors. State Rep. Lindee Brill working hard to get conservatives elected. **Milwaukee County**
200 Milwaukee Patriots joined the Republican Party and its members at their Stars, Shamrocks and Stripes event over the weekend! Guests heard from Supreme Court Candidate Brad Schimel, Congressman Bryan Steil, representatives, and more. Milwaukee is fired up for the Spring General Election! **Monroe County**
Monroe County Republicans hosted a Meet & Greet for Supreme Court Candidate Brad Schimel at the Sparta American Legion on Friday evening, where Congressman Derrick Van Orden made a surprise guest appearance. Schimel is law enforcement's choice! **Ozaukee County**
Ozaukee County Republicans are spreading the word about GOP candidates in the Spring General Election. **Portage County**
Chairman Hannah Testin spoke at the [Republican Party of Portage County, WI](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cduxdk-didthutlhu-dt/) Caucus. Also in attendance were [Cory Tomczyk for State Senate](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cduxdk-didthutlhu-di/), State Senator P[atrick Testin](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-cduxdk-didthutlhu-dd/) and local candidates. With 24 days until Election Day, the message from all speakers was focused on talking to friends and neighbors to encourage them to get to the polls **Racine County**
The Republican Party of Racine County hosted their annual Lincoln Day Dinner. Tons of Racine County Republicans showed up for a night of food, fun, and friends! **Richland County**
State Senator Patrick Testin speaking at the Richland County Lincoln Day Dinner! **St. Croix County**
The Republican Party of St. Croix County has begun a new initiative to help with local elections -- they held their first Battle Program meeting last week. **Walworth County **
Republicans in Walworth County have been hard at work making calls and assembling door-knocking materials to assist with the upcoming Spring election! **Washington County**
Washington County Republicans are all smiles when it comes to supporting their local and state candidates! **Waukesha County**
Waukesha County Republican fired up an amazing crowd at their Mega MAGA Rally. Upcoming Events 3/19: 3/20: 3/20: 3/21-3/23: 3/22: 3/22: 3/22: 3/22: 3/22: 3/23: 3/24: 3/25: 3/25: 3/25: 3/26: 3/26: 3/27: 3/27: 3/27: 3/27: 3/27: 3/27: 3/27: 3/29: 3/29: 3/29: 3/29: 3/29: 3/29: 3/29: 3/29: 3/29: 3/30: 3/31: 3/31: 3/31: 4/1: 4/5: 4/5: 4/5: 4/6: 4/7: 4/8: 4/8: 4/9: 4/10: 4/10: 4/10: 4/12: 4/12: 4/13: 4/19: 4/21: 4/26: ** Upcoming WisGOP Events Buffalo County Republicans in Buffalo County hosted their Lincoln Day Dinner at Alma, along with Trempealeau, Pepin, and Pierce counties. Great turnout and a very energized crowd! Calumet County Calumet County Republicans are gearing up for the Spring General Election! Crawford County The Republican Party of Crawford County hosted their annual St. Patrick's Day Parade over the weekend. Congressman Derrick Van Orden joined in on the fun! Dane County Brad Schimel joined Dane County Republicans at their annual caucus to discuss the upcoming Supreme Court Election in Wisconsin and encourage all members to GOTV! Dunn County Dunn County Republicans posed for a quick photo before their door-knocking campaign over the weekend! We are so grateful for our amazing volunteers. Fond du Lac Congressman Glenn Grothman joined Fond du Lac Republicans to get the message about about voting in the upcoming Spring General Election. Grant County The Republican Party of Grant County teamed up with Young Republicans from UW-Platteville to support Brad Schimel at their Debate Watch Party. Kenosha County Kenosha County Republicans came out in full force on St. Patrick's Day to show off their amazing parade float and support for our candidates! Manitowoc County Never know who you are going to run into while knocking doors. State Rep. Lindee Brill working hard to get conservatives elected. Milwaukee County 200 Milwaukee Patriots joined the Republican Party and its members at their Stars, Shamrocks and Stripes event over the weekend! Guests heard from Supreme Court Candidate Brad Schimel, Congressman Bryan Steil, representatives, and more. Milwaukee is fired up for the Spring General Election! Monroe County Monroe County Republicans hosted a Meet & Greet for Supreme Court Candidate Brad Schimel at the Sparta American Legion on Friday evening, where Congressman Derrick Van Orden made a surprise guest appearance. Schimel is law enforcement's choice! Ozaukee County Ozaukee County Republicans are spreading the word about GOP candidates in the Spring General Election. Portage County Chairman Hannah Testin spoke at the Caucus. Also in attendance were , State Senator P and local candidates. With 24 days until Election Day, the message from all speakers was focused on talking to friends and neighbors to encourage them to get to the polls Racine County The Republican Party of Racine County hosted their annual Lincoln Day Dinner. Tons of Racine County Republicans showed up for a night of food, fun, and friends! Richland County State Senator Patrick Testin speaking at the Richland County Lincoln Day Dinner! St. Croix County The Republican Party of St. Croix County has begun a new initiative to help with local elections -- they held their first Battle Program meeting last week. Walworth County Republicans in Walworth County have been hard at work making calls and assembling door-knocking materials to assist with the upcoming Spring election! Washington County Washington County Republicans are all smiles when it comes to supporting their local and state candidates! subject: Something special is happening.

body:
#
Something special is happening.
Over *34,000* people joined our Fight the Oligarchy rally tonight with Bernie Sanders and I.
Biggest political event in Denver since Obama 2008.
Working people are ready to stand together and fight for our democracy.
Thank you Colorado! ❤️

name: Hillsdale College via Pro Life Update
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc57m5outq0qtdr3irms23l72dplrn8r2qhfulfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdj6eor6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9hdntfv15o3s3cuh35o67g66pmm3oabpapa4deo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdj6eor6chh2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2k2pvv1bmqufm2ps7fqu64q1knfgjbah7rna4v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdj6eor6chh2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Pro Life Update
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
