name: Hillsdale College via Real American Reporting
subject: Stop DEI Lunacy
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from Real American Reporting is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm945hmb6k7s2p9nke7ppmvi0lkibbs3s0nvmph8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm8oj4c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zt76fa37olqgo6n9vcepg92914sm3pubg9ff1ieg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm8oj4c9h2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvcmbt6katr7qbfiorbhgr466l08qi4ntuh425ro_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm8oj4c9h2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---

Pop Acta Media | Real American Reporting

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh1p2ecstnmgj0drhnm1vh1gqignuojb81tfk47o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm8oj2chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0ca9p5u6bk0sm75er9knm173lvdi0vl6249u6ao_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm8oj2chh2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqb70v8vuuovj3p2a1d835if3r4f4cbcus44isrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm8oj2chh2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkb6s8pv7ltp88llj3ot0oika0rep4rd3ehpqpvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm8oj2clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zol4gqgre95a8a0lbgs6setofp26jv2kqvjjvpc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm8oj2clh2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2asgnhvpggavbqckecprkk6btseijqod125qucg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm8oj2clh2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

# _Weekly Update_
It was another productive week in your Statehouse as I work with my colleagues with the Indiana Senate Democrats to deliver results for **you**.

We worked to pass **[HB 1297](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9ec190a4c50dfc4ba8d635c1ebb1f1c32362334f5c70ff38efa5310779ff905ca73ab2d2e93696e21585e687d4a4283b1c4814a2bdb53511 "HB 1297"),** a bill that would create a yellow dot program in our state. This yellow dot would be placed on the back of a vehicle to, in the case of an emergency, indicate to first responders that an occupant of the vehicle has a chronic medical condition that made need special attention. More information would then be available in the glove compartment so that first responders could best attend to the individual.

I was also proud to support** [HB 1065](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9ec190a4c50dfc4ba17f49d43bf00bf8b418fd3c0c568fc2194a28f6d8ceca8bfeaf80be76d46a4919ecf30ca5cf61743c5b1688238d60de "HB 1065")**, authored by my Indiana Black Legislative Caucus colleague Rep. Robin Shackleford, which would offer financial relief to families going through cancer treatments.

As someone who was in the foster care system,** [HB 1441](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9ec190a4c50dfc4b23c9e9cdd8826f020146b995464fb6cc7dbcd30d417e0e23051090172b5fd33c0a73dd4de8938c377c24d6dbd9e3577b "HB 1441") **is especially** ** near and dear to my heart. This bill would allow foster youth to have access to a bank account. You can read even more about this bill in the **Bill Highlight section of my newsletter**.

I am so proud of the work the Indiana Senate Democratic Caucus is doing throughout this legislative session. We have remained laser focused on advocating for the real issues that matter to Hoosier families. We will keep advocating for the futures, families and freedoms of every person in this state as the 2025 legislative session continues on. **Committees I Served on This Week: ** **[Tax and Fiscal Policy](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9ec190a4c50dfc4b0ece42ba6666104e067ec4be4d169efb55a2a499475459f352bb4eb2fa900fc25fcd18cc868834e071edf8d07e6136d8 "Tax and Fiscal Policy")
[Pensions and Labor](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9ec190a4c50dfc4ba9c0468f9e532645e32c5656e06d116d683e63f69786f536fbbb9fe0a38e66e4e7faeeee1782daa652c235c3cf6bb86f "Pensions and Labor")
[Education and Career Development](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9ec190a4c50dfc4b7de592c7cd70b1e0bfcd89b2b7bd4a827631a6518724aa2c0e279aeb58dc65666a6cba18b7c8873162f689cd420cb5cc "Education and Career Development")**
**[Commerce and Technology](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9ec190a4c50dfc4be3b7e2521a5692e108fac71f9893267c10664d0dc24930d23b73c0472e76d73b26bb186fb3c2c1bea950d01617ece09d)**
**[Utilities](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9ec190a4c50dfc4bf3c6f7fafaa23296aefe731ac6a7e401d7df3fdbab778c2358e8347dfe3c57ddd5cb03229acd0dea450c17466b8a59eb "Utilities")**
There is just under _three weeks of committee meetings_, with lots of important legislation still waiting to be heard. This time of session is crucial. We need to deliver results for Hoosiers in a short amount of time. It is so important that folks are staying engaged, paying attention and keeping your leaders accountable. **We work for YOU. **
**As we work through the last three weeks of committee, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream committees and more on[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=9ec190a4c50dfc4b7aa26641d913a5c76511ea6f1e597fe206e5a7c8e1eb0360685ae21eaa373504a2d7fdf88568ef70c071a93b271793d6). ** **Make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. **
---
#
* * *
---
| | |
# _**IPS Student Day in the Statehouse**_
---
| |
---
It made my heart so happy to start my morning the same way I did for 20 years: looking at the smiling faces of children.

A group of 70 IPS students came to the Statehouse to learn about their state government and their important role in it.

I spoke with these young leaders on the importance of using their voice to stand up for their public schools and the many different ways they can do so.

Whether that is by calling their legislator, showing up at the Statehouse to testify, building coalitions, or simply sharing information with their peers on social media, every voice matters.

We know all too well that public education is under attack both in our state and throughout our country. I am honored to stand alongside these students, united in our support of all of our public schools.
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | As I mentioned above, this bill is especially important to me as someone who has been in the foster care system.

This bill would allow foster children to open a bank account without parental consent.

Currently, minors in Indiana cannot open a bank account without first having parental consent. With HB 1441, minors who are at least 16 could open a bank account with the authorization of juvenile court judges.

We have unfortunately heard of foster parents stealing money from their foster child's bank account, and know already that children in the foster care system are more likely to come from homes with financial instability.

Legislation like this empowers foster children, grants them extra agency in a world where they often have little, allows for them to start earning a living, and creates a pathway for them to start saving for their future.

I am grateful for the opportunity to use my voice to advocate for our state's foster youth and I will never cease to do so.
* * *
---
|
---
I am so excited for the inaugural Divine Nine Day at the Statehouse during the 2025 Legislative Session.

As a member of Zeta Phi Beta Sorority Incorporated, I cherish the opportunity to stand alongside my sisters at the Statehouse and to connect with all those who make up the Divine Nine.

These organizations have long used their voices to advocate for our communities and it is so special for this recognition at our Statehouse.

I encourage every person who is an active member or an alumni of the Divine Nine to show up to the Statehouse Tuesday, March 25. Events start at 9 AM and will continue throughout the day. We create change together, and this is a perfect opportunity for us to unite our voices to cultivate that change.
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | I cannot wait to host my March coffee meet up this upcoming**Friday, March 28** , at Mansion Society.

This is a wonderful opportunity to show up to ask questions about session, upcoming legislation and what the rest of session might have in store, all while drinking great coffee and supporting a local Indy business.

Mansion Society is a woman owned business ran by a mother-daughter team in the building that used to operate as the Central State Hospital, and I am so grateful they are offering their space.

I will be there from **8 - 10 AM**. Please feel free to stop by at any point; I can't wait to see you there!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | | | | | Weekly Update It was another productive week in your Statehouse as I work with my colleagues with the Indiana Senate Democrats to deliver results for you. We worked to pass "HB 1297", a bill that would create a yellow dot program in our state. This yellow dot would be placed on the back of a vehicle to, in the case of an emergency, indicate to first responders that an occupant of the vehicle has a chronic medical condition that made need special attention. More information would then be available in the glove compartment so that first responders could best attend to the individual. I was also proud to support "HB 1065", authored by my Indiana Black Legislative Caucus colleague Rep. Robin Shackleford, which would offer financial relief to families going through cancer treatments. As someone who was in the foster care system, "HB 1441" is especially near and dear to my heart. This bill would allow foster youth to have access to a bank account. You can read even more about this bill in the Bill Highlight section of my newsletter. I am so proud of the work the Indiana Senate Democratic Caucus is doing throughout this legislative session. We have remained laser focused on advocating for the real issues that matter to Hoosier families. We will keep advocating for the futures, families and freedoms of every person in this state as the 2025 legislative session continues on. Committees I Served on This Week: "Tax and Fiscal Policy" "Pensions and Labor" "Education and Career Development" "Utilities" There is just under three weeks of committee meetings, with lots of important legislation still waiting to be heard. This time of session is crucial. We need to deliver results for Hoosiers in a short amount of time. It is so important that folks are staying engaged, paying attention and keeping your leaders accountable. We work for YOU. As we work through the last three weeks of committee, stay up to date on important legislation updates, stream committees and more on. Make sure you are following my social media channels for daily updates about session and our District 46 community. | | | IPS Student Day in the Statehouse | | It made my heart so happy to start my morning the same way I did for 20 years: looking at the smiling faces of children. A group of 70 IPS students came to the Statehouse to learn about their state government and their important role in it. I spoke with these young leaders on the importance of using their voice to stand up for their public schools and the many different ways they can do so. Whether that is by calling their legislator, showing up at the Statehouse to testify, building coalitions, or simply sharing information with their peers on social media, every voice matters. We know all too well that public education is under attack both in our state and throughout our country. I am honored to stand alongside these students, united in our support of all of our public schools. | | | | | | As I mentioned above, this bill is especially important to me as someone who has been in the foster care system. This bill would allow foster children to open a bank account without parental consent. Currently, minors in Indiana cannot open a bank account without first having parental consent. With HB 1441, minors who are at least 16 could open a bank account with the authorization of juvenile court judges. We have unfortunately heard of foster parents stealing money from their foster child's bank account, and know already that children in the foster care system are more likely to come from homes with financial instability. Legislation like this empowers foster children, grants them extra agency in a world where they often have little, allows for them to start earning a living, and creates a pathway for them to start saving for their future. I am grateful for the opportunity to use my voice to advocate for our state's foster youth and I will never cease to do so. | I am so excited for the inaugural Divine Nine Day at the Statehouse during the 2025 Legislative Session. As a member of Zeta Phi Beta Sorority Incorporated, I cherish the opportunity to stand alongside my sisters at the Statehouse and to connect with all those who make up the Divine Nine. These organizations have long used their voices to advocate for our communities and it is so special for this recognition at our Statehouse. I encourage every person who is an active member or an alumni of the Divine Nine to show up to the Statehouse Tuesday, March 25. Events start at 9 AM and will continue throughout the day. We create change together, and this is a perfect opportunity for us to unite our voices to cultivate that change. | | | | | | I cannot wait to host my March coffee meet up this upcomingFriday, March 28 , at Mansion Society. This is a wonderful opportunity to show up to ask questions about session, upcoming legislation and what the rest of session might have in store, all while drinking great coffee and supporting a local Indy business. Mansion Society is a woman owned business ran by a mother-daughter team in the building that used to operate as the Central State Hospital, and I am so grateful they are offering their space. I will be there from 8 - 10 AM. Please feel free to stop by at any point; I can't wait to see you there! In the News "" "" "" | | COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN, 46204, US

We're racing against the clock...

**In less than TWO WEEKS, the fate of our House Majority will be decided in not one but TWO Special Elections: In FL-06 for Mike Waltz 's seat and in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat.**

name: Brandon Gill
subject: Impeachment
body:
This can’t wait.

| | | | |
---
Fellow patriot,
I’ll get straight to the point.
I have **_[filed articles of Impeachment](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/adbe/?__vbtrk=MjgxNDQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjgxNDQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_** in the House of Representatives against rogue activist Judge James Boasberg.

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Defeat DEI Survey
body:
DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvqpq1g6u0boen9kdg2n7ijqgjc8cc649fqfd0dg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm1ob4c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

[I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztspbfnie8s88ipvqjrt96iq8nko0dtt948dv818_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm1ob4c9h2bs).

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by taking your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. You can find it at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zubfsd1b4ubfm5fe4um820htmimlh1lfbf8bqai8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdgm1ob4c9h2bs)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Success isn’t a sin – It’s American.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I believe President Trump's greatest accomplishment so far hasn't been a specific policy or economic number – it's been the revival of our national spirit.

I believe President Trump's greatest accomplishment so far hasn't been a specific policy or economic number – it's been the revival of our national spirit.
I believe President Trump's greatest accomplishment so far hasn't been a specific policy or economic number - it's been the revival of our national spirit.
| |
---
| | | | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-KUgigw3CIg)
---
Peter,

For too long, we've been held back by an addiction to the past and a culture of victimhood. But I believe we're on the cusp of something new: a revival of American excellence, where we unapologetically pursue success - **where we are victors, NOT victims.**

I believe President Trump's greatest accomplishment so far hasn't been a specific policy or economic number - [it's been the revival of our national spirit.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-H_TAp59o8A2Q "it's been the revival of our national spirit.")

This isn't just about one politician or one party - it's about all of us. It's about parents teaching their kids to be proud of themselves, teachers inspiring their students to strive for greatness, and leaders at every level modeling the behavior we want to see in our country.

As a candidate for Governor in Ohio, I'm committed to bringing this spirit of American excellence to every corner of our state. **Success isn 't a sin - it's American. **

**[Will you join me in this revival by making a contribution to my campaign today? Contribute $4, $40, or $400 today- any amount you can afford to spare - and let's make America's comeback a reality.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.__p8rEx0-g "With your help, we’ll win this race and start on DAY ONE in Ohio.")**

Let's turn the page on the past and chase our future together. Let's show the world what it means to be American: proud, unapologetic, and committed to excellence.

God bless you, and God bless America,

Vivek Ramaswamy

body:
In less than TWO WEEKS, the fate of our House Majority will be decided in not one but TWO Special Elections

| |

| | | **- SPECIAL ELECTION ALERTS - **
_From House Republicans_
---

We're racing against the clock...

**In less than TWO WEEKS, the fate of our House Majority will be decided in not one but TWO Special Elections: In FL-06 for Mike Waltz 's seat and in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat.**

If we lose, Democrats will be within striking distance of House control.

They'd have the power to block every single America First Agenda item President Trump is fighting for. Everything we've worked so hard for could come to a SCREECHING HALT unless Patriots nationwide band together and do their part to save our fragile House Majority.

We need an IMMEDIATE SURGE of support to hold these crucial seats.

_Our goal: 20,000 contributions in the next 24 hours. _

Every minute counts.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: 2 Days to Defend against Project Veritas—HelpMe Finish This Fight!
body:
Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I’ve championed—it’s been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts.

| [****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zji95p780uafkn8ajbtqjsp7naoi8p28737iqej8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs)
[****](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl3i5mt7isudbs0t7f2lrfsafhfecj54lap94k90_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs) Dear Patriot,

I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm reaching out because I'm staring down the barrel of a make-or-break moment.

**Project Veritas --the outfit I built from nothing over 13 years--fired me in February 2023 and is now suing me to kill my career as an investigative journalist. **[**I need your help to defend against this brutal lawsuit.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za9nj952n7o447flfuvbhg58ghu1hdds3nha4qto_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs)

They're trying to bury me, to snuff out the work I love, the work that's exposed corruption from ACORN to Big Tech to the Treasury's resistance to Elon's DOGE reforms. [**But I 'm damn close to ending this nightmare--and I need you to get me across the finish line.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z12k1ugc3mdn6e386631gasfrssjgmo3pt2q6m5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs)

Here's where we stand: after two years of legal warfare, we're in the final stretch before trial.

**Discovery 's wrapping up, and the courtroom's in sight**. My team's been relentless--digging through their lies, proving this is a personal vendetta to stop me from doing what I was born to do: **uncover truth for you, the public**.

But the bills are piling up fast. [**I 've got a stack of attorney fees--$42,000--that I need to pay in the next 2 days to keep fighting**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvs4nq1cl00utnfc2pc67q153su9db7cf7lpl4v8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs). Without it, **Project Veritas might just win their war to shut me down for good.**

This isn't just about me--it's about what's worth fighting for.

Truth isn't a luxury; it's the oxygen of a free society. Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I've championed--it's been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts.

Project Veritas wants to choke that off, to silence a voice that's served the public, not their egos. I've launched O'Keefe Media Group (OMG) to keep the flame alive--our recent IRS expose proves it--**but this lawsuit is a chainsaw aimed at my roots**.

I've spent decades dodging threats, lawsuits, and smears--13 years at Project Veritas, thousands of hours on the ground, scars earned breaking stories that shook the world.

Now, I'm asking you to stand with me. **[**Donate now --$25, $50, $100, whatever you can spare--to hit that $42,000 goal in 10 days**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z85k5b3t6rm1ej9n28js7chrod3t0d4di0dsuva8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs)**[**.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbfslkiqdle8b4e6ooktn4j41ic313pma6dvd8b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs)

Your support isn't just cash; it's a lifeline to finish this fight and keep exposing corruption through OMG. [**The finish line 's close, but I can't cross it alone.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2i90jdb6r861du2dukoo7nn8naqikj55v2oqe38_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs)

[**Donate Now --Get Me to Trial.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvj5h009lq88nm6rvd5h5l3ctng5tc02p63jvh2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs)

Truth is a fragile thing--without warriors to defend it, it withers.

**Let 's show Project Veritas they can't end me or our mission**. [**Give today, and let 's bury this attack once and for all**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcfvrfum30kn7rggcm9103tmh0q26l96sj8o4p98_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim4p72c9h2bs).

Thanks for having my back,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

clean_body: Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I’ve championed—it’s been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts. | Dear Patriot, I'm James O'Keefe, and I'm reaching out because I'm staring down the barrel of a make-or-break moment. Project Veritas --the outfit I built from nothing over 13 years--fired me in February 2023 and is now suing me to kill my career as an investigative journalist. They're trying to bury me, to snuff out the work I love, the work that's exposed corruption from ACORN to Big Tech to the Treasury's resistance to Elon's DOGE reforms. Here's where we stand: after two years of legal warfare, we're in the final stretch before trial. Discovery 's wrapping up, and the courtroom's in sight. My team's been relentless--digging through their lies, proving this is a personal vendetta to stop me from doing what I was born to do: uncover truth for you, the public. But the bills are piling up fast. . Without it, Project Veritas might just win their war to shut me down for good. This isn't just about me--it's about what's worth fighting for. Truth isn't a luxury; it's the oxygen of a free society. Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I've championed--it's been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts. Project Veritas wants to choke that off, to silence a voice that's served the public, not their egos. I've launched O'Keefe Media Group (OMG) to keep the flame alive--our recent IRS expose proves it--but this lawsuit is a chainsaw aimed at my roots. I've spent decades dodging threats, lawsuits, and smears--13 years at Project Veritas, thousands of hours on the ground, scars earned breaking stories that shook the world. Now, I'm asking you to stand with me. Your support isn't just cash; it's a lifeline to finish this fight and keep exposing corruption through OMG. Truth is a fragile thing--without warriors to defend it, it withers. Let 's show Project Veritas they can't end me or our mission. . Thanks for having my back, James O’Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group P.S. We're 2 days from the edge--$42,000 stands between me and trial. body:

| Peter, It's the Blue Amp Action Team with an important update about Ohio. [Before we explain more, can you split a $10 right now between Blue Amp and the Ohio Democratic Party to build the infrastructure for Democrats to win? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T187d164e-0362-48de-8bd8-d473442ee14a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Elections have already started here in the Buckeye State.

With JD Vance joining Trump in the White House, a special election has been confirmed to fill his Senate seat.

We're already watching a billionaire, Vivek Ramaswamy, move into the neighborhood and announce his run for governor.

And Ohio Democrats are gearing up against other MAGA loyalists that are ready to spend millions to buy upcoming elections in 2025.

Trump and his MAGA loyalists think they know Ohioan's priority, but they don't.

Ohio is a state of hard working people that worry about putting food on the table and providing a better life for their children. Not about the Gulf of America.

The Buckeye State is built by working-class people. Not billionaires and out-of-touch politicians.

That's why we need to elect people who will fight like hell for the working class, who will make healthcare affordable, and who will stand up against Trump to preserve our democracy.

[We can't let Republicans think Ohio can be bought out by out-of-touch billionaires and politicians, and we need a strong grassroots team to defeat their efforts. Can you join our fight and split a donation of any amount between Blue Amp and the Ohio Democratic Party to flip the Senate and Governor's seats, and win every upcoming election for working people today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T95c79b28-bef1-4a19-af30-7ccd6151325b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5b77a3e5-57f2-46dc-8416-42be641421ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ffa90fdc2d94e98aa156792448103cd&_e=dqu_ISf4TZvfE0mOFajMkVJE7gnwOoY3o4LPB7vmEE2SyTs68AxVy0mCS9-imCBtnDfZsYBV8NRofbWlfGYAFeEkt3jsXaCsh8Kp8R1yET6ytWUDf58MYCp4_ky7sV-0f3f42Ahp6Rt-rdUvEkmzUzpp81yqZyU55V35m0xh0K6xxQAD3h-gsB3ETBvkiQGR9rzZxI5ILlsUqzJFpKTkB9I7bjKR8i6x_57h7kJkDSeBRpFVKIpQrJavKL5Cs5xrnqqeiyM-ylOnZfWpVXCWTkhRGt68imskJ2dn0Flrn9PsjC5xLyFgoBqd4cMmXkw_bT4zR_-nPDA9_lOXcMjcgSYtwCvQ_lNhbkAZ5T9gPFeT6Uqqi8oN3xRyyPJqAWWtJb_Iyow8Kob3RYM54ZAos0CndiL-ORs8aNByaoThwgL82NeRTFtp77xDlr6ZLx3O) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I'm writing to let you know about something I think you'll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ffa90fdc2d94e98aa156792448103cd&_e=dqu_ISf4TZvfE0mOFajMkVJE7gnwOoY3o4LPB7vmEE2SyTs68AxVy0mCS9-imCBtnDfZsYBV8NRofbWlfGYAFeEkt3jsXaCsh8Kp8R1yET6ytWUDf58MYCp4_ky7sV-0f3f42Ahp6Rt-rdUvEkmzUzpp81yqZyU55V35m0xh0K6xxQAD3h-gsB3ETBvkiQGR9rzZxI5ILlsUqzJFpKTkB9I7bjKR8i6x_57h7kJkDSeBRpFVKIpQrJavKL5Cs5xrnqqeiyM-ylOnZfWpVXCWTkhRGt68imskJ2dn0Flrn9M4NWshti456NwE73lbL4AJAVPBdJJARSZiZMkq6-QYaW0MjSCvzNIxoK5ikvAsTBdMDdr7iF8QTZKiM9GkWqma9eJ0H6k_e6D7t926bTxjVsmHryd_1IwYcAeR7fzMw5TV8R1Qgf_gNdC0hTGvvpPw) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as "theology," has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that's what Hillsdale's **" Theology 101" **online course is about--the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**" Theology 101"** has been a popular course, so I'm pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ffa90fdc2d94e98aa156792448103cd&_e=dqu_ISf4TZvfE0mOFajMkVJE7gnwOoY3o4LPB7vmEE2SyTs68AxVy0mCS9-imCBtnDfZsYBV8NRofbWlfGYAFeEkt3jsXaCsh8Kp8R1yET6ytWUDf58MYCp4_ky7sV-0f3f42Ahp6Rt-rdUvEkmzUzpp81yqZyU55V35m0xh0K6xxQAD3h-gsB3ETBvkiQGR9rzZxI5ILlsUqzJFpKTkB9I7bjKR8i6x_57h7kJkDSeBRpFVKIpQrJavKL5Cs5xrnqqeiyM-ylOnZfWpVXCWTkhRGt68imskJ2dn0Flrn9OtqHkmwOH9gav-hEvGjgYgbuUVBVDmqeQu0BwjqU5frvxV_WvYXLOQXqtUyVJdDux1hq7QpIye527BuTLIR_tuUf4Tv-jzPMR9wnserCqK6sQaCkDY-UU13jfIlclHoJLPhPLabsje6Qq3wBpZPlmM). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though--and they go fast--so don't delay in getting your copy of **" Theology 101"** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ffa90fdc2d94e98aa156792448103cd&_e=dqu_ISf4TZvfE0mOFajMkVJE7gnwOoY3o4LPB7vmEE2SyTs68AxVy0mCS9-imCBtnDfZsYBV8NRofbWlfGYAFeEkt3jsXaCsh8Kp8R1yET6ytWUDf58MYCp4_ky7sV-0f3f42Ahp6Rt-rdUvEkmzUzpp81yqZyU55V35m0xh0K6xxQAD3h-gsB3ETBvkiQGR9rzZxI5ILlsUqzJFpKTkB9I7bjKR8i6x_57h7kJkDSeBRpFVKIpQrJavKL5Cs5xrnqqeiyM-ylOnZfWpVXCWTkhRGt68imskJ2dn0Flrn9M-Qe74-9ctpeiieos9L_xW8xe_ZUvjqEGv8p18w87GvpoPvGQ-y5IngNwPDsYrtOGFwqVyFYTtTuf6C4yO8MmHuWFzqBB0l7ZFVLoAFt7XClmjCCnc8fS1613m2LxFnjv2w--iX5_XPiK1RQFm-XU0)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/HvdK4IQNuYiqI06UJsj30Yz8ukev2hQAu8l9qu0Al_tfNvbTvaTYEqYqD0IgY3uxPJ7yKmeY5gMBJpILPVK53ppnRWup9Kv2RfIrQSr--UA3j1WiyKPRtki1AxR-3NzDcGr117jGK21QX15eSKEmLN6ULoNDdeoWWCEDWDEbDsru8rLdRSxcSH48EXKquFieqFWz9__zoE5zx4hsAoxePKYMeEpZx08eSMJHQXf-wimP_yRBXLvoPehHrKPRpM1-aLGxlvezYXp2ObeMKz7_-uDlv7rgp2S2O3-_StzTaiPfeDQv5EA0lGDLvUlBH5juBtbJ2XCaRip2gJbLoEH2goPVZJ_ilFQI5yPp3Wi1axaJyltSiQlJVYeaczmtacJ4TJAODJhIw6I3BwjXuO4_xfG7JXkJOwP4kw_IUAhJG1SROkWDXhFcDKc/faGEofiQ0bqesHeHCPCV_oKxnBrmuotW/7)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/ikD7x5kDvkkGb2GqChvNKjUO-ERMwXSPzhi6HyDu5kcy7uT01rXXV-T6mWGqFctd06m9fGN80-LA2MGJf3o9eYnyhOY7LaKyX6vdoHf2OxA8CRmxuevhvYbNp_GSdj1zbm_lynFXdCztsQKuTYhRKhYX9SFuTW1Q52gT-Y15oiF90xe_6itlVwBIg4NQi9WGdVT1T8JON82EQ2SqYYBu-RKoSo5J7hv7YAsZc9uv39u8wPwavFSyxoXhWXb6cnHURcPkxRLgD9ZucggBDFkfZw_447Ch4HMSjFjCHgu-9tQQ7OUL6c63_vSKIgqBsLV1B3Rcn_oOPt2QgdLUqjA6iK14uXJtfyue4-KPcjaGaL0k9h1R4e3DkOzBZUS76H4d0UMqK2aK-nYO-4Y0d76foKK5pJ0JEvT5SQep_GeKPkqieEIqt9t4no4/fd5S8ff3NvS_b4ptCdsabkxSzSOZx4q6/7)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/e7FFyv8d3DvhOxBKoTOFH7sznTM_3TJL4KJKwuiG_s4ntk0uqJvEkMYBcoBIP9kenPe-1DOlbLewRG8rEd3kLcCkgC-JgJvitYW1t67gbBSYijgvmrzAvxUBRKvufABc9fdfgSAqTPb6P31iLGQHing31qYp7V0xZuRsagX_qfvrhq0Nihm4w-R8BTOCwkFruVrCf0C2LeSwrSGcNo6AK4nF-tmNQf8zGUmiSNSbEacZ11a6Hv9A1vGhz8iUVM0LwYo2EhNMZ7TQEEzEBoi6El9nyn6FNb1aQoliAQP1oxtmRBrglrhxmLpksWUTrDQK7LiQzEgHE_zQvONrUOnxv6Vyx16OhpP3oURJysXWCUmvekg60FEyx-cQZXhNc-vwTrmqfLt83TsTcTzqx_8lW2DPcvFKkMv5rm6i3l_Mag5TaL5-GBGrNk4/dYut7rbjYrfP-AiI-gUYkaWezL5jDYLh/7)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

# **▶️Elon Musk’s Power Grab—It’s Worse Than You Think**
---
Dear friend, Elon Musk isn’t just a billionaire with bad takes—he’s a **power-hungry autocrat-in-the-making** using his fortune to **manipulate democracy, spread disinformation, and silence working-class voices.** And the receipts are piling up. [**_Watch our latest video exposing Musk’s frightening history with authoritarianism and see just how far he’s willing to go._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wvbsd-vt1478-kyd76rh1/) ▶️
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wvbsd-vt1479-kyd76rh2/)
---
| | | | Elon Musk isn’t just meddling in politics—**he’s waging a full-scale attack on democracy.** He’s **propping up extremists, bankrolling election deniers, and rigging the system in his favor.** Musk is pouring **millions** into buying courts, influencing policy, and stacking government agencies with his allies—all while **pushing fascist propaganda on his platform.** His companies? **Run like a personal empire.** He **crushes unions, silences dissent, and enforces his will with zero accountability.** And now, he’s trying to expand that control into our democracy. **We broke it all down in our latest video—**[** _watch now to see just how dangerous Musk’s authoritarian ambitions could be._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wvbsd-vt147a-kyd76rh2/)**▶️** Billionaires like Musk **shouldn’t be able to buy elections and dismantle democracy.** No Dem Left Behind is fighting back—**organizing, mobilizing, and electing real leaders who stand for working Americans, not tech tyrants.** But we need you in this fight. In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team

body:

Former Speaker Newt Gingrich reached out...
GOP Chairwoman Lisa McClain reached out...
FL-01 Special Election Candidate Jimmy Patronis reached out...
FL-06 Special Election Candidate Randy Fine reached out..._

ALL of these America First Patriots reached out pleading for your help to save our House Majority before it is too late. Why?

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/K4rvUWUso0ErdEWDRkN2oc9NNOuPt_F7kdRQf1P7VPK_X1IyRZBoR8U8xDptOgytRWEo3ID4P1J9YxUKhf8k2UTPujEpSiSNfrlb7i_LCGBFGjSIMlczYr-eZg9zfDOPdCQhDCkbrdZ3zopvMNsPcyaMVSBTtpc--4a9nHZ27eKJHMJjrW5WALYUGNAj_BJcwzBMkVxpsdUOV8AZbGfRPJYHXeVia_Xpa9ThBJ6KCtS2dkaiN7LZBFcSJ1oBU39zXNJAHRi5u7Ic4ikDN74EtpZuV5rdvGrjA5csjdMk5WaoIq8HbGyziDqf79hCGMJgRUwzQ7iq28bz1Qln_g0Twz2aLW9qBfxK8t373OpB6rm8edxytgSMZLkElqzXn8mESaTSzeDBScPOf5Rvz9ZUeDFK-0YJAhnvsyYv1lOmwTFHMmGvkruSB-E/7Lcqg_EHe5tyBciPtFlk2ypcZjHcigEh/7)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/98J0u7qApUh4qm7opObQmWn9K0r6Ml9NR_umWxL4q30vhgxXuTfNxlK-bUhR8IwbPxigFkY7iAwZIinfeL3KrtDn-axWCFC4w4E7iFoYkgBaG9QlVKt90peC0JuFbLqSaSFEvuHm5y0b6foTtM_QluVY-B-A0rHTHF_-EP4hFwbe7pn9j9C6atj3Jj7-2QI5aZMe4n1cFyZ8UzsChGrGegQ6OTzTJWuIdYAq9cg1rhR6DfkMjExyPIgaYpPfhM0WZ2gRMX4u8fuVrAO__lO3C3DjkxnocGsLDko0NrC37S82XzEwCRjrlXblx_2mA8jW_H7CAUHuNl9pdLezNdNHfqZ7hT_Jr3NM8BIve4dTWjXvr2kzpRWCm3najLNwqnFeVMlBiVX8GGij5c6L_M9IlXkaRpQJvCFg8jLjUGUfh0mqe3t5-RYYHgw/qEuBQ_86sRuYdmQQAKAugDE78FxOJllP/7)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/1ldVSVtqhSw9HUykGZzSR8dnzDs3m-qnWhknIKANY7xVtwqx8x5N7ks7JYUCae-XanFKj-0ioQrkvq9WNPgSb10K4efGq5kseZGigE61G_xPHC_UECUdD9z1b7UcMDtgfCeUFxICtw05edgyb5YYzf-_nC9N_WChxGzMuRazBeAWajz7UOj7-tRy4C-Fo3PbtlJgpE1TbabZ8deiOQPowaWbpIKRAk6vUeNQ-12f2iVYpDPbgkLWWe_f24HcIcxrDF-7XsUakIGFv84r-PuDX9W6buCIQ4sGOWl-YD7YH-H0BCJtI49kcUfHaczsaVd35UyHntA1idan3hP4YcUByvurdA5m-2ZRuIEJKV-vuUDl-Sv5P-7gxcQ-S13qX1f08IzQUadT-TnaZLdElK3b9_TWnZCbOlZ8GPkDGAPGmd9ghopk4hKZTDk/DqO_euCM6isUtn-SaFSJUEaYQEHz3KOD/7)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/u/NWUirikdHWWB4b7TUpx_wKZZo1UWnugJdamY80qM1ROryr1NFZgjFv0idCOYID5UFou_kQbLpZoulYQ3JT8CKchkgSO69DVVRmWUyGwLsH4nOJL1CHTKi-oQDKTpNKBl4_QccKvQ_ODY_tT_a6wdBQV1g8cj0DPrFpLlL9vHRXGrH14JoZgddyToTSljDkb-IdljT6Rc0a-Y4w8UMDsJacK-pyGn-zB41Q/rbxoa32H97DQTqqQkC53ZN9ysmbPsIEO/7)

name: History Facts
subject: Were there female gladiators in ancient Rome?
body:
If you learned everything you know about gladiators from a certain Ridley Scott movie, there’s a lot left to discover about the ancient Roman blood sport.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68e90nnigcty146az1k2nk8ebca0ig5ctfdww4aa3wo7a9ldmt96osq6s7kpxcq69t2p6hrkhm5bporojuqelohkaxmqbc3ewbodt6hgm1svb0oan0rvcxc8ll5haqz8rlwbfci0c1fhcqxba&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [There were female gladiators in ancient Rome.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I f you learned everything you know about gladiators from a certain Ridley Scott movie, there’s a lot left to discover about the ancient Roman blood sport. Most compelling, perhaps, is the fact that there were [female gladiators](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Details of their exploits are scant compared to those of their male counterparts, but scholars and historians agree that gladiatrices had their share of glory in the arena. Though most came from lower classes, including enslaved women, some middle- and upper-class women also took up the sword and sandal, despite their lifestyle being frowned upon by Roman society, where they had far fewer freedoms than men and were defined in relation to them.
---
As for why women of means would choose to enter the arena, the University of Michigan’s David S. Potter [offers](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) this timeless explanation to History.com: “It’s exciting. It’s different. It pisses off their parents.” Though these female fights were relatively rare and mostly presented as novelty acts, literary and archaeological evidence suggests that a select few women received as much reverence as the men did. The most famous example is a bust depicting two gladiatrices using the stage names Amazon and Achillia, who fought to a noble draw — proving what we do in life really does echo in eternity.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our [Terms of Use](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=2kh5r9m0gvwj1o10cb9sgmbnhw4f7h2x443euoh9li02geil4cv66anqn3w0gbah9x8ri6579kknklba5zixu243drje6i6cigafezh22d1cgnz0tt6hfq5ldqpopifc8bfzh1oy8hd0lvryq1weyqyohfpqapnk7zkenw5u438fh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and [Privacy Policy](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=463ko1dghovu7u4ajk91hz6xnadi7muowxhi0r12jk85qr706bgpnref4rso19a2i06mkl57n6kz1vut86m3fa4jjej3ylb69xxur1gpxnb0913i9vaywsrwzldi93rrk7icf372764b14ypwm0rzywxrems96bdsxrop8tmc14ra196&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

## Most gladiator fights weren’t to the death.
Though it makes for compelling drama, the idea of gladiators fighting to the death simply wasn’t practical, and [most](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stiuu2&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of their bouts did not end in loss of life. For one, fighters were expensive investments for the men who promoted (and, in many cases, owned) them; if the sponsor of an individual fight (known as a _munerarius_) decided that a defeated gladiator was to be killed, he would have to compensate said combatant’s owner (or _lanista_). Which isn’t to say that a gladiator could expect to live a long life. Quite the opposite — few made it past their 20s, and it’s estimated that anywhere from one in five to one in 10 fights did end in death.
---

name: (5) Missed Messages
subject: So many Senators have reached out to you
body:
It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.

| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvk6frdtmec8olfcvh1os6k1mc96s2hpfpdbr838_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h2bs)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgkc6s1e6h9h30cdlih09luonu3ibt5tehi1s6s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h2bs)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9fbbclgr4chtntr3p4r1pussl3f6iutfr48ms18_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h2bs)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkd12736kfhefdbphth9qcmsbob0c5a5p1nrrc68_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h2bs)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zod1fptfn2gr2i4ig2g3rgppqkapksqav6fe1ce0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhg8egioigclqn87oafvetir43jgffb8gv0a5cag_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. Brave Books is focused on sparking historic revival this Easter! They've launched a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate -- to Jesus. **[**Please help us point families to the empty tomb this Easter with your gift of $35, $50, $100, or more.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvipc8ajg5umr7r2gjg4c9p9rk5f2mulib50mkpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h2bs)** As a special thank you for your gift of $100 or more we'll send you your very own copy of Saving the Easter Bunny for your family. Thank you!
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0kc4grdrbtk30nrgd5f89kg57mf7qdn3043n1jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | As we start the New Year, I have big news to share with you. But first, I want to say something about the victories you helped us accomplish in 2024.
---

Pop Acta Media | Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0m4or6b82fb2vndp68v49jbucgac8gsdfoo2in0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5i6eoj1c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgbafkfaiq6ov74g0a8acts13ld4hjohj4d54ufo_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim6pb6c9h2bs)_

[**But I 'm damn close to ending this nightmare--and I need you to get me across the finish line.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znj3lnqtgocopd4a586lgcrhtjma46n0g1eha060_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim9oj4cph2bs)

Here's where we stand: after two years of legal warfare, we're in the final stretch before trial.

**Discovery 's wrapping up, and the courtroom's in sight**. My team's been relentless--digging through their lies, proving this is a personal vendetta to stop me from doing what I was born to do: **uncover truth for you, the public**.

But the bills are piling up fast. [**I 've got a stack of attorney fees--$42,000--that I need to pay in the next 10 days to keep fighting**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6cg1od5ukfbtb5td1rku1475u0pq4nu8i6go7eg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim9oj4cph2bs). Without it, **Project Veritas might just win their war to shut me down for good.**

This isn't just about me--it's about what's worth fighting for.

Truth isn't a luxury; it's the oxygen of a free society. Every undercover sting, every hidden camera, every whistleblower I've championed--it's been for you, to rip the veil off power and give you the raw, unfiltered facts.

Project Veritas wants to choke that off, to silence a voice that's served the public, not their egos. I've launched O'Keefe Media Group (OMG) to keep the flame alive--our recent IRS expose proves it--**but this lawsuit is a chainsaw aimed at my roots**.

I've spent decades dodging threats, lawsuits, and smears--13 years at Project Veritas, thousands of hours on the ground, scars earned breaking stories that shook the world.

Now, I'm asking you to stand with me. **[**Donate now --$25, $50, $100, whatever you can spare--to hit that $42,000 goal in 2 days**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5r980c49ho9na9f4fb64drbc4lsdmg2tbegba48_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim9oj4cph2bs)**[**.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1u4fujnontod0udp3244jeu1mr20v2qca86fh2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim9oj4cph2bs)

Your support isn't just cash; it's a lifeline to finish this fight and keep exposing corruption through OMG. [**The finish line 's close, but I can't cross it alone.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs03jrmctb9nvb993361fbmop60g9g4kqvj6dkl8_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim9oj4cph2bs)

[**Donate Now --Get Me to Trial.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zsag981uli0o3mp3upf5bbch6f721bc0cgo6nvhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim9oj4cph2bs)

Truth is a fragile thing--without warriors to defend it, it withers.

**Let 's show Project Veritas they can't end me or our mission**. [**Give today, and let 's bury this attack once and for all**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zop87917mvnhn44oe8at2q5d3veuogi8ss7k2bk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim9oj4cph2bs).

Thanks for having my back,

James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We're 2 days from the edge--$42,000 stands between me and trial. [**Help me end this assault and keep investigative journalism alive --donate now!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgjps7oddfkjjjuultqqg0j90l23kknpad1if09g_rp22sh2s8i6eob2cdim9oj4cph2bs)

---

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Massive win on income tax elimination!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/visionaryvsvoid-11574071?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, BOOM! Mississippi just scored a massive win — our House voted 88-24 to phase out the state income tax, and bill is now on its way to Governor Reeves’ desk!

This is what happens when conservatives dig in and fight for bold, principled policies. You helped make this possible.
---
|
---
_Heroes eliminate the income tax! _
| **Shoutouts to Governor Tate Reeves for his leadership on this, Speaker Jason White for prioritizing this, and Rep. Trey Lamar for crafting the plan. **

The bill slashes the 4% flat rate by 0.25% yearly, hitting 3% by 2030. Thereafter, the rate will be reduced using a series of triggers. This means that as and when the state budget is in surplus after 2030, the rate will be reduced further until it is eliminated entirely.

**Thanks to the Senate amendments, the plan does not now include any increase in the sales tax, and does include a cut in the tax on groceries.** While the bill overall reduces tax by $330 million, it does increase the gas tax, essentially to pay for roads.

Given that the post 2030 cuts in the income tax depend on having a surplus, ensuring our politicians keep spending under control is going to be critical.

MCPP’s been pushing for full income tax elimination since last fall with a blizzard of articles, interviews and meetings all pushing for “full elimination with triggers”.
---
|
---
_A priority: full elimination with triggers .... _
| **We ruffled feathers when suggesting that the Senate’s initial counter plan was not the real deal.** That’s how you move the dial.

Progressives who opposed this bill will no doubt be quick to tell us that there is something ‘unfair’ about the bill. Nonsense, using data from the Institute on Taxation and Economic Policy, I estimate that the 20 percent of households with the lowest income in our state contribute less than 2 percent of the total income tax bill. The 20 percent of households with the highest income pay about a third of the overall state income tax bill.

**Mississippi has now managed to create an income tax that is flat, fair and falling!** Great job to all who voted to make it happen!

**__Imagine what y’all might be able to do for school choice in 2026?__**

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5cdd409c26&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=ee0c5fb3a8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=ee0c5fb3a8).

body:
London’s Heathrow Airport, one of the world’s busiest, resumed limited flight activity Friday [after a fire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPozAQBeBfYzojMxhCCheJTnS54q7YEjnMOHjXeJBxYuXfr9h-q1c86enp-7hNN-uDj4-_diWTHU-goJOqlQATWh_ek67QOCKgtiLTnDT0emiavlqMG_SZ8I59CzCDngeNJ-Vsd0Z9t6BU5c2xplqABjrdqfpsGw0aEe3g3ACD0IrQZ071J_uYF3LhzS9K9cxrFcyS87aL9iJgFDCWUup1j0cnYKQon7uAMVI5onAKKGAMHJHjLheyeUlcpPVp45TlHHgnlPgkmVluXChJfmb7IOkSrzKSTfe3dD6RgNEmebk01_DvaxDtyLNH0f65Hk5U9v-UtioZ3IoPwe_9SWj1WK0PP7fzb4wvA98BAAD__-Yjdqw) at a nearby electrical substation knocked out power, canceled flights, and stranded at least 200,000 travelers.

## Heathrow to Resume Flights after Fire
London’s Heathrow Airport, one of the world’s busiest, resumed limited flight activity Friday [after a fire](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPozAQBeBfYzojMxhCCheJTnS54q7YEjnMOHjXeJBxYuXfr9h-q1c86enp-7hNN-uDj4-_diWTHU-goJOqlQATWh_ek67QOCKgtiLTnDT0emiavlqMG_SZ8I59CzCDngeNJ-Vsd0Z9t6BU5c2xplqABjrdqfpsGw0aEe3g3ACD0IrQZ071J_uYF3LhzS9K9cxrFcyS87aL9iJgFDCWUup1j0cnYKQon7uAMVI5onAKKGAMHJHjLheyeUlcpPVp45TlHHgnlPgkmVluXChJfmb7IOkSrzKSTfe3dD6RgNEmebk01_DvaxDtyLNH0f65Hk5U9v-UtioZ3IoPwe_9SWj1WK0PP7fzb4wvA98BAAD__-Yjdqw) at a nearby electrical substation knocked out power, canceled flights, and stranded at least 200,000 travelers. Local residents reported hearing [a large explosion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGngc3IHGcHBg9d2NK1I3Lsc7jWYGTcWHn7Ktm7__R90v_rulwtR97vn3YjU0JaQIISchAAi7ccnwu23gQioKEl018QNI59r9vVKJjCDbVHi86Hm7O6H4IaaLpQ0F7pls1rTQ4APShUsptsj4DeezuGMMLYoCTPJeXuO_FeVgrxmR6UO5e2Npq1lONsho8G5gbmWmu3Uz0r0c8LNDCvZMuaUxWW85FyEYEzCZd-90K5UM4p87mJI0V2JJyNkbzI9KYgcUQ1tdn4o3KMfOpLg_K-WY7v__Jfj4eBvwAAAP__AXdk4Q) before the fire—which took seven hours to bring under control—knocked out power to the airport. More than 1,300 flights were affected, and officials stated it would take days to reschedule. Police say there is [no indication of terrorism](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQRL_GdD7Zi_FxhYs0dJc2JdrD68OJwWjtHOHvI9KnG2k0T6P3cR_vGFNcn--4kKshj6Cgk6qVAKPHmI7RNN4FIqC2IaevBqzptbbN7DqicDVtsBYmCFNnCb25Pby2-LhN1jbRnTTVAmjoTKcuN9QGjPce-xB66IVR5GPNfPnMca0zhXTkF_FlykuT3FzrVkT7JmAQMKzHlks9KwHDCRYwqPbMWsCwZ05errQXAcNMWGfOu8TIW-YqQ2SSD0IucsaUFuSvInOQ_F1KREk_G3E9lw07v-0xpVjsVRj1XDCmvzv1Pz0vB78BAAD__5mpZ7M) or foul play, but a British counterterrorism team is leading the investigation and keeping an "open mind." An airport spokesperson described the incident as [unprecedented](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OhCAUxfGngW4MXD7EgmIbu9l2S8PIRe8GxSjRzNtv3H66k5zkl_x_nsMzUKZ1-g4L-prKAALMQ6gHwBAD5fegefQJEVBx9LLVYLWT0vLZgzLRKtO11trYJYvYqRCkkNIlkE5w8rcmFIAEo41ouiA16BhjcCk5cEwLjFTL3vwWWuuMKb_LiXszloVnP9e6HUx9MegZ9Nd1Na_XeH8M-hWvg0Ef9kpjxnuO52TipDfIovDdx-2inOmwLdNiWgLlf7V-qjw9_AUAAP__qRdSog) but said the airport expected to return to "100% operation" today.
## 68 of the Nation's Bridges at Risk
Federal officials investigating the collapse of [the Francis Scott Key Bridge](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAAg5-GbERgIJCB4V_Y-q83RrSQlisNUeAa5e1P6X6TPVifLX9dpotPOS33__4VbZvLBAZFmaDAFHzKxyS7YOcYEUUXLdcSgzScD93DKhitbxpXz7WRUnHIMF7HUYhBGa5il-xJYwLgUFKxfvRcQoYQvJlnA0MkiyG1svXfJS3tEed8lHfc-lt5ddk-WlsrEf8IHIHb973_qb6V4I8zQOBqK9tB4Ja411N8S2UhcGctgWPi4wncdUvhHiv1jW6pPmmZ6a3k7Nca6TOeCANlwMTAmCZw3WbDuqecUx00kez-8il_VrW_Xnpb_AYAAP__L6dlFg) in Baltimore, Maryland, last year issued a warning this week, stating that 68 bridges nationwide could be at similar risk. The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) report identified 68 bridges in 19 states with critical infrastructure issues, [including the heavily trafficked](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMd1G9mIIKVz8jbv87ZVog9fgi7ERdhLx9ieuv26kkT6N5us-3inEkOb_tLKpPo8osQPZAuLoKMRj1I0znhm5bdioq8ZeD0r1zWLYEQ5S8aSvpHzfqU4yaSXJOxzUrW-COTXZIirsdCcvN1IatXOOBu8HHISW7ELN--U7h1QX9vHIb94vU16baJZatyLafwKtQJuOLZd6VgLtCQu0sj2zEmhfBRJ_ikA7fx5Aa04zPPbgZi4QEqQD6kIV1lep8GCYFp6e7MDnHfZQnpA9TDlG2goLtM1u3PYJMYbSX4WW80oh_q6qf730NvgTAAD__3ZUaHo) Brooklyn, Manhattan, Williamsburg, and George Washington Bridges in New York. The NTSB found the Francis Scott Key Bridge was "[almost 30 times above](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQAL8GOp_sxWBTuHjNdffalGgPr2GjBSPjXMTfR5c-9Uij0Xw8pgey8L78x41CTXkCDb3SnQKYIrJck21jSERAXUvBOAuD9cYM7RpgHvpkhtFjJOyci844h9bGYZxH47Hl8LbpDsBAb3t9G9FYsDFG9Cl58I3VFLnmcvvMvNeVklz5ReU2562VsNZ6nE33r4F7A_eD8iH0Rg3cnyiVt1xIPQvHhdScRfA4SeWUeGaUU50rFlK8v-ikygtWzrv6OiJWUjthkUvlndRFWJRgpaKMcVqD8W0J8fhmET4H11i9bMjyG1X_mvQK8BMAAP__9P5rYA) the acceptable risk threshold for critical bridges" and suggested a vulnerability assessment might have reduced the risk of collapse. Maryland lawmakers [reacted strongly](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFuhDAQAF9jOiOzGAyFizR0lzYlWuw1ODEYmdWh-3106VOPNBrN12N-YEzxWD9xJ8shz6Cgk6qVALPHmF6zrrwNREBtRbYxGno9NE1fbVaNCgcIwSyL74zvu9YPTnujmzEgOFVF-7apFqCBTneqHrHRoL33OIQwwCC0Ih85l_o7x4M3CumVn1Rql_cq2Y35vET7IWASMN33Xd8LJn6-sYAJC0eXSMD0Qy-5lOhXki6nhOdF8uBrkZdD3uKxykJnLix3zygLoeOYDwFTr6HTozFVsf68Y0rx6o3Qat0xpr8K_u_K08JvAAAA__-ELWUz) to the report, with one calling it "absolutely disgusting" and another saying, "_I think the transportation authority really dropped the ball_."
## List: Completely Untrue Facts
A list of historical facts that are completely untrue [reveals 25 widely held](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAQQL8GOwwOyLIFxTV2e-2VhsigXEYxOLuef3_Z669_eXl5X4_xETLlbf4MK3pOZQQFvVRaAowxZLpG00SfEAF1g767GbDGdZ1tFp9cryNOqI2OVpuYnHY6Kqu0cpO62yb7t01pgA5606v2HjoDJsYYXEoOnDAKY-ZS2--SN14w0VVeWNuprA35hXk_hP4QMAgYzvNsqbwQf3YqNW_zmxIwzIEI60X5YAGDVn1vQcAAvVzywaVeMoWJD8lLYBkqyqmsOyEjXfK5cX1iU33cz0yUD3sTRs1ryPTXwP89eXn4DQAA__8tDWR1) misconceptions, ranging from presidential trivia to falsehoods about the Roman Empire to the true height of Napoleon. One myth claims President John F. Kennedy said "[I am a jelly donut](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQANCvgS0WHBeMB4ZKlVtVSteO1iUcMRUOEcaJ_PdVu_cHnvS-TtOJUk636yct7FssEyg4HpQ5AEyBUt4nlMFHZmAj2esewaLT2srZ8yUaZLDKGLD9QEzsogNgPuMQIsrkfzVlADQc8ai6gTQChhDIxejACVQcUiu1-y7p1maOeS8Prt2lLDL7ubX7KsyLgFHAuJetbd2ZBYzwTsPbxzNvqxNmjExtqyzM6zpT5SCrD_dnyjmttheorgul_Ee2_4oPDz8BAAD__3anUq4)" when he spoke the German words "Ich bin ein Berliner" in a 1963 address in Germany, though the word 'Berliner'—the donut—wasn’t commonly used in Germany at the time. The belief that Napoleon was unusually diminutive originated from [British propaganda](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vgzAQQH-N2YzswyHO4KELW7p2RFd_xJcajMwpiH9fpXv3p_ek93Wf70iF1scnLtFxqjMouEg1SIA5IJVzNl1wKUaIQxedvhoYjdV67LLzSts0xmAg2ITW4LdS12T9DVAPyfuO3NumBgANF3NR_Q21ARNCQJuSBSuMioG4tv5ZaeUcUznrK7be16UrLjNvuxg-BEwCpuM4-kw713Zm4jciYMr1kIGCfOISd_mgUhqeEpnR_8gVt1piXSXuknOUhZhLlL62rTYsAqauubAdVArt41UY9ViQyl-d_7vxcvAbAAD__wsTZDM), which portrayed him as short, belligerent, and ridiculous. In reality, Napoleon was about 5 feet 7 inches tall, slightly above average height for his time. Despite his accomplishments, Albert Einstein has been wrongly portrayed as a poor math student. In reality, he had mastered differential and integral calculus by the age of 15. [See the full list of misconceptions here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAQQL8GOwwOyLIFxTV2e-2VhsigXEYxOLuef3_Z669_eXl5X4_xETLlbf4MK3pOZQQFvVRaAowxZLpG00SfEAF1g767GbDGdZ1tFp9cryNOqI2OVpuYnHY6Kqu0cpO62yb7t01pgA5606v2HjoDJsYYXEoOnDAKY-ZS2--SN14w0VVeWNuprA35hXk_hP4QMAgYzvNsqbwQf3YqNW_zmxIwzIEI60X5YAGDVn1vQcAAvVzywaVeMoWJD8lLYBkqyqmsOyEjXfK5cX1iU33cz0yUD3sTRs1ryPTXwP89eXn4DQAA__8tDWR1).

If you’re an Amazon Prime subscriber, be sure to check out today’s sponsor, , to take advantage of special deals with Prime you may not be aware of. | Heathrow to Resume Flights after Fire London’s Heathrow Airport, one of the world’s busiest, resumed limited flight activity Friday at a nearby electrical substation knocked out power, canceled flights, and stranded at least 200,000 travelers. Local residents reported hearing before the fire—which took seven hours to bring under control—knocked out power to the airport. More than 1,300 flights were affected, and officials stated it would take days to reschedule. Police say there is or foul play, but a British counterterrorism team is leading the investigation and keeping an "open mind." An airport spokesperson described the incident as but said the airport expected to return to "100% operation" today. 68 of the Nation's Bridges at Risk Federal officials investigating the collapse of in Baltimore, Maryland, last year issued a warning this week, stating that 68 bridges nationwide could be at similar risk. The National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) report identified 68 bridges in 19 states with critical infrastructure issues, Brooklyn, Manhattan, Williamsburg, and George Washington Bridges in New York. The NTSB found the Francis Scott Key Bridge was " the acceptable risk threshold for critical bridges" and suggested a vulnerability assessment might have reduced the risk of collapse. Maryland lawmakers to the report, with one calling it "absolutely disgusting" and another saying, "I think the transportation authority really dropped the ball." List: Completely Untrue Facts A list of historical facts that are completely untrue misconceptions, ranging from presidential trivia to falsehoods about the Roman Empire to the true height of Napoleon. One myth claims President John F. Kennedy said "" when he spoke the German words "Ich bin ein Berliner" in a 1963 address in Germany, though the word 'Berliner'—the donut—wasn’t commonly used in Germany at the time. The belief that Napoleon was unusually diminutive originated from , which portrayed him as short, belligerent, and ridiculous. In reality, Napoleon was about 5 feet 7 inches tall, slightly above average height for his time. Despite his accomplishments, Albert Einstein has been wrongly portrayed as a poor math student. In reality, he had mastered differential and integral calculus by the age of 15. . | ➤ Former President Biden has met with DNC officials, signaling his willingness to rejoin the campaign trail or raise funds to help the party recover lost ground since November’s election.
