name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Most Christians don’t realize this…
body:
Support Christian Legal Defense| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2b498d2a56f4fe7b25bf162297f539c&_e=kVpxWbxv9CqBSpF3jI12vjy1lDTYzPdVgHrejYPBbdpJ7G7aiZ5SKsJBgE_ov8vkRhDQG74V5M0L7DWGoPXdxKL3DTjqWGnYQdiKMjfogty0wTixjKeoDf0OK-nK5z0uKVZoLmnxmd-idCEivQZNiPCS2Suo1I0xaW9LKfYKZqTs-xMDyNuGo2Q_fE7lfQXt7WtukRGnqe1CWwzsKUttqHkjoh1zaubBOOYGiXU9D8IXWhhVHmrq7Ig8DYNuVDcX7KST-Z70U1hQ1rAiez-1u0-EQgZNjBkljDDqqqdq5PtCIb8kvT8b4xlXJ4vx2RY3)
---
Peter, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **%FIRST%, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2b498d2a56f4fe7b25bf162297f539c&_e=kVpxWbxv9CqBSpF3jI12vjy1lDTYzPdVgHrejYPBbdpJ7G7aiZ5SKsJBgE_ov8vkRhDQG74V5M0L7DWGoPXdxKL3DTjqWGnYQdiKMjfogty0wTixjKeoDf0OK-nK5z0uKVZoLmnxmd-idCEivQZNiPCS2Suo1I0xaW9LKfYKZqS1wKmA9pzisDZ_wKoowd03FtrGM8-mDedoBZqad6K7XmxogN76X9YPvhVOcue_iSBciD_4Ub0kHTnAN2hcq8KhQ68DcF2sKkQvOVXSsSd_1---6rbzlnoQ_M2i15dgndjMUpBrFvfLx9AYXDZzySLb)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2b498d2a56f4fe7b25bf162297f539c&_e=kVpxWbxv9CqBSpF3jI12vjy1lDTYzPdVgHrejYPBbdpJ7G7aiZ5SKsJBgE_ov8vkRhDQG74V5M0L7DWGoPXdxKL3DTjqWGnYQdiKMjfogty0wTixjKeoDf0OK-nK5z0uKVZoLmnxmd-idCEivQZNiPCS2Suo1I0xaW9LKfYKZqTuath724bdv1-8LvvjySixMYyU1sI01RHoJv9DLzJYpwggrX6Rhg9FxxrZtT5x4502YKnEkknOocROYr2jK2H80SCAq_i0B4x7lQgu7l1UUfI63O9OsOp-ajC58Qo941ubt0Cl2GxtHhsGY3IY7X9F)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work****to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**%FIRST%, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2b498d2a56f4fe7b25bf162297f539c&_e=kVpxWbxv9CqBSpF3jI12vjy1lDTYzPdVgHrejYPBbdpJ7G7aiZ5SKsJBgE_ov8vkRhDQG74V5M0L7DWGoPXdxKL3DTjqWGnYQdiKMjfogty0wTixjKeoDf0OK-nK5z0uKVZoLmnxmd-idCEivQZNiPCS2Suo1I0xaW9LKfYKZqTaGjBnznIzhFPztALCY3GfS42GyWwixs93wrTL1N6pBcVTQ00xn7Fc_1ITN1OZ366nV6F_AUnbOvtcOnngr3YeSeRMHhxuDhFz0lvXI8mFAvt-NZmj9p7T2hMBMWRJkrsiVQIE69Vk-4YUn_OZ_oVT)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2b498d2a56f4fe7b25bf162297f539c&_e=kVpxWbxv9CqBSpF3jI12vjy1lDTYzPdVgHrejYPBbdpJ7G7aiZ5SKsJBgE_ov8vkRhDQG74V5M0L7DWGoPXdxKL3DTjqWGnYQdiKMjfogty0wTixjKeoDf0OK-nK5z0uKVZoLmnxmd-idCEivQZNiPCS2Suo1I0xaW9LKfYKZqTsAkcsGRY0qLbNqFEE9xt60qavxlgtAUQeRHgUjx8mpmuagtrqclQ1xTqSDN3nHrY3C7yhKrJ_SZEcKcZwoJjBBneXdV6GwCOA6QZ5kbttrxWGxOV8ZZDbT3x5FQ0Ua22eSU4G38S1qYQIJBslhG8r)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2b498d2a56f4fe7b25bf162297f539c&_e=kVpxWbxv9CqBSpF3jI12vjy1lDTYzPdVgHrejYPBbdpJ7G7aiZ5SKsJBgE_ov8vkRhDQG74V5M0L7DWGoPXdxKL3DTjqWGnYQdiKMjfogty0wTixjKeoDf0OK-nK5z0uKVZoLmnxmd-idCEivQZNiPCS2Suo1I0xaW9LKfYKZqSwUAeuxDd3yMRa9EBPGPlajj6M-72nwoMCXh9SrBk2DfqK8vLBWPVOk_rLjf6wC37NyFOzbr4XckCtAQfxDEf6Zhr71C_aYT18FsXHy6LojkOsn4KgXKulie-8y3G1fN0enrbHZlOp0xPfkIa3StgX)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c2b498d2a56f4fe7b25bf162297f539c&_e=kVpxWbxv9CqBSpF3jI12vjy1lDTYzPdVgHrejYPBbdpJ7G7aiZ5SKsJBgE_ov8vkRhDQG74V5M0L7DWGoPXdxKL3DTjqWGnYQdiKMjfogty0wTixjKeoDf0OK-nK5z0uKVZoLmnxmd-idCEivQZNiPCS2Suo1I0xaW9LKfYKZqSCsyZF332fthtDhww0DDpFo7qFYm6FXjJUzJhk9ZByw1KoXrY0u5LGs4ndPez8zUOQIs8QckhYjx-HY38xC8xmec0iM8b5c2XBlT3Xq7_KeGZsByr35SeRrhheCeY_uXXqsklSfTsxuRd8ULZFttP_)
---

McLean, VA 22106-7712

subject: Measles Cases Climbing, Wild Spring Weather, and Baylor Advances
body:
The number of confirmed measles cases continues to rise in the [West Texas outbreak](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L3K5CAUxvGrMZ1Bj_kwhcXCEraZbbcMJ3pMZEwc1Pm6-2Wmf-sHfjz8_12WC4YYzu0vHmTqy6cFBPRcKA6wOAzxvXSNM6twk2zIyLGDodNqVM1uer9OfhgsuUkoOSgraUUJetXKekuuCeaDCQUgodf92PZe-9H1JPVEmjrFOkEu1JTbulOlFxYf3-lBubXpaKLZa70Vpn4xmBnMuNqTnqXd0mdmMP8hjHVnMB-EJVLhFgsVHsN5JcfTva6Z8Mq_MM-EdudKTLzc8w1LCefGYC415TdTc3BM_ZYghJwGCU027vYMMYYyjKwT24Ehfk_VHys9DPwPAAD__43Kak0), now up to 309 in the state, according to a new report released Friday.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3WcYCBgaGLt3TtaOFwxKjYjuxTmrx9lXbO_H36Sf-v83hOtdX1-pkWivwo24iA9gT6hDjmVNtzNDLHCXJQkqJyBnvjtdNyjgomX8BhUMFCb9LFOZgmsk73KVgbZI0vDDSiQuut62zxxWVLygfyZLQwQLnytnc8E9MjHaU9tzvt3WVbZIsz803oD4GDwCHvdf1uy8qvUeAw_F8PTkxyj_n2U1urR--EgeuSavtD-G3VPeJvAAAA__8Sp06b) | |
# Saturday, March 22, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1894, a group of jobless men coming from Los Angeles arrived in El Paso en route to a march on Washington, D.C., only to have their train car uncoupled in a barren region east of El Paso, leaving them stranded without food and water. ([More](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO6yAQheGngc4WDIOBguI27nLbLS0chhiJmMhGcfz2K6ff6q_OJ52f23QLueT18T88ybdPqhMI0J1QHcAUQy7nhDz6WUQnOXlpEAa0yii-eNDRRWkw2cEI6e4DBCUQhUs4W5wdz_7ChAKQoK02vU42mahJWkeWUDEUFHOrW98WavQJeypnfdPW3-uTF7-09tqZ-sdgZDAex9G3fQl1LXmlvm4PBuN31cVwdvN5hcFIa9uuSjfwzcfXkUvJ-2AYiscz5PLF259v3x5-AwAA___QYFYW)) It's been a wild spring for weather in Texas. We hope things warm up, cool off, dry out, or get more moisture where you are, depending on what your area needs. There's more on our crazy weather in _Top Stories_ and the _Meme of the Week_ below. Today’s sponsor is our friends at [LMNT](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQxvGngS3WcYCBgaGLt3TtaOFwxKjYjuxTmrx9lXbO_H36Sf-v83hOtdX1-pkWivwo24iA9gT6hDjmVNtzNDLHCXJQkqJyBnvjtdNyjgomX8BhUMFCb9LFOZgmsk73KVgbZI0vDDSiQuut62zxxWVLygfyZLQwQLnytnc8E9MjHaU9tzvt3WVbZIsz803oD4GDwCHvdf1uy8qvUeAw_F8PTkxyj_n2U1urR--EgeuSavtD-G3VPeJvAAAA__8Sp06b), the best way to stay hydrated this spring.
* * *
Abilene ☀️ 85/66° | Amarillo 🌤️ 80/50° | Austin ☀️ 84/65° | Brownsville 🌥️ 80/70° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 78/68° | DFW ☀️ 81/66° | El Paso ☀️ 81/52° | Houston 🌥️ 77/67° | Laredo ☀️ 90/69° | Lubbock ☀️ 83/52° | Midland ☀️ 85/57° | San Antonio ☀️ 86/65° | Tyler ☀️ 80/65° | Waco ☀️ 80/62°
|
---
## Measles Outbreak Surpasses 300 Cases
The number of confirmed measles cases continues to rise in the [West Texas outbreak](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L3K5CAUxvGrMZ1Bj_kwhcXCEraZbbcMJ3pMZEwc1Pm6-2Wmf-sHfjz8_12WC4YYzu0vHmTqy6cFBPRcKA6wOAzxvXSNM6twk2zIyLGDodNqVM1uer9OfhgsuUkoOSgraUUJetXKekuuCeaDCQUgodf92PZe-9H1JPVEmjrFOkEu1JTbulOlFxYf3-lBubXpaKLZa70Vpn4xmBnMuNqTnqXd0mdmMP8hjHVnMB-EJVLhFgsVHsN5JcfTva6Z8Mq_MM-EdudKTLzc8w1LCefGYC415TdTc3BM_ZYghJwGCU027vYMMYYyjKwT24Ehfk_VHys9DPwPAAD__43Kak0), now up to 309 in the state, according to a new report released Friday. Cases in New Mexico bring the total to [351 confirmed cases](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOqzAQhp_GdEZmsLkULk5Dl9NuiQYYB0smIM8kJG-_SlbabutP_0Xf12W8YEzxdv2PG3l5hn0EA06bWgOMC8b0Gm2x-MksfVWQr1oLje3qti5WP0_OBnITVcE2MwUTXNNPrjKGXNvZqYj-XWZqgApc59rShS60i6Oq66kjWytraImy51JWEnoih_TaH5TLed-K5FeRg1X9T8GgYDjPs8x0F8r85gqG6c7xRswKhpUwyTpjJn2smDec6S5xxvSGGyEnYj0jE-scmXRtev1Z1CwopH_yeqEDs2x0E834Yv1ro1IwFNkvxxlTity0yprrhjF9rsqf7h4evgMAAP__ue9zGQ) from the outbreak, with 40 hospitalizations in Texas. As the political debate over vaccines swirls around the outbreak, the Texas parents whose child died of the disease last month have stated that they stand by their decision [not to vaccinate](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOhCAUheGnwQ6DFxCmoNjGbrbd0lzhOpKgGGF15u03M_3WJ_lO8v_cxzvGFLfHN67k6nPOIwjQXEgOMAaM6TWqJrhJhFvXkOuMgl5ZaWSzOCs9ekR7o4CgrSEN06RDLybTS21DE90bExKgA221afVsZxM0dfZGlpRkSlCINR9tXajSE8ucXvmko_V5bZJbat0Lk18MBgbDdV2tX468vVcGw0ZXYTDgUaNPxGD4CHwlLIkK9_l3T8T9ElPgJ3ofN-IgQCoBXbsve3O4sF8xpVh6w5R4rBjT57n-m-J08BcAAP__W0lhMg) their children. With Friday’s report, the number of measles cases in Texas from the outbreak now surpasses the total number of reported cases nationwide in 2024.
## Fire Threats and Cold Front to Precede Predicted Rain
Forecasts for Texas’ weekend weather indicate the stretch of hazardous conditions over the last several weeks may continue. With warmer weather and wind yesterday and today, [critical fire threats](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdEZmjTEpXFxDl2uvRIu9DtY5ITKrOPn7E_RXjfRGMyPNz3W-YsrpcfvGOzl-x20GBUYqLQHmgCl_5r4JblHh0jXkOtvD0I_a6mZ1SB4XNCp4wC4ORg9orNEAJqhglqVJ7ihTGqADMxrbmjhGGwx144VG6rXoFYXEW2l5JaY37jF_theV1m_3JruV-bkL_SVgEjDVWlu_7A-q--ELmM6IgOlAh2yFV3lCSZleyBSkL4mTxyxjKiR5LYQsK9EvPYKAqSkuPGvKOe2DFb263THlc57__ePl4C8AAP__3Z1kpQ) are likely in multiple areas across the state. After the warmth, a [cold front](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7uO6yAUheGnwZ0tvLkXFKdxl9NOaRHYBCRsLIzi5O1HST_1kr6l_-e23lwueX_8dxva_op1BQpipGwEWIPL5b3yIdg7DWYe0M6Kg-SaKTYkawzlUQXvjdSzYdpIzu-gIiqvpZvlkO0HowxgBqGFmkTUUQWBszaokTPCKYbca5t6wo4vd8byrk9sk6_bUGzq_TgJ-0dgIbBc1zX51Or-WQksO14ngcW1nn1BAstXGJPLZfS1hDG2uvcRKDAwQkxHOoZmw3HlUvIpFeH0sblcvmf9z_qnhd8AAAD__4ZgW1w) is expected to sweep through North Texas on Sunday, potentially bringing hail and severe storms along with it. Next week could finally bring [much-needed rain](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O6yAQxfGnwR0RHiAmBcVt3OW2W1oYhhgthghm8_H2q7jf_q_fkc7Xdbm6lFO5_Xc7WnrFuoAAzYXkAEtwKb8XNQS7inAZB7TjpOCsjJzksNlRCr9i9CAnYZTEqL1GJ1Y_xvWCGIZkP5iQACNoo6eTjiZOQeNoLmhQSaYEhkS1nWhDwpfrMb_rA9vJ133IdiO6dyb_MZgZzEfQqbbdb65j65-KwRxrQ-86MZibS4X7zRWPncdUXM5v3pB-WuFU-SHwgi_iT8RvBvPQbLg_U86pnyemxG13KR_r9OcdDwu_AQAA__8kHmVf) to Texas after a dry March.
## Texas Ranks Up among Most Innovative States
The state of Texas scored high on an annual report ranking the [most innovative states](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQgOGngc0WHGDwwNDFW7p2tHA4YiRsInNxkrev0r3zL33S_3OZLyGXvN--w4aeXqnOIMB0QnUAcwy5vGfNo19EHCVHL62GQTtlFV-9EkNACxoWPcTxqpNTFhClGQOAHSLP_oMJBSDBOGN7k1yy0aB0IzrUimmBMVM9elqR8BVaKu964tFf68aLX4nujakvBhOD6RlKQVofy6cymDA-GExbbdTlfa9noHxi1ygQNgaTkm4U_PDx_syl5DZYpsVtC7n86fTv7unhNwAA__9qMlbK) in the U.S. The rankings, based on research from WalletHub, consider 25 data points, ranging from the number of STEM professionals to research-and-development spending to tech-company density. Sitting at [No. 13](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFu8yAUBeCngQ0LLmDwwPAv2fKvHS0aLjESmCjcusnbV4nUsfM5-o50Ps7rOZZa9uv_2DDQI_cVJFghtQBYUyz1uRqewqdMi-IYlDMwG6-d5ltQxqGLVs0S86LS4mfvE9qLShkUesdLeGFSAyiw3rrJZp9dsqj8gh6NZkZiKtTvE21I-Igj12c_8D5deuM1bES3wfQ_BicGp61_Der7VPa9H5FK31u8vZoMTq0PEr_BgWJQJBzibQqYndJOLsZNG7XK7yHdvkutZcyOGXltsdT3Iv15wRHgJwAA__9J7l73), Texas climbed one spot higher than it was a year ago, continuing a trend of rising one spot a year since 2021.

clean_body: The number of confirmed measles cases continues to rise in the , now up to 309 in the state, according to a new report released Friday. | | | | | | Saturday, March 22, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1894, a group of jobless men coming from Los Angeles arrived in El Paso en route to a march on Washington, D.C., only to have their train car uncoupled in a barren region east of El Paso, leaving them stranded without food and water. () It's been a wild spring for weather in Texas. We hope things warm up, cool off, dry out, or get more moisture where you are, depending on what your area needs. There's more on our crazy weather in Top Stories and the Meme of the Week below. Today’s sponsor is our friends at , the best way to stay hydrated this spring. Abilene ☀️ 85/66° | Amarillo 🌤️ 80/50° | Austin ☀️ 84/65° | Brownsville 🌥️ 80/70° | Corpus Christi 🌥️ 78/68° | DFW ☀️ 81/66° | El Paso ☀️ 81/52° | Houston 🌥️ 77/67° | Laredo ☀️ 90/69° | Lubbock ☀️ 83/52° | Midland ☀️ 85/57° | San Antonio ☀️ 86/65° | Tyler ☀️ 80/65° | Waco ☀️ 80/62° | Measles Outbreak Surpasses 300 Cases The number of confirmed measles cases continues to rise in the , now up to 309 in the state, according to a new report released Friday. Cases in New Mexico bring the total to from the outbreak, with 40 hospitalizations in Texas. As the political debate over vaccines swirls around the outbreak, the Texas parents whose child died of the disease last month have stated that they stand by their decision their children. With Friday’s report, the number of measles cases in Texas from the outbreak now surpasses the total number of reported cases nationwide in 2024. Fire Threats and Cold Front to Precede Predicted Rain Forecasts for Texas’ weekend weather indicate the stretch of hazardous conditions over the last several weeks may continue. With warmer weather and wind yesterday and today, are likely in multiple areas across the state. After the warmth, a is expected to sweep through North Texas on Sunday, potentially bringing hail and severe storms along with it. Next week could finally bring to Texas after a dry March. Texas Ranks Up among Most Innovative States The state of Texas scored high on an annual report ranking the in the U.S. The rankings, based on research from WalletHub, consider 25 data points, ranging from the number of STEM professionals to research-and-development spending to tech-company density. Sitting at , Texas climbed one spot higher than it was a year ago, continuing a trend of rising one spot a year since 2021. | Flying together with our sponsor Refresh yourself this spring with hydration from! () ➤ Austin: The Texas Senate debated a bill this week that would require all registered voters to prove citizenship before casting a ballot, with voters who can’t verify citizenship restricted to voting in only federal elections, except for the presidential election. () ➤ Austin: The Texas State Auditor’s Office released a report Friday indicating that Attorney General Ken Paxton’s impeachment trial cost taxpayers $5.1 million, with more than 86% of costs coming from contracted services, such as attorneys. () ➤ Hillsboro: A judge denied the request on Thursday of a Hill County man who punched his attorney in the face during jury selection to move his trial to a different county. () ➤ Millsap: The superintendent of Millsap Independent School District, along with two former faculty members, has been arrested after video surfaced of alleged abuse of a disabled student. () ➤ Bastrop County: Meta has entered into a deal with renewable energy company RWE for a 200-megawatt solar project, powering operations and data centers for Facebook’s parent company and supporting 300 jobs at peak construction. The Voter Protection Project

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: I’d love to have your official endorsement, Peter
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104304379/534943526/1706257898?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmZlNWQ2Ni0xZTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tAMK7gal5tMUMtfgi4hT208hyRRmw_GoQf3ZrtWknpU=&emci=1bc7f276-ad06-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2fe5d66-1e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)
Peter, I have a special request today: [**Will you add your name to become an official endorser of my campaign for Congress? We're hoping to build a broad coalition of union members, health care workers, small business owners, farmers, anyone who knows what it is to work, and more behind our campaign. I'd love to have your name on our list!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104304380/534943527/1137478713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmZlNWQ2Ni0xZTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tAMK7gal5tMUMtfgi4hT208hyRRmw_GoQf3ZrtWknpU=&emci=1bc7f276-ad06-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2fe5d66-1e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223) | **[Endorse Rebecca](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104304381/534943529/1137478713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmZlNWQ2Ni0xZTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tAMK7gal5tMUMtfgi4hT208hyRRmw_GoQf3ZrtWknpU=&emci=1bc7f276-ad06-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2fe5d66-1e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)**
---
When I first launched this campaign and centered it on the working people WI-03, we were met with some skepticism from Democratic insiders and the establishment.
**But organizations don’t win elections -- people do. And we built this movement by reaching people like you, Peter.**
I’ve always believed in people first, and that means operating a little differently than politics as usual. It means staying true to our values of not taking any voter for granted. That's how we've been doing things for generations in Wisconsin, and it's what you deserve.
**In that spirit, I’d love your support too:**
[**Will you please add your name to say you personally endorse my campaign for Congress? We're hoping to lock in 2,000 grassroots endorsers to kick off our campaign with strength.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104304382/534943530/1137478713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmZlNWQ2Ni0xZTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tAMK7gal5tMUMtfgi4hT208hyRRmw_GoQf3ZrtWknpU=&emci=1bc7f276-ad06-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2fe5d66-1e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)
**[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104304383/534943531/1137478713?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMmZlNWQ2Ni0xZTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tAMK7gal5tMUMtfgi4hT208hyRRmw_GoQf3ZrtWknpU=&emci=1bc7f276-ad06-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c2fe5d66-1e07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=5944223)**

Always grateful for you,
Rebecca

clean_body: | Peter, I have a special request today: | When I first launched this campaign and centered it on the working people WI-03, we were met with some skepticism from Democratic insiders and the establishment. But organizations don’t win elections -- people do. And we built this movement by reaching people like you, Peter. I’ve always believed in people first, and that means operating a little differently than politics as usual. It means staying true to our values of not taking any voter for granted. That's how we've been doing things for generations in Wisconsin, and it's what you deserve. In that spirit, I’d love your support too: Always grateful for you, Rebecca | = = Rebecca Cooke is a small business and nonprofit leader who has focused her career on building community and serving others. I was barred from accepting _any_ campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was **RAKING IN** hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - _a Soros-backed group gave Spanberger $500K all in one shot, Peter!_

As a Christian woman, I wouldn't lie to you. So, believe me when I tell you this is a _**BAD**_ situation! _The fact is, Spanberger has bottomless dark money to pull from._She can run to Soros, the Clintons, and every liberal in Hollywood to fill her campaign coffers!__

**This is a _BAD_ situation that will only get worse if folks like you don't step up to the plate! clean_body: We can’t stand by and let Trump impose his toxic will on the people of Minnesota. | | | = Peter, Here’s the bottom line: We can’t stand by and let Donald Trump impose his toxic will on the people of Minnesota. Trump and his cronies are working to undermine our fundamental rights and freedoms, fill the federal government with MAGA loyalists, make giant corporations richer and more powerful than ever before, and consolidate power for themselves. It’s up to us to push back and ensure Minnesota continues to move forward, no matter what obstacles Trump and his MAGA Republican allies put in our way. From reaching out to voters in every corner of the state to executing paid and earned media strategies to support our DFL leaders to making advancements in data and technology and so much more, our Minnesota DFL Party is on the front lines of this fight. Our entire team is working hard every single day. But we can’t do it alone, Peter. To protect Minnesotans’ rights, freedoms, and way of life, we need support from DFLers like you. name: Rebecca Weber
subject: Strip left-wing propagandists of our hard-earned tax dollars
body:
Speak up NOW| |
---
| | It's time to DEFUND the Corporation for Public Broadcasting.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=35320f7e39b1495282a091d37bf7c3ff&_e=4dUITuB0eYwDXBktjKVQm9P1vCl28dBNfP9nkQIzZs2WBNBjVNFk9cvQTBWkvhkpBumhGfNzxrzVFPA0-u5poJWfrqhTw0L3WI7E055uGY4HB_A96vt0dpiF6AKlBaBTknMAC2Iz0muITRFMKN1qQBez5RnM-0DrIzYTBvd4uJdDwbGj2lySeQ6I-R4Sbo51qdsuI9HRzYJzr36l_TY6ATCwTxl6rOUkkXF6z9GdnxprgsyqqlaQl_MBNDhx0U2jOrxPrwOidzNDTgyu73jEQabsfkONYeCQXfSzkwvOCqISTgtTUWaBNYJxocwHcPOjM8dhPUoKwbAHN4uJXDYsEkehGL9nmQBLk8EAq0qn9F4%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Imagine for a moment that your tax dollars were being used to fund media programming as biased and left-wing as _MSNBC_ or _The New York Times_ ... ...and that they were _promoting radical left-wing ideology_ ...or _covering for the crimes_ of liberal Democrats...or _peddling absurd smear campaigns_ against conservatives...or even _pushing Chinese communist propaganda_ on American citizens...You don’t have to imagine – **because that’s exactly what’s happening.** Your hard-earned tax dollars are **bankrolling the Corporation for Public Broadcasting (CPB)** – funding _PBS_ , _NPR_ , and countless TV and radio stations **that exist to push the Left’s agenda.** **[And today, I’m asking you to support the effort to defund the CPB by signing your _DEFUND THE CPB petition to Congress_.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=35320f7e39b1495282a091d37bf7c3ff&_e=4dUITuB0eYwDXBktjKVQm9P1vCl28dBNfP9nkQIzZs2WBNBjVNFk9cvQTBWkvhkpBumhGfNzxrzVFPA0-u5poJWfrqhTw0L3WI7E055uGY4HB_A96vt0dpiF6AKlBaBTknMAC2Iz0muITRFMKN1qQBez5RnM-0DrIzYTBvd4uJdDwbGj2lySeQ6I-R4Sbo51htTNe4Vc3MKIY4cXAbXC4zA4t_eD7ll4SZHmuxYuHghkaSu6qDMdg_KGFdRNKueMeqG5Eo_cPr6neYYsM_BWrLW7RcfIj3NzY3jpVvhfOYCTc37spcPF21SJ5pvNP1zLcVbupW5VK8l_wfjVns6Yl5eDD-6NWMEIXrxdbMf333k%3D)**Because just look at what you and I have been funding:
---
* **NPR admitted to burying the Hunter Biden laptop story to shield Joe Biden.**
* **NPR pushed the debunked Trump-Russia collusion hoax for years.**
* **The CPB worked with a Chinese media outlet to air a documentary promoting Chinese propaganda.**
* **PBS Kids peddles woke ideology in their children’s programming.**
* **PBS and NPR smeared Elon Musk, twisting a simple gesture into a ‘Nazi salute.’**

---
And that’s just the tip of the iceberg.**Why are we being forced to bankroll leftist propaganda?** **We won’t put up with it –**[**Click this link to sign****your _DEFUND THE CPB petition to Congress_ right away!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=35320f7e39b1495282a091d37bf7c3ff&_e=4dUITuB0eYwDXBktjKVQm9P1vCl28dBNfP9nkQIzZs2WBNBjVNFk9cvQTBWkvhkpBumhGfNzxrzVFPA0-u5poJWfrqhTw0L3WI7E055uGY4HB_A96vt0dpiF6AKlBaBTknMAC2Iz0muITRFMKN1qQBez5RnM-0DrIzYTBvd4uJdDwbGj2lySeQ6I-R4Sbo51-NLUjaGfFw29GLexsCtOGgMA65Leb4mCn0TcO90ypnxRXK_UHJuoiFBZUc9salt6cjEPfruubMO1k6ERDUOJ0SUgTv8oKF9oCqLky9c9kfgw_MabZat-5mIZbDIJktHl_3s9MjkX6sin0Ay-Brkqlu6ZlRAxugUT7yAYOKVhMoE%3D)
---
[ **Sign the Petition**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=35320f7e39b1495282a091d37bf7c3ff&_e=4dUITuB0eYwDXBktjKVQm9P1vCl28dBNfP9nkQIzZs2WBNBjVNFk9cvQTBWkvhkpBumhGfNzxrzVFPA0-u5poJWfrqhTw0L3WI7E055uGY4HB_A96vt0dpiF6AKlBaBTknMAC2Iz0muITRFMKN1qQBez5RnM-0DrIzYTBvd4uJdDwbGj2lySeQ6I-R4Sbo51qgAx0tU8cETjy04JjZtD0zodbITeohLKaiC6mVbcRgIpXzaZ5s9Z6nvsve_rW48sHWpwguOtk9zaA9dQuMzbPkEYQDqCi9X7P4gbxIfdaDMwh1ZoBGjBNLobjSqjpabpk6oWyaiRou6QXejJxzMycd8dIy8rQ_H_8ZaVBQAVPoE%3D)

Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors. **We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.** And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.**Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens.** **And we have got to move quickly to support this fight because right now, conservatives in Congress are fighting to put an end to this blatant misuse of taxpayer dollars.** House Republicans have already introduced legislation to **strip federal funding from CPB** , recognizing that Americans shouldn’t be forced to bankroll a media network that actively works against them. But the Left is fighting tooth and nail to protect their propaganda machine.Democrats and their media allies are calling any attempt to defund CPB an "attack on journalism" – as if pushing radical leftist narratives at taxpayer expense is real journalism. That’s why it’s critical that grassroots patriots like you speak up NOW. Congress needs to hear loud and clear that Americans are DONE paying to promote radical liberal ideology. **[So today, please sign your DEFUND THE CPB petition to Congress, to show Washington and the corrupt media that We the People will not let our tax dollars be used to promote left-wing propaganda.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=35320f7e39b1495282a091d37bf7c3ff&_e=4dUITuB0eYwDXBktjKVQm9P1vCl28dBNfP9nkQIzZs2WBNBjVNFk9cvQTBWkvhkpBumhGfNzxrzVFPA0-u5poJWfrqhTw0L3WI7E055uGY4HB_A96vt0dpiF6AKlBaBTknMAC2Iz0muITRFMKN1qQBez5RnM-0DrIzYTBvd4uJdDwbGj2lySeQ6I-R4Sbo51qd9cSJMX7Y2zyZNI8_jH3bcyAJJ1-XArhJTzEPvBBPQxtvFO6KfSfZZLLZNmRVSa24qoBMEDG3HnNK1PCfZnp2-zof39lKTEykxZpBUll2sN2C8gHeVcxw4ZunPYY6jWqGqmI8OPqgvbS4aCosfqJPmijvSdV7ts7MN3gWWuuU0%3D)** And when you’ve signed, please help us expand this fight with a generous donation to AMAC Action. No organization in America is doing more to advocate for your values as a conservative senior than AMAC Action.But unlike the CPB, we don’t receive a cent in public funding or big-money left-wing donations. That’s important because it means we can never be bought by special interests. Instead, we rely on the grassroots funding of patriots like you – and it’s from you that we take our marching orders.**[**So please, sign your _DEFUND THE CPB petition to Congress_ , and make your generous renewal donation right away.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=35320f7e39b1495282a091d37bf7c3ff&_e=4dUITuB0eYwDXBktjKVQm9P1vCl28dBNfP9nkQIzZs2WBNBjVNFk9cvQTBWkvhkpBumhGfNzxrzVFPA0-u5poJWfrqhTw0L3WI7E055uGY4HB_A96vt0dpiF6AKlBaBTknMAC2Iz0muITRFMKN1qQBez5RnM-0DrIzYTBvd4uJdDwbGj2lySeQ6I-R4Sbo515rc4WLqZt5xTFR0YFgP8YjSbr3a5tKQ6RjzpsiN4JhhPgOgCEvHCV869V9R6vOYJH7ZTYjYgia_xJxKGM5-Ewn7fgfn7UeeDLmk3RXbkFeFRwuyKlkQaWalzNGvyRp6b7jthvAdn8VuzIF0n3JcGQSdssVr767rZvKdLhaLR9fU%3D)**Together we can strip the left-wing propagandists of our hard-earned tax dollars and stop the spread of liberal lies on the public dime.Thank you for standing with us, friend.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

subject: "Oopsie…too late"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We are approaching a constitutional crisis.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104309821/534958539/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250320courts_N_TB_90DO_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTZjNjJiZi0yMTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9erOI0oRklSns9CVY9Ulc7nwPd0xs772ycxD61M6sPo=) Peter,

As the Trump Administration stands on the edge of openly defying court orders, we fear that we are approaching a constitutional crisis.

In retaliation for the court order against his deportations, Trump called for the impeachment of the federal judge, drawing a stark rebuke from GOP-appointed Supreme Court Justice John Roberts.

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Only We The People Vote
body:
Citizenship Matters

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=852bce30fa)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | “The right to vote is the crown jewel of American liberties, and we will not see its luster diminished.”
— Ronald Reagan, 40th President of the United States
---
|
---
| **Only ‘We The People’ Vote** _**Citizenship Matters**_
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=5763429eb5&e=8763c56857)
---
| _**By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**_
**The Ballot Box: For Citizens Only, Please**
In the grand theater of democracy, the right to vote is the star of the show—a privilege earned by those who pledge allegiance to the nation. Yet, a curious subplot has emerged: the push to extend voting rights to non-citizens. While inclusivity is a noble goal, allowing non-citizens to vote threatens the very foundation of our sovereignty and diminishes the value of citizenship.
**A Brief Tour of Non-Citizen Voting Initiatives**
Let’s embark on a journey across the United States, where various locales have flirted with the idea of non-citizen voting:
• **New York City: In 2021,** the city council passed a law permitting over 800,000 legal non-citizens to vote in municipal elections. However, this law was struck down by the state’s Court of Appeals in 2025, which ruled it unconstitutional, emphasizing that voting is a right reserved for citizens.
• **Washington, D.C.** : Our nation’s capital allows non-citizens, including undocumented immigrants, to vote in local elections. This means foreign nationals can influence policies in the very heart of our country—a scenario that should make any patriot’s eyebrows rise.
• **San Francisco, California:** The city permits non-citizens, specifically parents or guardians of school-aged children, to vote in school board elections. While education is vital, allowing non-citizens to vote on public matters sets a concerning precedent.
• **Maryland and Vermont:** Several municipalities in these states have opened local election voting to non-citizens, further muddying the waters of electoral integrity.
**Connecticut’s Foray into Non-Citizen Voting**
Closer to home, Connecticut has seen proposals to amend its constitution to allow non-citizens to vote in state and municipal elections. State Representative Juan Candelaria introduced such a bill in 2023 and 2024, aiming to grant voting rights to the estimated**240,000 immigrants in the state** , half of whom are undocumented. While the bill was unlikely to pass, it sparked a debate on the essence of citizenship and voting rights.
**The Slippery Slope to Sovereignty Erosion**
Allowing non-citizens to vote is akin to handing over the keys of your house to a neighbor—no matter how friendly—without expecting them to respect your rules. Voting is not just a civic duty; it’s a cornerstone of self-determination. When non-citizens influence local policies, it dilutes the voice of actual citizens and undermines the concept of a government**“by the people, for the people.”**
**The Call to Action**
Fellow citizens, it’s time to stand firm. The right to vote is a privilege that comes with citizenship—a bond that ties us to our nation’s destiny. Let’s ensure that this sacred privelige remains exclusive to those who have committed themselves to the United States. Engage in local discussions, reach out to your representatives, and advocate for policies that uphold the sanctity of citizenship. Together, we can safeguard our democracy and ensure a bright future for all Americans.
Remember, in the grand play of democracy, only citizens should have a speaking role at the ballot box.
Let’s keep it that way.

---
|
---

That’s the amount we’re asking you to split between the DNC and the Wisconsin Democratic Party ahead of the state’s April 1 Supreme Court election. $10 because the winner of this race will be the deciding vote on the state’s highest court. $10 because Elon Musk is pouring millions of dollars into the state — all with the goal of creating a MAGA Supreme Court that will rubber-stamp the Trump-Musk agenda. $10 because the stakes couldn’t be higher and Democrats need the resources to reach undecided voters in the final days before Election Day. Thousands of people have already chipped in to help ensure Democrats have the resources they’ll need in Wisconsin for this election and those to come. Now they’re hoping you’ll join them. name: Gay Valimont
subject: What voters are telling me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| Friends, something special is happening in Northwest Florida. As we knock doors, make calls, and talk to voters every single day, we’re hearing something over and over again – people who have never voted for a Democrat in their lives are considering it for the first time. They’re fed up with MAGA chaos. They’ve watched Matt Gaetz turn this district into a national embarrassment and now see Jimmy Patronis as more of the same – a politician who cares more about Trump than the people he’s supposed to represent. Voters are ready for change. But it’s up to us to make sure they show up. Turning out first-time Democratic voters takes real resources. These are people who don’t always vote in every election, and that means we need to reach them multiple times before April 1st. We’re in the final stretch of this campaign, and every dollar we raise in these last two weeks goes directly into voter turnout efforts. [**Can you rush a donation now -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us keep knocking doors, making calls, and flipping voters who never thought they’d support a Democrat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104311196/534962170/-26059812?refcode=250322_MFC_Gay_WhatVotersAreTellingMe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI1NDAyMy0yMzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tF8otqzxckYEz9ofuce8GhBBmKsOkfaP4gEAT2qwwC0=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104311197/534962171/1131448904?refcode=250322_MFC_Gay_WhatVotersAreTellingMe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjI1NDAyMy0yMzA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tF8otqzxckYEz9ofuce8GhBBmKsOkfaP4gEAT2qwwC0=) If we reach these voters, we can win. ## Kane Pushes for Bout With ‘Happy Hands’ Walz, Says Linda McMahon Was Tougher, Cheers Trump 2.0 – RedState
Minnesota Governor Tim Walz claimed he could take Trump supporters in a “WWE type” match, and Knox County Mayor Glenn Jacobs immediately issued a challenge. Jacobs, well known for his career as WWE legend Kane, talked to RedState about a possible charity match. * * *
Peter,
We’re only a few months in, and Donald Trump is already running the country like one of his failed businesses — chaotic, reckless, and driven first and foremost by his fragile ego. So far, he’s:
🚨 **Given his billionaire bestie Elon Musk unchecked access** to the federal government, including Social Security and education databases
🚨 **Announced a $900 BILLION** cut to Medicaid, gutting health care for millions
🚨 **Effectively shut down USAID,** leaving global humanitarian programs in crisis
🚨 **Issued executive orders attacking** climate policy, federal workers, and public education
🚨 **Floated the idea of running for a THIRD term**
Trump might think he’s killing it (“it” meaning “the federal government”), but let’s be real — even Republicans are furious about Trump’s bulldozing and spending cuts.

name: Rebecca Cooke
subject: A blueprint for Democrats everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Derrick Van Orden. | **Peter, I just announced my campaign for Congress in Wisconsin's 3rd District.**

I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Derrick Van Orden. But first, we set an ambitious goal of reaching 2,026 Founding Donors to start this campaign with strength.

[_**Can you split a donation of $5 with Fight for Progress PAC today? Every contribution can be the difference in our fight to reclaim rural districts and retake the House.**_](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=wnbgbKrvNvIb&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-21_1&amount=25)
---
| [ DONATE ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=CJHFZNm58dix&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-21_1&amount=25)
---
So, why am I running again?

Because working class Wisconsinites deserve a voice in Congress -- someone who knows what it’s like to work for a living. And we’ve proven we can make real inroads when we show up, listen, and focus on issues that matter: good jobs, affordable health care, and lowering costs for working families.

In an election year that saw many voters frustrated with the national Democratic Party, we still outperformed the US Senator Tammy Baldwin by 5,000 votes in this district. We even out-paced Kamala Harris by 9,000 votes.
[](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=Sp8MrjguzQzH&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-21_1&amount=25)
**Peter, we won more votes than any Democrat in WI-03 in nearly a decade.**

It’s clear we’re on to something, but winning back rural, working-class voters takes time. And the tough truth is that Democrats lost these voters' trust over years of neglect. It won’t be rebuilt overnight, but we know progress is possible if we show up and keep fighting.

**I’m running because our work _has_ to continue.**

We’re on month three of complete far right control in Washington, and folks are learning in real time that taking a buzz saw to the government won’t lower the price of eggs, or the cost of gas in your car.

These are the voters we need to win over, we won't take any voter for granted or write anyone off who is starting from a different viewpoint. That's how we've done things for generations in Wisconsin, and that’s why we’ll finish the job and unseat Derrick Van Orden this time around.

[_**Flipping this seat is going to take widespread, local support -- and I’d be humbled to have you on board. If you can, please split a donation of $5 with Fight for Progress PAC to become a Founding Donor of my 2026 campaign.**_](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=qNnHTRW1wcfn&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-21_1&amount=25)
| If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/cooke?t=brei4kp9iP8B&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-03-21_1&express_lane=true&amount=5)
---

clean_body: I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Derrick Van Orden. | Peter, I just announced my campaign for Congress in Wisconsin's 3rd District. I want to share more about what we learned in my last race and why we now have an even stronger path to unseating Derrick Van Orden. But first, we set an ambitious goal of reaching 2,026 Founding Donors to start this campaign with strength. | So, why am I running again? Because working class Wisconsinites deserve a voice in Congress -- someone who knows what it’s like to work for a living. And we’ve proven we can make real inroads when we show up, listen, and focus on issues that matter: good jobs, affordable health care, and lowering costs for working families. In an election year that saw many voters frustrated with the national Democratic Party, we still outperformed the US Senator Tammy Baldwin by 5,000 votes in this district. We even out-paced Kamala Harris by 9,000 votes. Peter, we won more votes than any Democrat in WI-03 in nearly a decade. It’s clear we’re on to something, but winning back rural, working-class voters takes time. And the tough truth is that Democrats lost these voters' trust over years of neglect. It won’t be rebuilt overnight, but we know progress is possible if we show up and keep fighting. I’m running because our work has to continue. We’re on month three of complete far right control in Washington, and folks are learning in real time that taking a buzz saw to the government won’t lower the price of eggs, or the cost of gas in your car. These are the voters we need to win over, we won't take any voter for granted or write anyone off who is starting from a different viewpoint. That's how we've done things for generations in Wisconsin, and that’s why we’ll finish the job and unseat Derrick Van Orden this time around. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, Rebecca * | | Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Personally reaching out
body:
Hi there, I wanted to take a moment to personally reach out.
Right now, we are seeing Elon Musk and Donald Trump go after our government and essential services, all to pay for tax breaks for the ultra wealthy. Yesterday, their target was the Department of Education, and kids across our district will suffer because of it. It’s unacceptable.
In the House, my colleagues and I are doing everything in our power to minimize the damage, but the fact is, we’re in the minority. That means we don’t have the numbers we need to stop all of these attacks on our own.
**It’s frustrating, but I refuse to give up, and I'm asking you not to either.**
We can soon put a check on this administration – and that starts by winning the competitive elections that will determine who has the power in Congress, including ours here in MI-08.
This is one of the most competitive races in the country, and we know the GOP will pour millions into trying to take it back. The truth is, they’ve already started.
That’s why I’m humbly asking for your $3 support today. It will take a groundswell of grassroots support to hold this seat.
**Here’s a good link to donate:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kmr-q1-2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104313122/534967543/-1606559029?refcode=em-3.22.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDJhODJlZi0yNTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v43Yb9WW-FYIhnZ8jL6zW6Yb_65g6wPpOlRrlyB_-Xc=)**
Thank you. And as always, feel free to respond to this email if you have any questions or thoughts.
Kristen

Kristen for Michigan
P.O. Box 854
Bay City, MI 48707
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/wIbGWuvzGU-Lj2kxieOm2g2?unsubscribedata=0Iht5DNQW00iYhBxmGGPbFeGPxDZt8gANZRS3n9igipmUcMjYgPXeI5yaY1q1knqAOsELLGKcbqVjUwQ9qbzQMTj1nOcQRhNJuVWyMjynLS4pR74DC9SDQ4of6LM1jQHaibYq9RmbzlZAhvCPLx0Pfhk2DOKAaEnDN%2FgplCbcy8IxyBi6SFo1k4NsYlI4xKtfPE%2FK6VqXjZaXKc4C%2Bgvel8HiT8KPp6SU%2FRfpyNwQAZWk%2BL3oXtg2p7XQqmx6fTGe3NbCIW45aUAIqUm90VeLm52CKbCWLLu%2BNzj0715MrFgJ%2FG2XyAIUzQ6k%2FXBp5lf1%2F0rDqG1KJuhcrb%2F%2FAYq9KDaSBvptr8k2usf%2FUoGETK2PlpZMfVWQrQdca9K2nK4C9gfVIyfG2NUW2X8dmk7fo4T8WaS93cAARkOfodonuwZCjtR8kv1QLM7doPaJs4l).

name: New Dems
subject: Second chance to sign to stand against USPS privatization
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
Final opportunity before this weekend’s deadline? >>

| Hi team,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition to stand with the USPS as Trump attempts to take it over in his scheme to dissolve and privatize it!

**Our records indicate that you have not signed it** – and we’re reaching out again because with postal workers set to hit the streets in protest _this weekend_ , it’s critical that we take advantage of this momentum!

Not only is Trump’s scheme to privatize the USPS a likely violation of the law, **it’s a direct attack on the millions of Americans who rely on it for medication, Social Security benefits, and mail-in voting.**

**[So please, take 1 minute to sign our critical petition to “Reject Trump’s plan to privatize the USPS! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104313391/534968138/1878703426?refcode=NDCAF_20250322_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTJhODJlZi0yNTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnaQERhCSnEL-EfzkJ1SQMrHgPeqky7q6x4sD_sE59o=&emci=fc88a391-7f06-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5a2a82ef-2507-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD MY NAME TO REJECT TRUMP’S PLAN TO PRIVATIZE THE USPS »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104313394/534968139/1878703426?refcode=NDCAF_20250322_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTJhODJlZi0yNTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnaQERhCSnEL-EfzkJ1SQMrHgPeqky7q6x4sD_sE59o=&emci=fc88a391-7f06-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5a2a82ef-2507-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The Department of Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2508%2E4032634%2EdFiud_)
---
Trump just signed an executive order to eliminate the Department of Education. If this isn’t the clearest example of this fight being the billionaires vs. the kids, families, and workers of America, I don’t know what is.

Donald Trump and Elon Musk are siding with the billionaires.

I'm siding with our kids and our teachers. I’ve got a message for every public school teacher, librarian, school bus driver, administrator — anybody and everybody who helps educate our kids: **This is the moment to stick together and fight back. And this is a fight we can _win_.** I don’t care if you’re a Democrat, Republican, Independent, Libertarian, vegetarian — we need everyone in this fight. This is the fight for an America where it’s not just rich kids who get a good education and have a chance to build their lives, but where _every_ kid has the best education possible to build the best lives possible. [**But the only way that this is going to happen is if we stay in this fight together — right now. I need to know you’re with me on this: If you’re in this fight with me to defend the Department of Education, add your name to demonstrate your commitment.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-doe/?source=EMZ25C_ENG_E_20250321_V1S1&t=8&akid=2508%2E4032634%2EdFiud_) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-doe/?source=EMZ25C_ENG_E_20250321_V1S1&t=9&akid=2508%2E4032634%2EdFiud_)
---
I’m a proud product of public schools. It was my second-grade teacher, Mrs. Lee, who first believed in me. After I graduated from the University of Houston — a public university that cost $50 a semester — I taught special needs kids at a public school in New Jersey.
The children I worked with were four to six years old and had some pretty significant challenges. Most of them couldn’t express themselves. But because we had help from the federal government, they could get the kind of one-on-one care they needed—and a better opportunity to build a real, independent future.
That’s what the Department of Education does — making sure every single child, no matter where they live, how much money their families make, what color their skin is , or if they have a disability has access to an education.
Put simply, it’s about making sure that every kid has a Mrs. Lee in their corner who believes in them from an early age.
I gotta tell you, I know that Donald Trump is claiming that this is happening because the Department of Education is “not doing its job.” You know what this is really about?
Right now Donald Trump and Elon Musk and the spineless Republicans in Congress are trying to find places that they can cut spending so that they will have more money available to be able to give tax handouts to billionaires and billionaire corporations. These Department of Education cuts are a part of that.
The Department of Education has been there for our children for generations — and many of us, without even knowing it, have had real opportunities in this life because of the dedicated people at the Department of Education. Now they need our help and now is the time we need to get in that fight.
[**This is about organizing, sharing our stories, and linking arms right now. Please add your name if you share my commitment to fighting for our country’s students and public schools.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-doe/?source=EMZ25C_ENG_E_20250321_V1S1&t=10&akid=2508%2E4032634%2EdFiud_)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

**By Rudy Giuliani**
America is under attack--not from foreign enemies, but from within. The radical left, fueled by their unhinged hatred of Elon Musk and President Donald Trump, has launched a campaign of domestic terrorism against Tesla vehicles and their owners. Molotov cocktails lobbed at showrooms, Cybertrucks torched, charging stations vandalized--these aren't protests; they're acts of war against private citizens and a great American company.
And why? Because Elon Musk dares to stand with President Trump to trim the bloated, wasteful federal government down to size. The hypocrisy of the Democrats, who clutched their pearls over January 6, is staggering. They've gone from preaching sanctimonious outrage to cheering--or at least turning a blind eye to--violence against Americans for the "crime" of driving the wrong car.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HOt9MvBAtsSYbzcmPVcFHFgl2bVoSk23IBI_XHz2_Zw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=159578826)
Let's rewind the tape. Just a few years ago, these same Democrats were shoving electric vehicles (EVs) down our throats. "Save the planet!" they screamed, as they tried to force every American into a battery-powered box, whether we wanted it or not. They hailed EVs as the future, the moral choice, the only way to stop the polar bears from drowning. Tesla, a crown jewel of American innovation, was their darling--until Elon Musk committed the ultimate sin: aligning himself with Trump. Now, one of the only made-in-America EV manufacturers and a company that employs thousands of American workers and pumps billions into our economy is their public enemy number one. Why? Because Musk isn't just building cars--he's helping President Trump dismantle their sacred cow: the sprawling, inefficient bureaucracy they've spent decades fattening up to promote their agendas in Washington.
The numbers don't lie. Tesla's been hit hard--over 10 reported attacks so far this year, from Oregon to South Carolina, with cars burned, windows smashed, and tires slashed. This isn't random mischief; it's a coordinated assault. Law enforcement says there's no evidence of a grand conspiracy, but open your eyes--Antifa and far-left extremists have been inciting this for months on social media. They're targeting Tesla owners, regular folks just trying to get to work, all because they hate Musk for leading Trump's Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE). He's slashing federal waste, firing bureaucrats by the thousands, and they can't stand it. So they take it out on innocent Americans. Sound familiar? It's the thuggery they accused Trump supporters of on January 6. Isn't it just unbelievable how they project their own destructive intent onto conservatives?!

# **The World 's Most Well-Connected Bankers Are RUSHING To Accumulate Physical Gold**
Donald Trump Jr. here with an urgent message. Central banks around the world are sending a clear warning. They're buying TONS of gold to store in their vaults.
In fact, they've purchased **more gold** in the last three years than **any other period in history**.
**Why Are Banks Making Such Aggressive Moves?**
Because they're actively preparing for a world where the dollar is no longer the global reserve currency.
Meanwhile, **most Americans remain exposed** to the dollar's decline.
The good news?
You can protect your savings the same way they are!
A Gold IRA lets you shield your IRA or 401(k) from the dollar's decline while maintaining all your tax advantages.

These punks think they can intimidate law-abiding citizens and sabotage a great American company without consequence. They're wrong. Smashing windows, torching vehicles, and terrorizing owners isn't free speech--it's a criminal assault on our freedom and safety. I've prosecuted enough mobsters to know a racket when I see one, and this stinks of organized, coordinated political violence.
Attorney General Pam Bondi and FBI Director Kash Patel need to act fast and hard. Bondi's already called this what it is--domestic terrorism--and she's right to promise severe consequences. Patel's FBI should be rounding up these radicals, tracing their funding, and exposing the puppet masters pulling the strings. We can't let this escalate like 2020, when cities burned while weak leaders sat on their hands (or cheered it on). These terrorists belong in prison, not on our streets.

They can't win with ideas, so they resort to tantrums--smashing, burning, and embarrassing themselves in front of the world. Once, they claimed the moral high ground, lecturing us about tolerance and sustainability. Now, they're the vandals, the bullies, the hypocrites. Attacking Tesla isn't just an assault on Musk or Trump--it's an attack on American ingenuity, on free choice, on the rule of law. They've outdone themselves again, proving there's no depth they won't sink to in their desperate quest to push their failing causes. America deserves better than this childish chaos. It's time to grow up--or get out of the way.

subject: Why is Elon Musk spending millions in Wisconsin?

body:
We need your support in this must-win race
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104314452/534970446/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMmE4MmVmLTI1MDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g-7hKB4MgUZh9tnbyJ8vVKi1wHceIT15UsJiK_vxVwU=&emci=710ca8b7-9006-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=532a82ef-2507-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8431045)
---

The April 1st Wisconsin Supreme Court election is a major battleground election in 2025 and right now, it’s shaping up to be tight. Here’s a rundown on the latest: _**FIRST:**_ Elon Musk endorsed Trump loyalist Brad Schimel in the race that will decide the balance of power on Wisconsin's highest court. _**THEN:**_ A group funded by Elon Musk spent more than $1.6 million targeting voters with deceptive ads just _weeks_ before the election! And another group Musk backs has spent over $6 million on get-out-the-vote efforts and digital media. _**NOW:**_ **We need to come together to make sure that on April 1st, Wisconsin voters aren't fooled by these lies.** Polls show this race neck and neck. A win for the NDRC’s endorsed candidate, Judge Susan Crawford, means that the people of Wisconsin will have a justice who believes in fair representation, reproductive freedom, and voting rights. But if Schimel wins, it would flip the majority on the court to one that supports a far-right agenda that is poised to ban abortions and roll back labor rights. It’s no wonder Musk’s organization is spending big to try to buy this seat. [**We can’t let them. With less than two weeks before Election Day, will you make an urgent donation to ensure we have the resources needed to help elect Democracy Defenders like Susan Crawford in Wisconsin and beyond? **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104314454/534970447/790884352?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FTNElonWisconsin_email_20250322-NDRC-Tier1-FTNElonWisconsin_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250322-NDRC-Tier1-FTNElonWisconsin_&utm_campaign=FTNElonWisconsin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMmE4MmVmLTI1MDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g-7hKB4MgUZh9tnbyJ8vVKi1wHceIT15UsJiK_vxVwU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Here’s the reality: Musk has spent the past few months targeting critical programs that benefit working-class Americans nationwide.
It should tell you a lot that he’s now heavily invested in helping Brad Schimel win this Supreme Court seat. Who controls the Wisconsin Supreme Court could determine a lot about this country’s future.
We have less than two weeks left to keep Musk and far-right extremists from wreaking more havoc on our democracy in Wisconsin. [**Rush a donation today to help elect Democracy Defenders like Judge Crawford in critical state-level races nationwide.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104314463/534970454/790884352?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_FTNElonWisconsin_email_20250322-NDRC-Tier1-FTNElonWisconsin_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250322-NDRC-Tier1-FTNElonWisconsin_&utm_campaign=FTNElonWisconsin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMmE4MmVmLTI1MDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g-7hKB4MgUZh9tnbyJ8vVKi1wHceIT15UsJiK_vxVwU=)

Thank you so much for chipping in.
The NDRC Team

clean_body: We need your support in this must-win race | The April 1st Wisconsin Supreme Court election is a major battleground election in 2025 and right now, it’s shaping up to be tight. Here’s a rundown on the latest: FIRST: Elon Musk endorsed Trump loyalist Brad Schimel in the race that will decide the balance of power on Wisconsin's highest court. THEN: A group funded by Elon Musk spent more than $1.6 million targeting voters with deceptive ads just weeks before the election! And another group Musk backs has spent over $6 million on get-out-the-vote efforts and digital media. NOW: We need to come together to make sure that on April 1st, Wisconsin voters aren't fooled by these lies. Polls show this race neck and neck. A win for the NDRC’s endorsed candidate, Judge Susan Crawford, means that the people of Wisconsin will have a justice who believes in fair representation, reproductive freedom, and voting rights. But if Schimel wins, it would flip the majority on the court to one that supports a far-right agenda that is poised to ban abortions and roll back labor rights. It’s no wonder Musk’s organization is spending big to try to buy this seat. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Here’s the reality: Musk has spent the past few months targeting critical programs that benefit working-class Americans nationwide. It should tell you a lot that he’s now heavily invested in helping Brad Schimel win this Supreme Court seat. Who controls the Wisconsin Supreme Court could determine a lot about this country’s future. We have less than two weeks left to keep Musk and far-right extremists from wreaking more havoc on our democracy in Wisconsin. = The truth is, we can’t expect to outspend the richest man on Earth, but your support today will ensure we’re able to hold our own and get out the vote during this final sprint in Wisconsin, and in future races across the country. Thank you so much for chipping in. The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Written with a heavy heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But I hope you’ll find it in YOUR heart to read my letter...
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6edec16f0dc54a2caaa28bc05fec73ae&_e=OJUO6cxYt644NHG2puNmsDcqht4RNeLIE3_lkf_j_uIYZeP8b8NZ9TA6WmP-vzfzJo8wvoTTfg1yV-nnV5MQXB0FEAp0SayO5vgxD1YBBaQnMdG5EtJCWMsyRXF3CJNrtC3k6hjvsns4V0IGFfB-tzXH9J3QmIDUwu5HCHAupfuiPy2UTazIXp5zVlCHLA20JsDexGRTmNImeeUGocY1y-ZoosFa9Af0BAWPxZB9lGlAtt9_JwOOefk13CmTwcKRuF28Vjn8CjmA-fsYQnp_eN7ADSvrI-CAc8oTBd_gQEU7Grzc3oZSZkwmTFcIHgBQg-kmGUFnUeUAMVzXLS1RBj4hwnHKOLNs1a2hGnoHRYRM5Uh_mGB6o1EJ_hL_Y5KT)
---
Fellow American,
---
During President Trump’s joint address to Congress, he told the country, _“My fellow citizens, America is back.”_
---
Those words – and the strength of President Trump’s inspiring leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in what feels like the blink of an eye.
---
_But today, sadly, I’m reaching out for a far more somber reason._
---
**I’ve written this letter with a heavy heart, but I hope you’ll find it in __YOUR__ heart to read it in its entirety because every word is God’s honest truth.**
---
**While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is __NOT__ yet finished.**
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
I’m humble enough to admit it – but it’s true: _Right now, YOU are my only hope._
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – to help me fight for my freedom, justice, and ultimate vindication as the Democrats try to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6edec16f0dc54a2caaa28bc05fec73ae&_e=OJUO6cxYt644NHG2puNmsDcqht4RNeLIE3_lkf_j_uIYZeP8b8NZ9TA6WmP-vzfzJo8wvoTTfg1yV-nnV5MQXB0FEAp0SayO5vgxD1YBBaQnMdG5EtJCWMsyRXF3CJNrtC3k6hjvsns4V0IGFfB-tzXH9J3QmIDUwu5HCHAupfuiPy2UTazIXp5zVlCHLA20JsDexGRTmNImeeUGocY1y_HuzIUXt6h5TlAfchTPEWBKMtcUXwsSdBNj0Bdr6c2NVSnBrUn23x-oWGZIQwT35aU-zuuM0KKOOm7KfNXYoIqSFK6ULpsRP9csbwXuglm1DdCjCbhzeb-fixFnd_R01qSSViTsxfwfIFnVLlB-kruSja0OqqohcPWbImWPKLwX)
---
You see, even though the Democrats labeled me a **“ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,”** **RAIDED** my home, **ARRESTED** me, took a **MUGSHOT** of me, and forced me into **BANKRUPTCY** , the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me BOOKED, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757...**
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6edec16f0dc54a2caaa28bc05fec73ae&_e=OJUO6cxYt644NHG2puNmsDcqht4RNeLIE3_lkf_j_uIYZeP8b8NZ9TA6WmP-vzfzJo8wvoTTfg1yV-nnV5MQXB0FEAp0SayO5vgxD1YBBaQnMdG5EtJCWMsyRXF3CJNrtC3k6hjvsns4V0IGFfB-tzXH9J3QmIDUwu5HCHAupfuiPy2UTazIXp5zVlCHLA20JsDexGRTmNImeeUGocY1y4jsslE1NL7jfqPVBRiM0Ufo5aa8OPFwiZDudqTKlLGmHzVtAVDi_by4GFuwKuVUKS37gETk5A6SXsM43xuPZjPxZaQ9677U0jcIam-kAMdQ6Fwk6WOGc_FGLEcnNUq0nf5aa1ToDy9kP9DBWJqB_5Asg7ZATX_gQbnL4EK8lDbl)
__
---
They had hoped that booking number would serve as a horrifying reminder of the price you must pay to stand on the side of truth, justice, and patriotism against the Radical Left.
---
_But today, we’re going to show these leftist crooks that number stands for something very different..._
---
To show them that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking **2,313,757 PATRIOTS** to stand with me by making a donation to my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom.
---
[**So please, make a contribution of whatever amount you can afford to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – to help me fight for my freedom, justice, and ultimate vindication as the Democrats try to JAIL me for the rest of my life.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=6edec16f0dc54a2caaa28bc05fec73ae&_e=OJUO6cxYt644NHG2puNmsDcqht4RNeLIE3_lkf_j_uIYZeP8b8NZ9TA6WmP-vzfzJo8wvoTTfg1yV-nnV5MQXB0FEAp0SayO5vgxD1YBBaQnMdG5EtJCWMsyRXF3CJNrtC3k6hjvsns4V0IGFfB-tzXH9J3QmIDUwu5HCHAupfuiPy2UTazIXp5zVlCHLA20JsDexGRTmNImeeUGocY1yx5w88LJusO9uvJido1cDory964Uy5WUhfB8kMK1KgpeoRZr490MrZJvNCMquvYHcehgK9A_GE7k3DWooue9IkU7NKzucFUzaDGMUKr1DBSw0DZaVwITJN0-0-V8TELTJbil1Jnq8G5ZOqlJSOlgfZJrP7KADFNBWQ352HpQ2eig)

clean_body: But I hope you’ll find it in YOUR heart to read my letter... | Fellow American, During President Trump’s joint address to Congress, he told the country, “My fellow citizens, America is back.” Those words – and the strength of President Trump’s inspiring leadership – have already begun to right the ship for our country in what feels like the blink of an eye. But today, sadly, I’m reaching out for a far more somber reason. I’ve written this letter with a heavy heart, but I hope you’ll find it in YOUR heart to read it in its entirety because every word is God’s honest truth. While our beautiful country may have emerged from four long years of darkness, tyranny, and the Left’s weaponized justice system, my journey out of that darkness is NOT yet finished. If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. I’m humble enough to admit it – but it’s true: Right now, YOU are my only hope. You see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “ DEAD MAN WALKING ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY , the TRUTH remains... ...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter. Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m still FIGHTING BACK. When these leftist crooks first had me BOOKED, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757... They had hoped that booking number would serve as a horrifying reminder of the price you must pay to stand on the side of truth, justice, and patriotism against the Radical Left. But today, we’re going to show these leftist crooks that number stands for something very different... To show them that good and honest Americans like YOU are also fighters who refuse to stand by as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man all for defending our 45th and 47th President, I’m humbly asking 2,313,757 PATRIOTS to stand with me by making a donation to my Legal Defense Trust to WIN the trial of my life and the fight for my freedom. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Empower your child with timeless biblical values
body:
Brand-new kid's book "The 10 Commandments for Kids"
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=235c0da1311243668e8c2c8bd9bb31c0&_e=olECTLcacAH46_wELWo_U_iAZDlAUFdjTOVRG0gWNMMVnIBD7ytJG9tjBU6yAi_xlB_lwKiNJ2AE_s5k8MRxWef4R4tOXT3xbROKiyOCUkXoR9JxEKaYzSd2_FgUIqw8O-DYUCiMXjIJN4pl6nAzH7c122eec8t9stuvXq78xFMoEhqDhUa_lwPX4ouCYdjbULz3qWgA7NgCj5mwFY7bwfAz1r2nZJjL7LY4LtM-qQJtn9nbwIUByjEqC6TSjezKY8DK4grOTRAatvq5moYXGIMTtodRuOwREtfE-oc0-54pVb4TQfFfYm5Xd_EsT5mZuTqBeyg6TiTZv1q2jsgKPZ7cd_uUgeyk8FJx4GJCCMIOjxKm85ZCLd4hu56kQOgU)
---
Peter,

Despite court rulings in Louisiana and Oklahoma that make the teaching of the Bible and the 10 Commandments mandatory in public schools and universities, we still live in a time when the foundational teachings of the Ten Commandments are no longer emphasized in our public schools and daily lives. As a result, our children are growing up without these essential, God-honoring rules for living.

In this culture of moral confusion, the Ten Commandments provide clear, simple answers about what it means to live a righteous life. Teaching these commandments to children not only instills a sense of security and purpose but also fosters emotional resilience, intellectual acuity, and ethical integrity. The Ten Commandments uphold traditional values and celebrate the family unit as foundational to society, helping children navigate life's challenges with confidence and grace.
---
| | That's why I'm excited to introduce my brand new kids book, _The 10 Commandments for Kids_ book. This book offers kids ten Bible lessons about God's simple rules for living, with each chapter explaining one commandment, discussion questions, applications, and prayers to say together. It's a trustworthy resource for children to read on their own, during church services, or as part of vacation Bible school studies.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=235c0da1311243668e8c2c8bd9bb31c0&_e=olECTLcacAH46_wELWo_U_iAZDlAUFdjTOVRG0gWNMMVnIBD7ytJG9tjBU6yAi_xlB_lwKiNJ2AE_s5k8MRxWef4R4tOXT3xbROKiyOCUkXoR9JxEKaYzSd2_FgUIqw8O-DYUCiMXjIJN4pl6nAzH7c122eec8t9stuvXq78xFMoEhqDhUa_lwPX4ouCYdjbULz3qWgA7NgCj5mwFY7bwfAz1r2nZJjL7LY4LtM-qQLxGCgh9aeUxIX7T2CiJeawWrw8DLduMtt96fYV9XtMWvV0Q3J4QvmUF1jsJSbkGy95bMch4kbP9q6SCgDJDxatRIigJjiWvaf_VluxdEU8U9Do_kOXBlW-Axl1gcpT19DThYe1Jniuk7BSQWLWyOX3)
---
| | Additionally, for the adults in your life, I've written,_The 10: How to Live and Love in a World That Has Lost Its Way_. This book will refresh your understanding and application of the Ten Commandments, showing how living by these principles can improve our personal lives, relationships, churches, and communities.

**I encourage you to point your children or grandchildren towards Jesus Christ.**

For a gift of any amount to support Pathway to Victory, I will send you both books: [https://secure.ptv.org/the-10-commandments-for-kids-generous-gift-1](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=235c0da1311243668e8c2c8bd9bb31c0&_e=olECTLcacAH46_wELWo_U_iAZDlAUFdjTOVRG0gWNMMVnIBD7ytJG9tjBU6yAi_xlB_lwKiNJ2AE_s5k8MRxWef4R4tOXT3xbROKiyOCUkXoR9JxEKaYzSd2_FgUIqw8O-DYUCiMXjIJN4pl6nAzH7c122eec8t9stuvXq78xFMoEhqDhUa_lwPX4ouCYdjbULz3qWgA7NgCj5mwFY7bwfAz1r2nZJjL7LY4LtM-qQL-dN32OjYAJiX9qThBJgrlBRDzWW-JAwsgegmJ9uLWBgiTOCf6QSrLi7L2Lt4pSqPzMpavfoC-zpXjsEVo0XNrbyIQANo5OoFOERI6SugjSmLJRLs8LIapS18-QdAXrZrF1-rPe-wEd3BXZCrSE3oz)

Your generosity enables _Pathway to Victory_ to share bold biblical truths with a broken world. Together, we will make a difference and bring people closer to Christ.

Thank you for standing with us and sharing the gospel of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word,

Dr. Robert Jeffress

Pathway To Victory
PO Box 223609
Dallas, TX 75222-3609
[
Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=235c0da1311243668e8c2c8bd9bb31c0&_t=bnkR6MDT8tpOJyekj0ZdpnBnBrcWNQpKWNRuWerwLqSZ8Uj6fcCtwuI2jO_O_xXAtNdcr3BDor0JJEM1L31vyDh4hg-NutQ4dTASFCZvbAmOTkV0cvoIYzDAvUka_XUf)

In the most populous county of our district, Volusia County, we trail our opponent by just 17 votes. | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tb/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ5NTgyNDExMjczODY1MjEyLFwiclwiOjE0OTU4MjUxODI5Njc3NDM1NX0iLCJzIjoiYTJjNThmYzE1ZTNlMTkxNCJ9)
