name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Why I voted "NO"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I will always vote to help everyday Americans instead of billionaires
| | |
---
Friend,

**I voted “NO” on the GOP’s hyper-partisan continuing resolution in the Senate, and I want to personally share why:**
Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress have complete control of the federal government, and they’re using their power to help Elon Musk continue to systematically dismantle basic government functions from the VA to aviation safety and medical research.
I refused to vote for such an irresponsible bill that gives Trump and Musk even more power to hurt millions of Americans – all while Republicans continue pushing for cuts to Medicaid to pay for more tax breaks for powerful billionaires and giant corporations.
**If you stand with me in my fight for everyday Americans instead of the wealthiest few, please:[Will you give $5 or more now to help power my efforts in the Senate and elect strong Democrats to take back our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104331459/535015462/-105628576?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5500-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDM2NTBhZC00NDA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDprSM079WMRPt2f0hJwITv2oM7bclf9W3VnbrOpgmU=)**
| | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104331460/535015463/-105628576?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5500-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDM2NTBhZC00NDA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CDprSM079WMRPt2f0hJwITv2oM7bclf9W3VnbrOpgmU=)
---
Everything I do in the Senate is for hardworking families in Nevada and across the country, friend.
It's why I’m working so hard to reverse cuts to food assistance for schools and fight back against the Trump administration's attempt to dismantle the Department of Education. It's why I'm working to investigate the true impact of Trump’s tariffs on working families. And it's why I’m working to reinstate veterans who lost their jobs during Musk's reckless purge of our federal workforce.
**But as I keep fighting for you day in and day out in the Senate, it's absolutely crucial to lay the groundwork to retake our Democratic Senate majority – because that's the only way to stop Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda for good.[So please, friend, can I count on you to chip in $5, $25, or anything you can spare before midnight? clean_body: I will always vote to help everyday Americans instead of billionaires | | | Friend, I voted “NO” on the GOP’s hyper-partisan continuing resolution in the Senate, and I want to personally share why: Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress have complete control of the federal government, and they’re using their power to help Elon Musk continue to systematically dismantle basic government functions from the VA to aviation safety and medical research. I refused to vote for such an irresponsible bill that gives Trump and Musk even more power to hurt millions of Americans – all while Republicans continue pushing for cuts to Medicaid to pay for more tax breaks for powerful billionaires and giant corporations. If you stand with me in my fight for everyday Americans instead of the wealthiest few, please:= | | = Everything I do in the Senate is for hardworking families in Nevada and across the country, friend. It's why I'm working to investigate the true impact of Trump’s tariffs on working families. name: Team McBride
subject: 9 days away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This is important.
#
Team McBride here.
We’re just **nine days away** from our first big FEC fundraising deadline since Trump and his crew of billionaire buddies took office.
We set a goal to raise $110,000 online to send an unmistakable message that voters are fed up with the chaos and corruption.
[**But time is running out to reach our goal. Can you chip in a donation right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250322-1?refcode=em20250322-1838&refcode2=1838_21716_T0MTiG&akid=1838%2E21716%2ET0MTiG)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250322-1?refcode=em20250322-1838&refcode2=1838_21716_T0MTiG&akid=1838%2E21716%2ET0MTiG)**
After March ends, Sarah and every member of Congress are legally required to publicly report their fundraising numbers for everyone to see.
If we post powerful numbers, Republicans deciding whether or not to keep propping Trump’s agenda will see that the people are on our side. **If not, they could be more emboldened to push forward with their reckless plans.**
[**We can’t let that happen. If you can chip in, we’ll stay on track and prove that our movement is stronger than ever.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250322-1?refcode=em20250322-1838&refcode2=1838_21716_T0MTiG&akid=1838%2E21716%2ET0MTiG)
Let's do this!
Team McBride

name: Team Dexter
subject: “Government efficiency” is a smokescreen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
Cutting government spending where it’s wasteful is not a bad thing.
Taking a chainsaw to our government agencies, slashing thousands of jobs indiscriminately, and lying about the results is.
That’s what Elon Musk and his crew are doing—and it’s impacting some of our most vulnerable communities.
Our veterans have made the ultimate sacrifice for our country. They deserve the best our government has to offer, something we already fall short of too often.
But recently, the Trump administration announced plans to cut 83,000 jobs from Veterans Affairs. Republicans in Congress are standing by as Musk fires the people in charge of finding wasteful spending and fraud in Veterans Affairs.
This is going to make it even harder for veterans to receive the benefits they are entitled to.
Republicans are doing it all under a smoke screen of “efficiency,” but really, all of this makes it easier for billionaires to steal and hoard money off the backs of vulnerable and hardworking American veterans.
Maxine will always stand up for those who need it. Will you help her fight these chaotic, cruel attacks on our veterans by signing our petition? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RKnEcvm230yTw_alXKPpBg2]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://secure.ngpvan.com/RKnEcvm230yTw_alXKPpBg2]
Thank you,
Team Dexter

Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare.

name: WHO'S NEXT?
subject: 2,700 Jobs Being Cut and THOUSANDS Left Behind.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/70756F655332783372636F454353396562687376694F485948735343712B763672586D4157707A676459726C636F6733786F6E2B526572766D6752546567474F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-01-10%20at%208.23.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]
The Small Business Administration has taken over the mantle of student loan program assistance, but is that really the best idea? The SBA is fully independent, meaning it was selected for this role with the intention of being an enigma.
Once again, Americans are left with fewer jobs, our government is weaker, and the agency left in charge is run by MAGA and unreachable and 10 days is all we got left, win or lose.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/687972534856395159726E396F4F5745683851746D5956586A4A30726F6E7730566F752B317A73794F39566E4C696B69546C4E436A666A414465576338446F6D/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-03-22%20at%201.06.20%E2%80%AFAM.png]

Can I count on you to rush $15 to our campaign, right now, to keep door knocking, posting flyers, and gathering Dems across my district to heed our call? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gay2025klemail]

Linda is working to >>

→ Protect Social Security and Medicare
→ Hold Elon Musk, DOGE, and the Trump administration accountable for their blatant abuse of power
→ Introducing bills to protect your private data

**And so much more. House Republicans have a historically slim 3-seat majority. That means we need you with us, Peter! **Your support will help us fund early organizing efforts, reach voters, and build the infrastructure to help support Democratic candidates across the state.[Will you pitch in $18 — our average online donation — today to help us get set up for success? name: AOC
subject: Communist manifesto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Fox News and the right wing would have you believe that my American values are something out of the communist manifesto.
But I don’t believe in healthcare, labor, and human dignity because I’m an extremist.
**I believe these things because I was a waitress**.
Because I’ve worked double shifts to keep the lights on.
Because I did lose a parent to cancer and I saw my mom open the hospital bill a couple of days later.
Because on my worst day, **I know what it feels like to feel left behind**.
I don’t want any of us to live like this anymore. We deserve better.
But together, we've built a movement is pushing harder than ever for guaranteed healthcare, bold action on our climate crisis, and so much more.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250322.eU8t5k&refcode=em20250322-8409-P_FND_CTR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8409%2E2526796%2EIPgQIv)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250322.eU8t5k&refcode=em20250322-8409-P_FND_CTR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8409%2E2526796%2EIPgQIv)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250322?refcode=em20250322-8409-P_FND_CTR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=8409_2526796_IPgQIv&akid=8409%2E2526796%2EIPgQIv)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250322-8409-P_FND_CTR_GOL&t=22&akid=8409%2E2526796%2EIPgQIv)**

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands, Fellow American.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=18868a5df61d4889968b66f9baa98e6f&_e=IT8aeatEnQFNroyOTrW8oImbxy_QvBLy6cbZQZ2ZumhKzilvphykgAz3n3jWysdEUDKUV6_Pp_8GCON5S5t5IiRHxX7H6hF1Za-NBJzLaR0eNTG9_ucYOSdCL9lT0ZgL-WjIEywFKgVelKv6vRpCMwun7qSBfz92WZpg5C14AF28QgBniCgEumbMG9YWhmRNuy7MKCSm4TZ2kqC0oUr4vYz6WTFdF_ymdE5VCN_dgFm0hVq7q125uD0EAiGS7AD7x1r4cbBKU1bPtHi119_uW51LYn5NsMORGE_RBq0znHasARjTuqQanhK4gXpDhgr2osRmdVqMRLPI4pnv9LwcHtuJXYyf3WgB5iox6xybujhqQNHocdXyq2tE5xFdEvOoe1Cdl0ut6UZ1u4Z_nSCRk3DXeuu39A2PuYFjpbVBPwJPX9BtVhwAPyFIERQYABc8)
---
My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. _Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so _please_ read this message to the end._ My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. **But right now I have a few _SERIOUS_ challenges:**
---
**I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session.** But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I was working hard in our capital. **Seriously** _**, a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response!**_
---
Now Spanberger has an _ENORMOUS_ fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage._If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission _will_ be cut short. _ **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; _please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!_**

clean_body: I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!| | | My situation is in your hands, Fellow American. I'm writing today to give you an update and to make a humble plea. Look - this is from the bottom of my heart, so please read this message to the end. My team and I put together a historic win in 2021 to help flip all three of Virginia's highest offices red. Ever since becoming Lt. Governor, I've been logging big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every fellow Virginian. Now, I'm running for Governor so we can continue to keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history again. But right now I have a few SERIOUS challenges: I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign while I was in the Virginia legislative session. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I was working hard in our capital. Seriously , a far-Left group injected $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a thing I could do in response! Now Spanberger has an ENORMOUS fundraising advantage, Fellow American. Polls show this race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage.If we don 't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! | | Without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and our Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism!I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think it was worth it. And Fellow American, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this battle together. I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward,Lt. name: Team Schrier
subject: Checks and balances exist for a reason
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This is dangerous. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104333897/535022401/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDFkOTVmNC00YTA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t-8Ga4-sNIyqB0pC1TJI5SLkt8F8ImTusZqtT0V9Pac=&emci=e9249a4a-eb05-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=2d1d95f4-4a07-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Donald Trump just made it clear—if judges don’t rule in his favor, _**he wants them impeached**_.

This isn’t how our democracy works.

We don’t throw tantrums when we don’t like a ruling. We don’t threaten judges for doing their jobs. _And we certainly don’t let one man dismantle our system of checks and balances just to protect himself._

If we don’t fight back now, this kind of reckless, anti-democratic behavior will become the new normal. name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Fighting Back Against Housing Discrimination
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169724.172346.155&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169724.172346.155&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169724.172346.155&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13973)
#
# **Fighting Back Against Housing Discrimination**
**_Senator Hughes, federal lawmakers, and advocates gathered in Philly to call out Elon Musk 's DOGE and its unconstitutional action to freeze over $30 million in funding that has been approved for fair housing organizations_** On February 27th, over 60 fair housing groups across the country received a letter informing them that their fair housing funding had been terminated effective that same day. In total, 78 grants were terminated that were set to provide over $30 million for fair housing services. 3 Pennsylvania organizations have had their funding frozen, including the Fair Housing Rights Center in Southeast Pennsylvania. Senator Hughes worked quickly to gather a coalition of leaders from across the government and the district to bring attention to this assault on fair and equal housing. [**WATCH: Senator Hughes discusses why an attack on fair housing threatens all civil rights**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169724.172346.155&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13974)
* * *
**" We've gathered this group of individuals here- leaders from the federal, state, and local level- to let the public know that protections against discrimination in housing are under attack.** **Over 60 organizations just witnessed a decimation to their funding by DOGE. This means that in 2025, under this administration, the elimination of housing discrimination, which is the law of this country, is no longer in effect. "** **\- Senator Vincent Hughes -**
* * *
[Senator Hughes was joined at the press conference by Congresswoman Madeleine Dean, Congresswoman Mary Gay Scanlon, NAACP Philadelphia President Catherine Hicks, and several housing and community organizations](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169724.172346.155&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13975). Together they called out DOGE's attack on fair housing and the need for all leaders and communities to stand up for the laws of our country. Angela McIver, the CEO of Fair Housing Rights Center in Southeast Pennsylvania, also spoke at the press conference about the funding her organization has lost because of DOGE and why we, as a collective community, cannot stand for a rollback of services that fight against housing discrimination.
* * *
**" DOGE called our work waste, but we call it great. DOGE is trying to de-legitimize programs that promote social fairness in housing because of gross historical and current government issued sanctions against, Black, Brown, disabled, and LGBTQ persons. DOGE is trying to break the morale of the fair housing spirit, but we will not hear it."** **\- Angela McIver, CEO of Fair Housing Rights Center in Southeastern Pennsylvania -**
* * *
[A full video of the press conference is available online.](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169724.172346.155&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13976) We encourage everyone to [visit our website to learn more about the housing organizations](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169724.172346.155&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13977) who are fighting to make housing fair, accessible, and affordable in our communities. **Continue to call your US Senators and Representatives to let them know how you feel about DOGE and the chaotic and inhumane cuts they are making to provide tax cuts for billionaires.**
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

| | |
---

Philadelphia, PA 19131

* * *
Every day, when I send my kids off to school, a cloud of worry hangs over me, fearing they might not make it home. No parent or caregiver should endure the anxiety of wondering if their children are safe from gun violence at school. We are facing a gun violence epidemic in our country. Shockingly, firearms remain the leading cause of death for children and teens, claiming an average of seven young lives every day. **_This grim reality demands immediate action._** **__**In the Virginia House of Delegates, I was proud to pass expanded background checks and commonsense gun safety laws. But our work is far from over. My opponent, Ian Lovejoy, proudly holds an "A" rating from the NRA. I’m proud to be a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate. **I will champion common-sense gun reforms to protect our children and communities.** **********[But I need your support. clean_body: | | | I will fight for real solutions to keep our communities safe. Every day, when I send my kids off to school, a cloud of worry hangs over me, fearing they might not make it home. No parent or caregiver should endure the anxiety of wondering if their children are safe from gun violence at school. We are facing a gun violence epidemic in our country. Shockingly, firearms remain the leading cause of death for children and teens, claiming an average of seven young lives every day. This grim reality demands immediate action. In the Virginia House of Delegates, I was proud to pass expanded background checks and commonsense gun safety laws. But our work is far from over. My opponent, Ian Lovejoy, proudly holds an "A" rating from the NRA. I’m proud to be a Moms Demand Action Gun Sense Candidate. I will champion common-sense gun reforms to protect our children and communities. ****** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support! -Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: George Whitesides
subject: This message is long, but critically important.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104335712/535026722/-2002425095?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmU0MDhkYS00ZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COyaQyrbIMZnc_krKQYGan_vK6bWOCMc3XJE-PuO34c=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104335716/535026726/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.22.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmU0MDhkYS00ZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COyaQyrbIMZnc_krKQYGan_vK6bWOCMc3XJE-PuO34c=)

Peter,

I know you’ve heard a lot from me lately. I appreciate you sticking with me in this critical time. **[Will you chip in $3, then let me explain why your support matters?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104335719/535026731/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.22.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmU0MDhkYS00ZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COyaQyrbIMZnc_krKQYGan_vK6bWOCMc3XJE-PuO34c=)**

We’re fast approaching the first end-of-quarter deadline of the year, and my first as a sitting Member of Congress.

To be honest with you, running for Congress was never my plan. I dedicated my career – from my position as NASA Chief of Staff under Obama, to creating 700+ jobs in the Antelope Valley – to serving this community.

But when I witnessed our Republican leadership turn a blind eye to our community, I knew I had to act. Despite the tough November elections, we were one of just a few Democrats to flip a red seat.

That’s because of the coalition we built here in CA-27 that includes supporters like you. _We won with just 2.6% of the vote!_

Now, I’m facing re-election for the first time. I know it seems too early to even think about the midterm elections, but national Republicans have already launched attacks designed to weaken our chances.

**It’s clear that the GOP needs this seat to maintain control of the House and give this administration fully unchecked power. Not on my watch.**

**[This end-of-quarter benchmark is our first opportunity to show that we still have a strong grassroots movement behind us. Will you chip in $3 or any amount to give us a strong showing?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104335721/535026732/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.22.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmU0MDhkYS00ZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COyaQyrbIMZnc_krKQYGan_vK6bWOCMc3XJE-PuO34c=)**
__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104335723/535026734/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.22.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmU0MDhkYS00ZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COyaQyrbIMZnc_krKQYGan_vK6bWOCMc3XJE-PuO34c=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104335725/535026736/-2002425095?refcode=em-3.22.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmU0MDhkYS00ZjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COyaQyrbIMZnc_krKQYGan_vK6bWOCMc3XJE-PuO34c=)****

clean_body: | = = Peter, I know you’ve heard a lot from me lately. I appreciate you sticking with me in this critical time. = We’re fast approaching the first end-of-quarter deadline of the year, and my first as a sitting Member of Congress. To be honest with you, running for Congress was never my plan. I dedicated my career – from my position as NASA Chief of Staff under Obama, to creating 700+ jobs in the Antelope Valley – to serving this community. But when I witnessed our Republican leadership turn a blind eye to our community, I knew I had to act. Despite the tough November elections, we were one of just a few Democrats to flip a red seat. That’s because of the coalition we built here in CA-27 that includes supporters like you. We won with just 2.6% of the vote! Now, I’m facing re-election for the first time. I know it seems too early to even think about the midterm elections, but national Republicans have already launched attacks designed to weaken our chances. It’s clear that the GOP needs this seat to maintain control of the House and give this administration fully unchecked power. Not on my watch. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. subject: Bernie Sanders is LEADING the fight >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to see this:
| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88310?t=6&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88310?t=7&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88310?t=8&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88310?t=9&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88310?t=10&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19344%2E878179%2Eeas8yI)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: First, we countered drag queens in libraries. Now our next battle needs you!
body:
Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bed2440105d43719fb27fc8a50a495d&_e=6R7m_V82oBzO6IpsQJ1BN_niUcmatQDigRk8cIsal8vePxwFbqqux5b6MQBbRuoMm0QHop6fH2vohNOl6E3fyNW_bV0mWJAMfQJCf_vwrzECwBIj14PT_QB6E0fbl50Kk2Q4kCoicEaKTr8XYNmh4y6PHk8dsq5it4uII4uF91Hbk9-1mHGxWDyFOfbYl_W35RWU8S-iYDnP5Prt7WeB-GA08w-yClEc2SDBIz9l5lIVFquy7MPN1tH6FKEtHYohgrENdibcZTOs8Ty-enntZmP1zKqxjbuYaw-Hog7ApLQcD13no1hCaQ4eSej-trurivJlltYz7fGgOZXlL9t5vY6QFQIdZpe6qqhUw9pTMVPEjufiR_hIYuULz6EkB1AA)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6bed2440105d43719fb27fc8a50a495d&_e=6R7m_V82oBzO6IpsQJ1BN_niUcmatQDigRk8cIsal8vePxwFbqqux5b6MQBbRuoMm0QHop6fH2vohNOl6E3fyNW_bV0mWJAMfQJCf_vwrzECwBIj14PT_QB6E0fbl50Kk2Q4kCoicEaKTr8XYNmh4y6PHk8dsq5it4uII4uF91Hbk9-1mHGxWDyFOfbYl_W35RWU8S-iYDnP5Prt7WeB-GA08w-yClEc2SDBIz9l5lKqoJLQHYLcZMTZmkC4zJ6bFk5MWekVOJAuUlTH1KUTfkJEZrcGnZHuzkkvsIX0nk0xFlK-_sauThfJ8LK2Dopaigtg4SRCZhWm5lc0oxEg7SGV2IsR1orzSfUFtNHGSYf8IfsZBA3LXEKq7GcmkqHk)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. name: David Horowitz
subject: America is on the brink of destruction
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1d7be6f5ee2045ac9961ae2684e90cc5&_e=7hCdW-lGsIyQm1mpIefqI2BZefWb10GenE7Jgw4ZjHQpc0tb2cvT5kVSseMTmzAtHXTXEP0rezGITa06FeP8wpoabnL49T7KiYcSBZ1Zs4cOittKNmsnc_TMNGBXWqovPZO5TBDHilCrb6_TowEdkyWnyiYveYLq615mX_IZ5j_X8rQRBNx5PuFTVfcQLwRu-ZnJU4tafoupYoVfuKGzueHHHt_dEC1_nhiSduqJNCmHfVX-_HnPisbgclV1UthdwX7Wpt7cSFVZ29EoitBzAnyesrHqLjPodYzwC788d8sw0OtFEtt0Smm0G3RS5LVIEVwndXvx7xwTArnYwazOHH3tqDe9LRk8fqwuQ_WUVHRRkxwne6yEvJNn6EcZ51XGCuYZwuy0Jos-WjtHbqbvV1VLq7dVhf908TqrAlyOlOI%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1d7be6f5ee2045ac9961ae2684e90cc5&_e=7hCdW-lGsIyQm1mpIefqI2BZefWb10GenE7Jgw4ZjHQpc0tb2cvT5kVSseMTmzAtHXTXEP0rezGITa06FeP8wpoabnL49T7KiYcSBZ1Zs4cOittKNmsnc_TMNGBXWqovPZO5TBDHilCrb6_TowEdkyWnyiYveYLq615mX_IZ5j_X8rQRBNx5PuFTVfcQLwRu-ZnJU4tafoupYoVfuKGzueHHHt_dEC1_nhiSduqJNCmHfVX-_HnPisbgclV1UthdwX7Wpt7cSFVZ29EoitBzApxnHnDtZ4J98aJ8HpZlFLUfTzeec0jm5mSUvFORfcUNoJQZArF1aMmbdao-Eewbx83oPYNPXxT2kjxAICQkLKKwGAgYQeswrRItHDLixaOf_ctpOjEUfc3WW-aTxhxIFp_VVD4j2WHARdbKIexHsso%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1d7be6f5ee2045ac9961ae2684e90cc5&_e=7hCdW-lGsIyQm1mpIefqI2BZefWb10GenE7Jgw4ZjHQpc0tb2cvT5kVSseMTmzAtHXTXEP0rezGITa06FeP8wpoabnL49T7KiYcSBZ1Zs4cOittKNmsnc_TMNGBXWqovPZO5TBDHilCrb6_TowEdkyWnyiYveYLq615mX_IZ5j_X8rQRBNx5PuFTVfcQLwRu-ZnJU4tafoupYoVfuKGzueHHHt_dEC1_nhiSduqJNCmHfVX-_HnPisbgclV1UthdwX7Wpt7cSFVZ29EoitBzAvad3U2l1qfMmgbrZ0j_54qSj5ePI8yjA9rzG_ZxJuvEtCl6cCoRFwdQt-wlEhfUoQd1xW5gA1kwaYmQ2sJR0C3fdzKVrRxWUekaZ1cMsuu8bgjYdOdNS4O2SNjb0iP7b326PeqbcMaPSsijFzx6Mo4%3D)**

I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | |

name: Team Emerge
subject: Reshaping government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Emerge women aren’t just standing up to Trump’s extreme policies—they’re reshaping the government to be more inclusive, more responsive, and more committed to delivering real results for our communities!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104336815/535030541/-245045952?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-03-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkZDJkMzhiLTU1MDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZR9XKH17wCmZDTwF9EJzlJIxntqN_es3DHWcOLisRzA=)

| Peter,

The Trump Administration is using the powers of the White House to line the pockets of their ultra-wealthy donors at the expense of hardworking Americans.

**Here at Emerge, we have one simple but powerful mission: electing more women who represent the New American Majority and will fight to build a government that truly works for all of us.**

In Congress, 10 of our Emerge alums are rallying behind an effort to bring legislation that would allow new parents to vote remotely for up to 12 weeks. When we elect women to office, we can fight back against the MAGA agenda _AND_ push for policies that make our government _more_ representative.

Emerge women aren’t just standing up to Trump’s extreme policies— _they’re reshaping the government to be more inclusive, more responsive, and more committed to delivering real results for our communities!_

To keep this momentum going, we want to see grassroots support. [_**Will you add your name to our growing list of supporters who are ready to build a government that represents the New American Majority?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/104336816/535030542/590041001?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkZDJkMzhiLTU1MDctZjAxMS05MGNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZR9XKH17wCmZDTwF9EJzlJIxntqN_es3DHWcOLisRzA=&emci=a5d2d38b-5507-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=add2d38b-5507-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=920818)

name: Sharice Davids
subject: My mother’s service taught me honor, sacrifice, and resilience
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
As the daughter of a veteran, I understand the commitment our nation’s heroes bring to everything they do

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104336876/535030834/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA3OTM2OS01NjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Udd3UTHM4GmJuVcJZdmt7NGuAaZeElc6U5PUIua5HzM=) As the daughter of a veteran, I understand the commitment our nation’s heroes bring to everything they do. Their resilience, courage, and determination inspires my work every day in Congress — which is why I’ve proudly worked to ensure our nation’s veterans receive the support they deserve. Earlier this year, the House passed my bipartisan bill, the _Successful Entrepreneurship for Reservists and Veterans (SERV) Act_. This legislation aims to support veteran small business owners by identifying the unique challenges they face and improving access to existing veterans’ programs. [_**Our nation’s veterans have sacrificed so much for our country — the least we can do is to set them up for success here at home. If you agree, sign my new petition calling on the Senate to pass the _SERV Act._**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104336877/535030835/1432827796?refcode=email_032225_SERV-act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA3OTM2OS01NjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Udd3UTHM4GmJuVcJZdmt7NGuAaZeElc6U5PUIua5HzM=&emci=1293306c-2804-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=79079369-5607-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22117458) | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104336878/535030836/-489533062?refcode=email_032225_SERV-act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA3OTM2OS01NjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Udd3UTHM4GmJuVcJZdmt7NGuAaZeElc6U5PUIua5HzM=&emci=1293306c-2804-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=79079369-5607-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22117458)
---
My mother served in the Army for twenty years, and her service taught me the principles of honor, sacrifice, and dedication to our country. After everything our nation’s veterans have done to defend our country, advance the values of freedom across the globe, and keep the American people safe, we must have their backs.
**And that’s exactly why the Trump Administration’s crusade to fire over 80,000 Veterans Affairs workers is so disappointing. **Through their countless sacrifices, our nation’s veterans have earned a lifetime of high-quality care and support from their government.
But by firing thousands of high-performing VA workers, the Trump Administration is putting that care into jeopardy — undermining the very mission of the VA.
This isn’t complicated: Our government needs to do everything in its power to offer _more_ support to our nation’s veterans, not rip their life-saving care away.
[_**I will never stop fighting to ensure every veteran receives the care and benefits they are entitled to. If you’re with me, sign my new petition to get the _SERV Act_ over the finish line.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104336879/535030837/-489533062?refcode=email_032225_SERV-act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA3OTM2OS01NjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Udd3UTHM4GmJuVcJZdmt7NGuAaZeElc6U5PUIua5HzM=&emci=1293306c-2804-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=79079369-5607-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22117458)
| [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104336880/535030838/-489533062?refcode=email_032225_SERV-act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTA3OTM2OS01NjA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Udd3UTHM4GmJuVcJZdmt7NGuAaZeElc6U5PUIua5HzM=&emci=1293306c-2804-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=79079369-5607-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&ceid=22117458)

Democrats desperately need a new direction. We need leaders who will fight back and stand up to Trump, not cave to him. Who will call out the B.S. I’m running in the district that my political hero, Rep. Sheila Jackson Lee, used to represent. She was relentless in her work to deliver for folks here in Houston. I worked for her to fight for our community, and now, I’m honored to be running for this open seat special election and fill Jackson Lee’s big shoes. She had a spine. And just like her, you won’t have to worry about me letting you down — like what you saw last week.
Team, I’m ready to make a difference for this district.
Right now, the Trump administration is ripping _everyone_ off. Costs are going up, government benefits _you_ paid for are going away, and the only people winning are billionaires like Elon Musk.
And what are the Republican sock puppets in Congress doing about it? _They’re hiding from the people that put them in office. Too afraid to say with their chests why they’re voting to eliminate your services to pay for trillions in tax cuts to their mega yacht-owning bosses._
**That’s not how our government should work. **
I’m going to be loud, and I’ll call anyone out who rips you off and makes your life worse, not better.
I’m ready to go. This is an important district to win on our path to flipping the House next year and put people with a backbone in Congress.

clean_body: Rush in a Day One contribution to stand with me and show the world that we’re ready for a new type of Democrat who means business. | Hi team — It’s Isaiah. I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m running for Congress. You saw what happened last week. We are at a crossroads — in our country, and in our party. Democrats desperately need a new direction. We need leaders who will fight back and stand up to Trump, not cave to him. Who will call out the B.S. Who will unapologetically stand up for our pocketbooks and freedoms? I’m ready to be that leader — and I’m hoping you’ll join me in the fights ahead. Our special election is coming up in two months, and I need you with me to send a strong message to Puppet Donald Trump: Democrats are ready to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I’m running in the district that my political hero, Rep. Sheila Jackson Lee, used to represent. She was relentless in her work to deliver for folks here in Houston. I worked for her to fight for our community, and now, I’m honored to be running for this open seat special election and fill Jackson Lee’s big shoes. She had a spine. And just like her, you won’t have to worry about me letting you down — like what you saw last week. Team, I’m ready to make a difference for this district. Right now, the Trump administration is ripping everyone off. Costs are going up, government benefits you paid for are going away, and the only people winning are billionaires like Elon Musk. And what are the Republican sock puppets in Congress doing about it? They’re hiding from the people that put them in office. Too afraid to say with their chests why they’re voting to eliminate your services to pay for trillions in tax cuts to their mega yacht-owning bosses. That’s not how our government should work. I’m going to be loud, and I’ll call anyone out who rips you off and makes your life worse, not better. I’m ready to go. This is an important district to win on our path to flipping the House next year and put people with a backbone in Congress. Let’s send a strong message to Puppet Trump and Puppet-Master Musk: It’s a new day, voters are pissed off, and aren’t going to let you rip us off anymore. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you. I'm glad to have you on the team. — Isaiah Isaiah Martin for Congress PO Box 53843 Houston, TX 77002 United States mailto:info@isaiahmartin.org | PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS

name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: Merit vs. DEI
body:
It’s time for merit to make a comeback.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/eaN04GnlIJLLyaPDt5cRxsD_lYkEQ1zAbXROJ4XlUkikZ4Xo8fYYPQ6yN3qWT-82Pslwe_4t-rn9E-liqvVamZC39asxuE_XjKOsKccmWRopUzGBddH5n6biY3TEeQGHMpy17p11ffhj830lwnVO10qWputRUDoJgc-rakSeIRXffzNi_cMryPSo/xvbZEwMK8H033L9K3BDaAhIVCR_rzrQ5/7)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/2vLq7H7OXfti5JxhXpXh_-I0pT3O7PK02N0T9av1Jyf11s36WRDwyPxSZoUDlpXVVpgO41QFc0WaMtm_XOfgvRRSF_plbKQRL4I8AZd6BYlPfbhiKqpwXifSf--y4dsRurUHJCI-bTChZkpF-p5N1_apak6Qcxot6GUp-zdzjyK62ElbqLUF8_LY233hosodu9zOXrffoJIyAP56w2_NFOIqAE_DOfPNosWSlAXowAxpXAJZAJKCk0quAHfXLXPsGNPocvZXbu6W3dAw3aYbNGcbj4M8Z-tFjQSxCf6prnXzFRPdj4m2CM_P-nGtrfA2ShUoQExtD4q_lloiB05f-ccYL21LHzacDWJtqbjAJaoHIJtBGtQzJ8YzKvpnohgL-B8wDfdxFMEAdn9guY9ccDNJ5Hh9U0Vp7lYmdRi6xn5-W4HEEqKA8g/qBVt-5DvQ9VE_N3IMnwHhokRn4vpc68n/7)
| |
Dear Friend of Liberty,

It's time for merit to make a comeback.

[That's why I'm writing to ask you to participate in Hillsdale College's **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/MJScXtaKfcK9lKxpFqyT6myxjo2s21UVFcAtwRVOYj7gS_qDmYpbrl6zJ6CSTbQ4iE7J0W9I223vK7Ff10ebNaD55NEEpHAJE0-1Fmf5O4xv5N7qMFof5S6GeYI3mKynoo3Mwrtmtvj6Opy-D_0JK06WJ4HppSisu0Q9_X57VflYFoklmXHQnQNCxib6lXftmGyOmiQf0usa1_Fyfq1lUeY16uDESg_Kh9YqAVlZbnRvNgbZ5DmlS7ycsQ3iXMGJhS-ZbTer-sX9F_D7FS4-t-6oNiqBpDuQmmtsTcsoJdEA0toJoMEQfMvkL5DQnwEuVpJ9fxi3iMfAdriRj-zJ-o2Zixvzv5fwboXUyjWfTOpv_DJ9qwLbLMeLaFQAiq8lcFw5rbo26HtokA17xNcSb50TT9siX2SBq0btZEwZMx1GjJTgE2a6gg/_Z19g_h7XN2JlyFbbDtxB6pD31mYNNWj/7).

Like many Americans, I'm sure you're all too aware of the damage that has been done to our country by policies implemented in the name of "Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion" or "DEI."

Race grifters and hustlers make _millions_ perpetuating DEI lies, including...

* America is a nation built on slavery, not freedom.
* All racial disparities are indisputable evidence of systemic racism--and if you question this conclusion, you must be a racist.
* Students in K-12 schools can be divided into oppressors and oppressed based on their skin color.

DEI policies have infected almost every aspect of American life, from K-12 schools to college admissions and job applications. They have even spread into the hard sciences and the military.

These policies endanger lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

I'm sure, like a lot of Americans, you want to know what you can do to stop DEI. One of the most fundamental steps is ...

**Countering the far-Left ideologies that are being taught to students in K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.**

Hillsdale College, where I am president, is engaged in a nationwide fight on the battlefield of education to save young Americans from this anti-American agenda.

Since our founding in 1844, we have offered "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."

To do this work well, we need a clear understanding of **what informed Americans like you think about DEI and how best to fight it.**

So please share your views by completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time.

Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept any government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations.

**We remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities have rejected their founding statements and embraced radical and dangerous ideologies.**

Please join Hillsdale College in our defense of Western Civilization by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** , which you can access at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/3fwLjcOYs8s24rojUeQ1vOw6PzxrQwc8A53EUJpcFTLbd5w67Iq1i5u5-4s14k0aQSo95S8uk7p9Gt97JhpoBzRXM35fG6NOVvGRjwn5i5HMK8QEbtrO6nit9J7vvU72dUb1dLnfWUZnTRgoMSCy8Gcd5ktXkl9Hr0SBt-owzrtZbR7cptpaI1uggRTGCvOelhIGiv6uKabX0UWgjTOABU1f-6V5mbSxhPtNUB1O2pggfCEmYhwjzqTygbQyWZ8ty7m0kHWahbY6zPdejy45imph1z0yO8GygCRt-WzPvZRYTEHJPzjNt4bSZ1gxtJ_pJhEFzP8lnPgYT0GUBSZM7z4zrcY7gTA1M8BtKaX_d4IVNnPAYrQLw51teUmuKZ36i8zOamFTDH2Y0njXQaKtao0-GUpMlyqx0jKYYccBaD2bdTR0SZjQ2g/i8q7sZdhafLIUsdy9wNGr-pZRkbsLpo1/7)

With your help, we will continue our work to defeat the tyranny of low standards and to restore excellence in America.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Please fill out your **DEFEAT DEI SURVEY** today. Your answers will help us to defend excellence and merit against the tyranny of DEI. Today, DEI affects almost every aspect of American life. This endangers lives and, ultimately, Western Civilization itself.

You can take your survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few moments of your time.

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/defeat-dei-survey](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/L-N_aiCuQ4hShhMBQou-svN5jNmkiInN5DX0iluF6w7zd-J4yVoWVGOrrn3Yw6-EUJzsbeCpn2-ZJIlnxMI2JfdOJgLqV6wtBHGRpBGlgeFGZbne_J0UiWxP8dbsNo_gojPwXqawxa-sv4XKtsYC7xWG7wUK-yj-wvUhTiNYgtoN2haym_iRk1OU3ZH9645Lf9zU2FqddSf9KS0gF8ZN8chiJ3XmfF2TC_HCl2U8lbd3-9ERB2wPOlo5GNwy5-bS07dUeg_zJoSMeGcWM3DlluU-56buvyx0MasTxq_XJAofF_w8-R_Xj-w-rKXsQgXQKg0d6b3jYiC5QvxkO9N2CaKPeAzXCIJ0illlKVSSOECcuHG35TzDrUom8plVvfUqvliSEkDEELtzRstDzcrw4hevvLgSyZf5E_Y3CIm03SEQIF0hoiq6rg/mWhvLK6dJLaw2VsNJbwxk_ru_ZlRGyCP/7)

Thank you!
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/-E1jRXVr2OXk-cEG6-lg6CAjkK-CjdGUOdGuqQFMEw65EurjeriaDCeDY5nM8nNEB6SsBPy17cz436BxmblckkeM9eaUAe-YCujvzklFCuaCiAWmccdo-mFzuGvQIqkAymc-96ZcM_BFlrsx4RmH273pghh8cDc1htTalgV8JIUSalL9gFNQ2co7pAgys1kKkZYPnQSERli-ht9STTQ-5ijsoqifcfy4Jg/rVNRDz0_mdBjFlq_wCm06GnTMzh3vJTG/7)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/eaN04GnlIJLLyaPDt5cRxsD_lYkEQ1zAbXROJ4XlUkikZ4Xo8fYYPQ6yN3qWT-82Pslwe_4t-rn9E-liqvVamZC39asxuE_XjKOsKccmWRopUzGBddH5n6biY3TEeQGHMpy17p11ffhj830lwnVO10qWputRUDoJgc-rakSeIRXffzNi_cMryPSo/xvbZEwMK8H033L9K3BDaAhIVCR_rzrQ5/7).

name: Forward Party
subject: Control What You Can - How Are We Doing On The Environment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Make your voice heard.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=environment_follow_up&n=1)
---
| Peter -- Last week we kicked off our new series called _**Control What You Can**_ _._ We're reaching out directly to all of you to find out just how you feel about the most important issues facing our nation. In the last edition, we were talking about healthcare. This week, it's climate change. [**How is the US doing handling the environment?**](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_environment_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=environment_follow_up&n=2) Building a resilient and representative democracy takes time and energy from us all. Driving real change takes honest conversations from all of us. We're going to take the next couple months and reach out to you on [social media](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=mhUdGCm_eEqxEEjcw0-lGbIN6AZpbu4iFxE-qCh2CjHeENqjR49X2ZT4HVUN1_5DDAe5IDUlJAr-XnbInjNbxw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=environment_follow_up&n=3), on [our website](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_environment_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=environment_follow_up&n=4), and here to ask you for your opinions.**** Answer on our website:[](https://home.forwardparty.com/2025_environment_feedback?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=environment_follow_up&n=5) Or on twitter: We want to know how satisfied you are with US environmental policies—**click the image above and tell us your answer**. And once you've answered the broad question, leave a comment and tell us the why you selected the answer you did. What would you change? How would you fix it? What does the world look like with your solution in place? Are there any interesting articles on the topic you want to share with other Forwardists? We want to hear it all. Join the conversation! Looking forward to hearing from you, The Forward Party Forward Party

clean_body: Make your voice heard. | | | Peter -- Last week we kicked off our new series called Control What You Can . We're reaching out directly to all of you to find out just how you feel about the most important issues facing our nation. In the last edition, we were talking about healthcare. This week, it's climate change. Building a resilient and representative democracy takes time and energy from us all. Driving real change takes honest conversations from all of us. We're going to take the next couple months and reach out to you on , on , and here to ask you for your opinions.** Answer on our website: Or on twitter: We want to know how satisfied you are with US environmental policies—click the image above and tell us your answer**. And once you've answered the broad question, leave a comment and tell us the why you selected the answer you did. What would you change? How would you fix it? What does the world look like with your solution in place? Are there any interesting articles on the topic you want to share with other Forwardists? We want to hear it all. Join the conversation! Looking forward to hearing from you, The Forward Party Forward Party Copyright © 2025 Forward Party®, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is: 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ForwardParty.com

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: The George Floyd riots continue to haunt my husband
body:
Life behind bars could be his “reward.”| | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot, That's me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches in the picture I've sent you...
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3e2f21ef2fca4da6bb7eb38aa6f24669&_e=_PVJcdGccjYPnpE4TisK1Qs5L6xiS9M5Mdz79DUcXRMnL-NKCzWcGyRBMVGSC0_9Wkg3Hj2Xa8rF_-Loa8iZAUhS9k_mE4Ef-XeuNIL1X8QgUq75sMvGTtXPiWgAiazSEl5L6vCcLtFezr9niF-zi3LJqv-7R9lgf12tuZZvGIZcgYMcMuXmv90r-5z3Zah6g3NSLx_b6EnBeIbd7fiu6gvtSyfnLy7mI3r6mhuRXvNjwOw45wb3zNHcwz4cI9u22YlryD6PMdjz6Rwe9rQ5ZSldJOScsM7N6kyFv1z8H14pMLnh3SvSwRJJqsr9IRs864KZURZPcqI0pqEknRWYU_ECJpSI5k63qmozjoJAKPEAxovV26wE7Hopiwe1yd8B)
---
...a picture we took on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. Now looking at it makes me cry. Because in July, the same city that gave Chance this award... ...will try to lock him up for life for doing his job. I should explain. For nearly 13 years, Chance has been a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department. But in May of 2020, our lives were turned upside down. You probably remember what it was like in our country after George Floyd. Violent, fiery anti-police protests were sweeping through cities. Every step of the way, they were cheered on by radical politicians, Soros-funded prosecutors, and the Mainstream Media who lied to us and said, with a straight face, that these riots were "mostly peaceful." It was especially bad here in Austin, Texas. For three nights in a row, angry, anti-cop mobs rampaged through downtown, smashing windows, burning police cars, and looting stores. The crowd attacked officers like my husband who were trying to keep the peace, pelting them with rocks, bricks, and even lit fireworks. On the third night, things got even worse. Protestors shut down interstate, and a crazed mob surrounded Police Headquarters. Chance and his fellow officers knew that if they didn't restore order quickly, the headquarters, and maybe even the entire city, might burn to the ground. Following their training, they fired non-lethal weapons – the same "beanbag guns" that police have used for years to break up riots – to stop the violence before it got out of hand. The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? _**[Would you help by sending a one-time gift to LELDF so this amazing group can defend my husband and the other good police officers who have wrongly accused?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3e2f21ef2fca4da6bb7eb38aa6f24669&_e=_PVJcdGccjYPnpE4TisK1Qs5L6xiS9M5Mdz79DUcXRMnL-NKCzWcGyRBMVGSC0_9Wkg3Hj2Xa8rF_-Loa8iZAUhS9k_mE4Ef-XeuNIL1X8QgUq75sMvGTtXPiWgAiazSEl5L6vCcLtFezr9niF-zi3LJqv-7R9lgf12tuZZvGIZcgYMcMuXmv90r-5z3Zah6g3NSLx_b6EnBeIbd7fiu6gvtSyfnLy7mI3r6mhuRXvNBQma80wlof9VdYnG9Sw0sRtI_oixQzRylNF5RbsldHdXeh1reJJ-uhBGO3i1AzKqeL5nIoL3M9gKyI4FKvUeu_umDzT5jh8ZM-n8Pw08PK8Aw0MreAs-mTF-Z9Pv6LdyxmG9wugza6ECX1UmOaR89)**_** ** You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. _**[So with that in mind, please know that any contribution -- be it $35, $100, $500 or even $1,000 -- is tax-deductible.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3e2f21ef2fca4da6bb7eb38aa6f24669&_e=_PVJcdGccjYPnpE4TisK1Qs5L6xiS9M5Mdz79DUcXRMnL-NKCzWcGyRBMVGSC0_9Wkg3Hj2Xa8rF_-Loa8iZAUhS9k_mE4Ef-XeuNIL1X8QgUq75sMvGTtXPiWgAiazSEl5L6vCcLtFezr9niF-zi3LJqv-7R9lgf12tuZZvGIZcgYMcMuXmv90r-5z3Zah6g3NSLx_b6EnBeIbd7fiu6gvtSyfnLy7mI3r6mhuRXvNT6NOLEcQiQTwkD4oRoLH9BIE2sCsMVmlvuB1tkTEJwOK6GKI4in-t13DeBA2YmJQrLcLZKzPAldiwxnVwYHU-vtKEkzC0fDbwiPAfn_z1ALoqmq5n0qj02KX6lS0GVGIypiwyTLi7Okpdai__H6kM)**_ But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. _**[So please, my friend, rush back your gift right away if possible.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3e2f21ef2fca4da6bb7eb38aa6f24669&_e=_PVJcdGccjYPnpE4TisK1Qs5L6xiS9M5Mdz79DUcXRMnL-NKCzWcGyRBMVGSC0_9Wkg3Hj2Xa8rF_-Loa8iZAUhS9k_mE4Ef-XeuNIL1X8QgUq75sMvGTtXPiWgAiazSEl5L6vCcLtFezr9niF-zi3LJqv-7R9lgf12tuZZvGIZcgYMcMuXmv90r-5z3Zah6g3NSLx_b6EnBeIbd7fiu6gvtSyfnLy7mI3r6mhuRXvNP0dlN0uHyv9R9YZSWXkGweo3KQiQ4TT_INdmmwtH5rCptUaweDch9L3px9Ckf_sERrun8SdknmrUqbmF11M3PhlXRUWx5RQpMz7UiMy7ithjrX4hvzuJiHANqwLg4W4YJHsBEPKloxauDzTjL8RC_)**_ With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, _**[your gift of $35](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3e2f21ef2fca4da6bb7eb38aa6f24669&_e=_PVJcdGccjYPnpE4TisK1Qs5L6xiS9M5Mdz79DUcXRMnL-NKCzWcGyRBMVGSC0_9Wkg3Hj2Xa8rF_-Loa8iZAUhS9k_mE4Ef-XeuNIL1X8QgUq75sMvGTtXPiWgAiazSEl5L6vCcLtFezr9niF-zi3LJqv-7R9lgf12tuZZvGIZcgYMcMuXmv90r-5z3Zah6g3NSLx_b6EnBeIbd7fiu6gvtSyfnLy7mI3r6mhuRXvPA9tYq0QjejRigVrbgHUqvYTbfEYJmnXeaONI61Rjqb_SC966XhLl2qrYEbcDuz4JnM3H5n61ccnjAcuXSkyFREGpVL-Rs4xiBtCAJbVSXGq0wu9IXKZOCkZYrRiOEPBtLDop2_r4WMgr5BwA7S3nl)**_ \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. _**[Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3e2f21ef2fca4da6bb7eb38aa6f24669&_e=_PVJcdGccjYPnpE4TisK1Qs5L6xiS9M5Mdz79DUcXRMnL-NKCzWcGyRBMVGSC0_9Wkg3Hj2Xa8rF_-Loa8iZAUhS9k_mE4Ef-XeuNIL1X8QgUq75sMvGTtXPiWgAiazSEl5L6vCcLtFezr9niF-zi3LJqv-7R9lgf12tuZZvGIZcgYMcMuXmv90r-5z3Zah6g3NSLx_b6EnBeIbd7fiu6gvtSyfnLy7mI3r6mhuRXvMClTWH5TEUVRHmiiqGbcVsdcMZ3HygFzRBrAGxQJ3X4byw6H4rtzpacEPrMCYbIIdj_fi0xyNshy8041e5zzHYVRJopQ1QvCD8OwUrnzihYBiRzqWDjfA-5dxNFRy8M7d7IDe6NwJUbNPygP0rJ1pf)**_
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3e2f21ef2fca4da6bb7eb38aa6f24669&_e=_PVJcdGccjYPnpE4TisK1Qs5L6xiS9M5Mdz79DUcXRMnL-NKCzWcGyRBMVGSC0_9Wkg3Hj2Xa8rF_-Loa8iZAUhS9k_mE4Ef-XeuNIL1X8QgUq75sMvGTtXPiWgAiazSEl5L6vCcLtFezr9niF-zi3LJqv-7R9lgf12tuZZvGIZcgYMcMuXmv90r-5z3Zah6g3NSLx_b6EnBeIbd7fiu6gvtSyfnLy7mI3r6mhuRXvODcZQfkhMGdOYtmZMuIFlDI_DFhpl3_1CCmzR_csg7E1hLOKaY7x9dSGXbDqWI7IZZMFrm-fnEUyEzyx_exV8tjVRReEiVruRXtkRfYR0Ln-J4WogbJGeT9dkmUwzPI8_OmNnhjmuso9WziTZ7Fu-h)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303
