The mob slunk off. And my husband made it home safe and sound. What I didn’t know then was that this nightmare wasn't over for us. Far from it. Unknown to Chance and the other officers on duty that night, an anti-police protestor was hit by one of my husband's non-lethal rounds. They claimed they were injured and lost part of their finger. And for that... ...the county prosecutor charged my husband with "aggravated assault by a public servant" -- a charge punishable by life in prison. This is the upside-down world we live in now. A world where lawless thugs who fling rocks at police and try to burn our city to the ground get off scot-free... ...while law-abiding officers get criminal charges and face life in prison for following their training and breaking up a mob of rioters. What are cops like my husband supposed to do when faced with this kind of out-of-control violence?! When Chance told me about the charges, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair...and back again. But it all started to make sense when we learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to get revenge on my husband. They don't care if my husband is innocent. They'll do everything in their power to make cops pay. It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But nearly 13 years ago, my husband did. And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran. My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band. He's served on mission trips -- planting churches, planning vacation Bible schools, and sharing the Gospel. And he's done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record. Chance put his life on the line to protect our city from a violent, unhinged mob... ...and life behind bars and could be his "reward." Even if my husband's good name is cleared there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills. Thankfully, by God's grace, there is one group who has stepped up to help us -- the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know that their record has made them a policemen's best friend. Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes -- like my husband. LELDF hires the best attorneys and secures expert witnesses who will testify to the truth -- without being influenced by political paybacks. And now they've agreed to help Chance. My friend, you've read my letter this far so I'm going to ask as boldly as I can: Will you help Chance, too? You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. They rely entirely on the generosity of kind-hearted folks like you to defend the men and women in blue who defend us. But whatever you feel led to give, please end it back quickly. Chance's trial starts on July 7th. Our legal team needs to be working day and night getting ready for his defense. Because if Chance is found guilty... ...he'll spend every wedding anniversary, birthday, and Christmas for the rest of his life in prison. He won't be able to take our sons to football games or teach them how to drive... He won't be able to walk our daughter down the aisle somebody... I can't bear the thought of life without him. And I know what happens to former police officers when they get locked up with thousands of criminals. My only hope of saving him today is good-hearted patriots like you. With this radical Soros-funded prosecutor on the warpath, \-- or any amount -- could be the difference between Chance clearing his good name... ...and spending the rest of his life behind bars. Thank you for reading my email today with such a generous spirit. I can never express how grateful I am to you -- in advance -- for helping my husband fight back. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance put his life on the line to keep our city safe from a rabid mob of violent protestors. Now life behind bars could be his "reward."And to make things worse, we're up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court. We have very little time to act before Chance's trial begins. Chance and I have three children -- and one more on the way. Please don't let them grow up without their father. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Troy Downing
subject: We DEMAND stronger immigration enforcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Will you stand with me?

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDMyMl9ZRC05RS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MTcyOTQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAzMjJfWUQtOUUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjE3Mjk0LTI4OTkifQ/yzMVaIp9mPxkIaux6pFj0w)
---
Peter,

A brutal stabbing took the life of a 16-year-old high school student in Washington State—an innocent victim of the violence fueled by our broken immigration system. This tragedy is not an isolated incident but a direct result of _**lax policies that have left our borders vulnerable.**_

Under President Biden, our borders were wide open, risking American lives. But thanks to President Trump, Secretary Noem, Border Czar Homan, and our brave immigration officials, incredible progress has been made.

Still, much work remains. Stronger enforcement is essential to protect American families and prevent further senseless violence. **We must secure our borders and DETAIN and DEPORT every last illegal alien in this country before more lives are lost.**

**[**Will you stand with me and demand stronger immigration enforcement? Add your name to the petition here:**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDMyMl9ZRC05RS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MTcyOTQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAzMjJfWUQtOUUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjE3Mjk0LTI4OTkifQ/qSsaPToTmOC5uCl6NZR2jA)**
---
[ **SIGN THE DETAIN AND DEPORT PETITION TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDMyMl9ZRC05RS4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MTcyOTQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAzMjJfWUQtOUUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjE3Mjk0LTI4OTkifQ/3fWzYqROBN3363GICqOpUg)
---
We won’t rest until every last illegal alien is removed.

Thank you for your support,

Troy Downing
_Conservative in Congress_

subject: This isn’t getting enough national attention.

name: Crow for Congress
subject: March 22, 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hey there, folks —

Today, we're reaching out to ask you to make your very first contribution to our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-mar25]

In 2024, thousands of donors stepped up to support messages like this, significantly boosting Jason's winning campaign. By making your first contribution, you'll be playing a crucial role in Jason's continued dedication to providing strong, principled leadership in Congress.

As a former Army Ranger who served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, Jason understands what it means to exemplify servant leadership. No matter how tough it may be, Jason has always gone towards the fight.

When a five-term GOP congressman chose NRA contributions over meaningful gun safety legislation, Jason challenged the status quo and flipped the seat in 2018, helping Democrats reclaim the House. Contributions from folks just like you helped us do that.

When Republicans lacked the courage to hold Donald Trump accountable, Jason didn’t hesitate. He took on the role of impeachment manager during Trump’s first impeachment, laying out the facts for the American people and upholding the truth.

And now, we’re working to build the majority we need to stand up to Donald Trump’s extremism. That means not only flipping a few red seats blue but also protecting every single seat we already have.

We’re committed to bringing more leaders like Jason to Congress — individuals from working-class backgrounds who will be independent leaders and not afraid to say what’s on their minds. With just a few seats needed to reclaim the House, we can build the majority we need to stand up to MAGA extremism.

Your support can make a significant impact. Will you make your first grassroots contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-mar25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-mar25?amount=10&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-mar25?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-mar25]

Thank you for your support,

Team Crow

Greenwood Village, CO 80112

name: Andrea Salinas HQ
subject: a plan to sabotage Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/104337703/535033686/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTgyNzg2MS02MDA3LWYwMTEtOTBjZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aOq0FFjp5Mkk2IG5dr4cUQK4IKOKXJr6lGFK86B3Qo=) Team — earlier this week, a Trump administration memo leaked to the press, detailing DOGE’s plans for Social Security. And team, their plan is all-out sabotage. We learned they plan on taking away online claims access for tens of thousands of older and disabled Americans. That means forcing folks to physically travel to Social Security offices — if they can even get an appointment, for which the wait time is _already_ several weeks. At the same time, DOGE plans to lay off thousands of staff and close many of the offices that they are _forcing people to travel to in order to access their benefits._ Let’s be clear about this: this plan is going to prevent tens of thousands of Americans from accessing the Social Security benefits they’ve earned after a lifetime of hard work. It’s unacceptable, and we need to fight back. **[Andrea Salinas is fighting back every way she can to stop Elon Musk from stealing our Social Security benefits. clean_body: = Team — earlier this week, a Trump administration memo leaked to the press, detailing DOGE’s plans for Social Security. And team, their plan is all-out sabotage. We learned they plan on taking away online claims access for tens of thousands of older and disabled Americans. That means forcing folks to physically travel to Social Security offices — if they can even get an appointment, for which the wait time is already several weeks. At the same time, DOGE plans to lay off thousands of staff and close many of the offices that they are forcing people to travel to in order to access their benefits. Let’s be clear about this: this plan is going to prevent tens of thousands of Americans from accessing the Social Security benefits they’ve earned after a lifetime of hard work. It’s unacceptable, and we need to fight back. | | Thank you, Team Salinas | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: BREAKING
subject: sheer panic in FL-06 - GOP caught with their pants down
body:
We just reported an ungodly amount of money raised. They don’t know what hit them. Time to press the attack.
| | | | Josh Weil is the Democratic Nominee to flip Florida's 6th congressional district. Thank you for your crucial support for Josh and for stopping the chaos and harm over the next four years. However if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email.

---
| | | | Team,
At the outset of this campaign - we made a strategic decision to not reveal our strength until the last possible moment to give Republicans the smallest window of time to mount a competitive campaign.
For months we've been flying under the radar, amassing our strength, lulling Republicans into a false sense of complacency - but now the cat is out of the bag.
Recently local media reported that our campaign is trailing Republicans by just 17 votes in our most populous county - Volusia County. They report that across all six counties in Florida's 6th, Dem and GOP turnout is nearly even.

body:

Peter,

We just ran a database check, and your voter verification status is still unconfirmed. This could mean:

❌ Your voting record is incomplete

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The MAGA trolls love to come after me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Donald Trump and countless right-wing officials have weaponized the government against me and other leaders who hold them accountable to the rule of law. And it will only get worse.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8384%2E5257348%2EvmIsxr)
Derek — Top Trump administration officials attacked me on _Fox News_ and social media all day yesterday. All because I’m exposing the corruption of Trump and Elon.
And then, this happened:
Stephen Miller, architect of Trump’s cruelest immigration policies, went on _Fox News_ to viciously attack and smear me.
Mike Davis even went as far as to say the “Democrat hunters are gonna be the hunted — legally, politically, and financially.” He’s saying he’s hunting me, Derek. For doing my duty and standing up to Trump.
And Dan Scavino, who was Trump’s top defender during the January 6 Committee, amplified these attacks on social media.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250322_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=8384%2E5257348%2EvmIsxr)
_“Adam Schiff is not only a stone-cold hopeless loser, but he is one of the most corrupt, one of the most shameful, one of the most heinous individuals ever to serve in public office in America.”_
Derek, these attacks are certainly not new. I’m used to it. The MAGA trolls love to come after me.
**What is new is how emboldened the Trump administration is to attack and go after their enemies.**
Donald Trump and countless right-wing officials have weaponized the government against me and other leaders who hold them accountable to the rule of law. And it will only get worse.
The guardrails are gone. Inspector generals were fired, and Elon Musk gutted federal oversight offices.
**To fight back, we need to stand strong and resilient. Despite the fear-mongering, we _cannot_ stop speaking out about Trump’s vicious power grabs. We _cannot_ quit holding him accountable. We _must keep up_ the fight.**
**[Chip in to help me in this struggle. The stakes are high, and the attacks are ramping up, so I need you more than ever.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q12025_abs_em.9NB2Ka&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250322_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8384%2E5257348%2EvmIsxr)**

name: Devan
subject: Introducing myself:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there team, I'm Devan, and I just became the Executive Director of the DSCC.

Over the next two years, it'll be my job to develop our winning strategy to put Democrats in the _strongest_ position possible to flip the Senate blue. But I can't do that without insights from supporters like you, so one of my first priorities as Executive Director is to build a team of Democrats to inform my advisors.

**They told me that you were in our top ten percent of supporters last year -- so it's clear that I can rely on _you._ That's why I'm asking you to take my new strategy survey:**

[**Please, click here to enter my official Democratic strategy survey >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21031?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250322-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250322-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=19868%2E9716520%2E01Lth-)

| | [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21031?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250322-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250322-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=19868%2E9716520%2E01Lth-)
---

With competitive elections all over the map and _even more_ MAGA loyalists up for re-election, we have a golden opportunity here. **We have the chance to unseat far-right Republicans AND replace Trump's worst enablers with strong Democrats who will fight for our rights.**

But in order to lock in our victory, I need to gather critical data immediately from motivated supporters like you. **I'm _100% confident_ your insights will sharpen our strategy.**

[**So please, will you accept the invitation to join my strategy survey before the midnight deadline? I'm waiting to review your responses before I make my next move, so please click here to enter the survey now >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21031?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250322-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250322-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=19868%2E9716520%2E01Lth-)

| [ENTER SURVEY](https://go.dscc.org/go/21031?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250322-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250322-Devan-NewEDStrategySurvey-Pros-sl1&akid=19868%2E9716520%2E01Lth-)
---

I'm looking forward to hearing from you. **Together, we'll lead the fight to win back our Senate majority.**

Thank you,

Devan
Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

name: Jeff Person, Able Dems
subject: Send us a handwritten letter to Rep. to save Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | As Donald Trump and Elon Musk threaten cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, members of Congress are receiving torrents of emails and phone calls. **We want to add a highly visible message: handwritten letters to Rep. Robert P. Bresnahan, Jr. from constituents like you saying why Social Security, Medicare, or Medicaid are essential to your family.** For the biggest visual impact, our team plans on _hand-delivering_ a big stack of letters to Congressional offices in Washington, DC in early April - hopefully showing them multiple letters at once.
We’ll also post some of the best letters (blocking out personal information like addresses) on social media, amplifying your story.
**Here’s how to participate:**
**STEP ONE: Write a letter like the following** \- it’s very important to include your name and address to establish that you are a constituent.
Your First and Last Name Your Home Address Your City, State, Zip
Representative Robert P. Bresnahan, Jr. United States House of Representatives Washington, DC
Dear Rep. ,
[Your message against Donald Trump and Elon Musks’s cuts to Social Security, Medicare, or Medicaid. You can choose to share how it affects you and your family. Please remember that the contents of your letter may be made public by our team or by the receiving office.]
**STEP TWO: Put the letter in an envelope and mail it to our team at:

** **** Able Dems Letters 5812 Queens Blvd Ste 2 Box 1144 Queens, NY 11377
After this, we will take your letters in a batch to the US Capitol in early April. Please send your letters by March 27!
**Don’t want to write a letter?[You can support our project by donating here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQspAbPSpPuaj1jgwGWpjiBAgePscIpYXv9ygB3e1J1-ofldDfPIzOIMQlLP18Jn8YfO9WSvol1UJfZmAdx-ublclpBDv0Qhrs4vCwwHlp5FhJSeyAaUEnULrQYMS2nwbkcFaXxP-lnl-KiNzOY2Qf8S3GfJY_t2BcYKmnyu1t2Ay2xipMRCEQ7ZIgSkD7qOvwQF8gvGPy2-qd29TPbkVlfEIv3Qy4lK-qDEV3EJ3mfSB0t90HuKf9wod74Qm8rENgMFkD-JGrPUbcC9gdQQZlCn26vZ9r3SZYa7Qf148xLWZ6NPGl7QO3_aQ-p0a5a15cewVdgT7ik6T1nB1AZYZ0yvw0VGta95n6XGyAxwxZsklsTjohROcLH6KiLc_fRK6eGF_-Jdpd0Ie08EjeZGGRrQLf9Ad7DKzVB5mIshf2a3xi9nKQNJahnDujSXs5b4icWZTOpPSecaoMymh0yhRRoSC8vo9fAL61Ez_SGOY25_Hke-v_P0k0OR1nOOLKWrWyjLde5V5NQbvPLP88FzAu7f0-EBck1nxpGdCzhjMPl5Qo9jv7ryQkqTlzNBU5mtj6TDTZem4aTmzXhXljHueMXDw/4f0/59JZZQurRnOXmeQxe-9b-A/h0/h001.UC6QupD9CCfXF_jZ_MD0QEUs5ES2SVit7glgO1Qsg9w)**

clean_body: | | | As Donald Trump and Elon Musk threaten cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, members of Congress are receiving torrents of emails and phone calls. We want to add a highly visible message: handwritten letters to Rep. Robert P. Bresnahan, Jr. from constituents like you saying why Social Security, Medicare, or Medicaid are essential to your family. For the biggest visual impact, our team plans on hand-delivering a big stack of letters to Congressional offices in Washington, DC in early April - hopefully showing them multiple letters at once. We’ll also post some of the best letters (blocking out personal information like addresses) on social media, amplifying your story. Here’s how to participate: STEP ONE: Write a letter like the following \- it’s very important to include your name and address to establish that you are a constituent. Your First and Last Name Your Home Address Your City, State, Zip Representative Robert P. Bresnahan, Jr. United States House of Representatives Washington, DC Dear Rep. , [Your message against Donald Trump and Elon Musks’s cuts to Social Security, Medicare, or Medicaid. You can choose to share how it affects you and your family. Please remember that the contents of your letter may be made public by our team or by the receiving office.] STEP TWO: Put the letter in an envelope and mail it to our team at: ** Able Dems Letters 5812 Queens Blvd Ste 2 Box 1144 Queens, NY 11377 After this, we will take your letters in a batch to the US Capitol in early April. Please send your letters by March 27! Don’t want to write a letter?** Thanks for your time! Jeff Person, Executive Director, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Steve Chapman
subject: I want you to meet Norm Eisen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdda25?refcode=Email3212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdda25?refcode=Email3212025&amount=25]
Peter —
I’d like to introduce you to Norm Eisen , one of my heroes who I’ve been lucky to get to know over the past couple of months. Norm is at the tip of the spear defending American democracy and our democratic traditions through his organization State Democracy Defender Action (SDDA) .
I was in a San Francisco federal courtroom last week watching Norm’s team dismantle the Trump administration's arguments one by one. It was inspiring to watch history being made, and I immediately made a personal contribution to Norm’s work.
SDDA engages in litigation across the country to help defend democracy – and SDDA will continue to push back against the improper (and unconstitutional!) actions of Trump and DOGE.
With the WI Supreme Court race coming up on April 1st, SDDA understands how crucial this race is to saving democracy. They assisted a long-time local activist with filing an ethics complaint detailing how a Musk-backed group in Wisconsin violated several campaign finance laws in an attempt to influence the upcoming election. Norm’s group is also funding a social media campaign with young Wisconsinites to educate the public about Musk’s actions. In just one week, their content has gotten more than 11 million views and raised over $150,000.
GOTV PAC focuses on supporting the country's most competitive state and Congressional races using innovative tactics and techniques. SDDA and GOTV are heavily invested in our respective efforts to win the Wisconsin Supreme Court election and defeat the country’s most exclusive voter ID ballot initiative on April 1st.
The fight to save American democracy must be won. Can you contribute $25 or more, which will be split evenly between SDDA and GOTV PAC? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdda25?refcode=Email3212025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

—Steve Chapman
Chairman GOTV

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdda25?refcode=Email3212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sdda25?refcode=Email3212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

subject: Taking on the deep state
body:
A high-level Pentagon official was caught| | | Here's what a Pentagon official told us.
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=63a105aa0aaa4e9592e41f9ea54bc150&_e=S6PNaUUdgheiQnbpXQtGRT69q3oSduZATV15NLgyTpy4UWvWGPCAn8FbuEZcph0jWc4k3KhSg3ZSUIul3LQ_ElKdg3V4SR4foKSe06f6fxpmSbV5n5EVh0hFtCbMiMATJ05zqt1gl7Dx8TrF0iomfQKs1KzhQWpUK73JFB7SF63ll8OLHvRUzQBvS6GluwH1wad6h7J-ts5Bq_cIzWzjZJv3FBlLESNP9ihLwwB6mEE9CwQny7cxZTCjvid9Gm1UQTfTPjhcaZqmtHAV4rAaUax71ssqvpWObyU2mHJu46GjNriRh5xLac7KU2szgxO30tp8hXctQl32xpWivfW9k9d_GqlNke6aINNK43GZfPtKET4BvZl9vS78zKI7oHJ-9_XIxcVOvBIaxkyd9dKo5XuDMbmYiAgDyFPyKDETXvc%3D)
---
On January 15th our team confronted Jamie Mannina, a now former senior Pentagon advisor and former FBI agent, over his comments made about working with retired generals to**'protect people from Trump.' ** A high-level Pentagon official was caught openly bragging about working with retired military officials to defy and resist President Trumps orders. Now President Trump has fired General Charles Brown the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff. We have seen the playbook before. Deep state officials plotting to "resist from the inside" because "they couldn't really get fired" But we got them fired and with your help we can expose more of these bad actors and hold them accountable. As you know, the DC bureaucracy routinely resists actions that provide transparency or accountability and fiercely fights anyone who tries cleaning house. That’s why our citizen journalism is so critical. Right now, we’re working on dozens of leads and producing explosive stories just about every week. I’ve been told directly by people in the know that our work is giving the administration the ammunition they need to plow forward with change. That's why I'm calling on you to join me in this crucial effort by making a [**$25 tax-deductible** contribution to the Citizen Journalism Foundation today](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=63a105aa0aaa4e9592e41f9ea54bc150&_e=S6PNaUUdgheiQnbpXQtGRT69q3oSduZATV15NLgyTpy4UWvWGPCAn8FbuEZcph0jWc4k3KhSg3ZSUIul3LQ_ElKdg3V4SR4foKSe06f6fxpmSbV5n5EVh0hFtCbMiMATJ05zqt1gl7Dx8TrF0iomfQKs1KzhQWpUK73JFB7SF63ll8OLHvRUzQBvS6GluwH1wad6h7J-ts5Bq_cIzWzjZJv3FBlLESNP9ihLwwB6mEE9CwQny7cxZTCjvid9Gm1U-yf9_cJ_Yg_x_O-6VfkXti8l8BJcZ4VIkmpHpJXR3N4HOs-AlF1mrHov40F6jmiJA7FpOi_55NA14WIzgBLyNIOm3e13QuNAO9cxZgrHZOvXkyKyJBklAYJuXRCi8dSiA3XD55h0f4DGj2-wIxzvAT-ZdxykhUz49tQr9vM9ZJA%3D). **Together we can hold the deep state accountable. **

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: Sharing an update →
body:
---
Derek, This isn’t a fundraising email. Instead, I want to take a minute to share an update on what Democrats are doing, the DNC’s role in this fight, and how you can get involved right now. Look, we’re all seeing what’s happening: Prices are going up, confidence in the economy is tanking, and fears of a Trump Recession are growing. At the same time, Donald Trump is letting unelected billionaire Elon Musk rip apart the country, fire our veterans, and threaten Social Security. And if that’s not enough, Republicans are voting to jeopardize health care access for millions of people and make it harder for families to put food on the table — all to fund Trump’s massive tax handout to billionaires. Democrats are fighting back — taking legal action against Trump and Musk, traveling to Republican-held districts to hold town halls and meet with voters who are furious, countering Musk and his band of DOGE kids as they try to access personal data on millions of Americans, and investing to win critical bellwether races up-and-down the ballot that are happening this year. **But the truth is that we have a lot more work to do to rebuild trust with voters and show Americans that Democrats are on their side.** That starts with showing up in every community and making our case, listening to people like you, and organizing year-round to build relationships with voters and win elections. I believe Democrats can truly make an impact _everywhere_ , in all 3,244 counties, and in red, blue, and purple states alike. That’s why I’ve already been traveling across the country to fight for upcoming elections, knock doors, and mobilize a new grassroots movement. If we can do this together, we’ll lay the groundwork we need to win local and statewide elections this year, take back Congress in 2026, and ultimately, kick Republicans out of the White House in 2028. That’s the DNC’s job, and that’s why my team and I are hard at work every day. I’m asking for you to stay involved, too — here are two ways you can make an impact right now:
* **Make calls to voters in Wisconsin.** There are critical elections happening here in just a few weeks, and of course, Elon Musk has already gotten involved. [You can help us stop Musk from trying to buy our courts by using this link.](https://ak.democrats.org/go/14371?refcode=em_20250322_3021_fr&t=1&akid=3021%2E22930333%2EPxz-9n)
* **Get involved in Florida’s special elections.** Trump has left two congressional seats vacant. These are deep-red seats, but if we show up, we can send a huge message. [Help support the Democrats in these races by clicking here.](https://ak.democrats.org/go/14276?refcode=em_20250322_3021_fr&t=2&akid=3021%2E22930333%2EPxz-9n)

Thank you for everything you’re doing, and I will have more updates to share soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-march-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250322_3021_fr&refcode2=3021_22930333_Pxz-9n&akid=3021%2E22930333%2EPxz-9n)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Checking In with Matt Cartwright
body:
| | | | |
---
| Aerial shot of our Delaware River railroad bridge, last year
---
| | | | | Checking In with Matt Cartwright
---
| | | | | It’s officially spring now, but over the years March has fooled us so many times, I’m not putting away the snow shovel just yet.
Marion and I have been keeping busy — she’s getting ready for an important trial, and I’ve been working hard at teaching a senior seminar on Congress up at Hamilton College, in upstate New York. I’ve also been doing the 36 hours of Continuing Legal Education credits I need to dust off my Pennsylvania law license, after 12 years of Inactive status.
And I was so honored to be appointed this year to the Pennsylvania Northeast Regional Rail Authority Board, which owns the freight rails in our area, and is working on reestablishing passenger rail service with New York City. We had that train service for over 100 years, and we need it back. Amtrak economists estimate that the new line will generate $84 million _every year_ in additional economic activity for our area. That means more jobs, good jobs, and better paying jobs. We need them, and that’s why I worked with PNRRA for 12 years pushing that project. The Bipartisan Infrastructure Law paved the way for us to get that new line, and at my request, Governor Josh Shapiro gave it his full backing.
The big news is that our project has now been accepted into Phase 2 of the Federal Railroad Administration’s Corridor ID program. **We’re one of only 5 new rail lines in the country** that have made it so far. I joined the PNRRA board to keep that momentum going. I had my first board meeting with them this week, and things are looking good. I’ll keep you posted on that.
Be safe and well, and [Stay in Touch](mailto:matt699dw@gmail.com?subject=&body=)!

---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/19c3ab4b8d39/6d8rjsk2sk?e=632a01d7cd)
Matt Cartwright * 227 Penn Ave * Scranton PA 18503-1921 * Scranton, PA 185031921 * USA
[update your preferences](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=d84f33d35fca81cdaa0f2c88f&id=a7b3283af4&e=632a01d7cd&c=88a90840ab) or [unsubscribe](https://gmail.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d84f33d35fca81cdaa0f2c88f&id=a7b3283af4&t=b&e=632a01d7cd&c=88a90840ab)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Fighting oppression at home and abroad with Congresswoman Delia Ramirez:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Delia and I are demanding the president comply with court orders and reverse cruel cuts to services that families and veterans rely on. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWhdEq3fURXdAotDv6nADK4X6zzhiZtuMF-y4wpiEYhGWzwpO-_zh_BEqAT6eEccWCFXF6gHdii7Y55FB7uCFfmTfdhb7Zsdb7QVvUBScibyi3KclPw4ROY91Z9X6raSs2BoKVzIVrE-2tOTjYIHfpID2qH-n0RSkL-F8b9QOT9Jqc3wYYFK65UVwlf5C46H7yq6jgHRe3mqUgiCzXDkdkI_1IpHWXY5L5EwDrFW8ZbJQPT6KtgYTaGZDKgaj7RLWUkp2hAHIkCBemDzQ1P68lgA/4f0/q9fZJLGPStWHsT03QdcIxQ/h0/h001.qCuUCM5SsjAKs43bQA9xm_0JaDd1mRemJ8W7aEPx-kA)

Friend, This Women’s History Month, I’m honored to join courageous and progressive women like Congresswoman Delia Ramirez. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJTE9HxYHFqKUIMHiT1GBldOaG2asfQHxFbzg-aKQs_GA0OXfvmEh-dc_zaZJNPXOTFzX5Ye_g7ch3mHbS3RABwo_oH_S9jOw81DA0dPecyEiSUOJiKMYquASR5WOVAnS8Ll-jh8TcR-rO3zePutGzWWmy0GOH3gD3zRBmL-M5YRVsewM51HhbvNALhBinXGdVS4W93C2cay-oTW9wbrjkhS7E-IeWgP5-UcqxUIs-w7G32-qD9EZQ-xnumLaVcVHtaSDaEYCXOWooWFVuEwLOm9TMSkWUrxjECh5qd8qzPsdtMaSd7Xzc3bZgyO-Dfih2PaVZoTwYjMNkj2WWjrkFxvIrZ7Ft-AWeCHwAiWXTZMLP0pnu_4deffqiGlTrZpJTCsmfJxkfoEBQ06Hc1sWNHr6QFX1NDexwGRrSNNanD-k/4f0/q9fZJLGPStWHsT03QdcIxQ/h1/h001.OeKtCvqiUVcGtj1vooLfW9_AZ7n6eY43WXdv6ZSI-j4) **This month, I co-sponsored Delia’s resolution demanding the president and his administration comply immediately with all court orders.** She said: _“In this country, we don't bow to kings or bend a knee to dictators. The elected president of our nation has the obligation to respect our constitution, our democratic institutions, and to honor our system of checks and balances.”_ Delia co-chairs the Congressional Homelessness Committee and is the Ranking Member of the Veterans’ Affairs Oversight and Investigation Subcommittee. **She and I have been demanding the Department of Veterans Affairs and the Department of Housing and Urban Development reverse cruel cuts** and protect the programs that veterans rely on that keep families housed, that enforce fair housing laws, and that assist first-time homebuyers in getting a mortgage. We’ve also co-led legislation to expand healthcare providers for veterans and together we introduced the _Restaurant Workers Bill of Rights_ to demand stability, safety, and paid leave for often-exploited workers. Both Delia and I are proud daughters of immigrants, and she’s the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family. She and I have worked with local immigrants’ rights groups in our districts to hold Know Your Rights events, and I co-sponsored a bill she’s leading to prevent ICE raids at places like churches, schools, and hospitals. Together, Delia and I will continue resisting Trump’s attacks on our communities, defending human and civil rights for all, and fighting for a future where everyone thrives. [**Can you split a donation between my and Delia Ramirez’s campaigns to support our bold leadership for human rights, housing for all, immigration reform, expanded veterans’ services, and a government that works for all people, not just the billionaires?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJTE9HxYHFqKUIMHiT1GBldOaG2asfQHxFbzg-aKQs_GCx8xfDwBDU-iuB49GV_R7zTdvlNvgnH1EKplkWcRCyFO4XrpkcKyHTf-d_G7RKJJBPRu-oXSmBaBckqfPoALZdhkWz2ILvewTmrzTEnM2N5DI7-99iQumXFGAl_fzMGTxgXKBkW554uqImNP9J4etko9TcMIIUYBxNrswtGUTQT5YgtMU0OSt5kwWfNNTV-rZfcZJ_82pQu2dFU8bT50fME5RGPgoPMVYH8K72qTOanHFxhAdl6AO28LO7tsHapp5ijlkdvWClOaf_ImQctowgYROXq0LYAPHn7TqBhTktTMcupgCfjQJuLLhje2fu-rvZTKmABeJ_SKjklfQCAKZUPJqA37f7C3k1wHZhjSh4cGkG-VcErhXVYNN8_zSZ4LU/4f0/q9fZJLGPStWHsT03QdcIxQ/h2/h001.9LYRM3m1KiFXMV-RV7RFzkSDTYhVaCWcRzTBN8zdkj0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Delia Ramirez_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJTE9HxYHFqKUIMHiT1GBldIm3qg18ackG0EMfYQbeoBo_DCjVZTFJI3P8SobE9o0dPdqUohTZvMoCjPePxdejQhuo5NHfSQqUKf_-Z69pnWB95MnnyydcdrGL-lSph7qnpEbzyi8AFmJRW1jSdXJACc_k-9LMOSNDG9IxmknsiqI3nu2xoe55ilwoIULDxF5JqQzEO3bhuY6whrAMNgqoe8ToznLBbvjccljTssUWWUHSKeXW6eDUeImWEi_GZujsUzTiTsbGndUYIr5YPlhuUww4Ds7z36n-JSZLSqSqOaDYce6MtgdgbSO33slHknNHK_Ibgi9QTPHf1KXVhtivnedAWEdl7OEcBNUByTIYoZ7s4n6lRXLGyxaXY4WsJtHbhL8oAHaJvFB4SimaP4wxOVV0WLwYpboVjWaPTRnXedKbMyuv7bFV8eiUIkFonIHssDvKRyHyrliBCRYqsVcK6w/4f0/q9fZJLGPStWHsT03QdcIxQ/h3/h001.wu0gGBL0QcGYxsxPJVDwT77SC8RU0cGhTP0ViwO7GcM)

Delia has been a crucial partner in the fight against oppression here at home and abroad. She has co-sponsored my anti-war policies, including Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block weapons from being used in war crimes and the _Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act_. **Our government always finds money for bombs, but none to end homelessness in our country. We’re pushing to change that.**
The Trump administration is run by billionaires, for billionaires. Along with a cabinet full of billionaires, the richest man in the world is trying to take over our government to get rich while stealing from working families. They’re trying to distract and divide us by attacking marginalized people, but we will push back and speak out against fascist fear-mongering and dehumanization.
We will use every tool at our disposal to fight back in Congress, and we will partner with grassroots movements building necessary power outside of Congress. We will keep fighting for our shared humanity and dignity for all.
Delia told her constituents recently: “Together, in the streets and in Congress, we remain courageous and organized; they will not break us.”

clean_body: Delia and I are demanding the president comply with court orders and reverse cruel cuts to services that families and veterans rely on. | | | Friend, This Women’s History Month, I’m honored to join courageous and progressive women like Congresswoman Delia Ramirez. This month, I co-sponsored Delia’s resolution demanding the president and his administration comply immediately with all court orders. She said: “In this country, we don't bow to kings or bend a knee to dictators. The elected president of our nation has the obligation to respect our constitution, our democratic institutions, and to honor our system of checks and balances.” Delia co-chairs the Congressional Homelessness Committee and is the Ranking Member of the Veterans’ Affairs Oversight and Investigation Subcommittee. She and I have been demanding the Department of Veterans Affairs and the Department of Housing and Urban Development reverse cruel cuts and protect the programs that veterans rely on that keep families housed, that enforce fair housing laws, and that assist first-time homebuyers in getting a mortgage. We’ve also co-led legislation to expand healthcare providers for veterans and together we introduced the Restaurant Workers Bill of Rights to demand stability, safety, and paid leave for often-exploited workers. Both Delia and I are proud daughters of immigrants, and she’s the only member of Congress in a mixed-immigration-status family. She and I have worked with local immigrants’ rights groups in our districts to hold Know Your Rights events, and I co-sponsored a bill she’s leading to prevent ICE raids at places like churches, schools, and hospitals. Together, Delia and I will continue resisting Trump’s attacks on our communities, defending human and civil rights for all, and fighting for a future where everyone thrives. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Delia Ramirez | | | | | | | | | | Delia has been a crucial partner in the fight against oppression here at home and abroad. She has co-sponsored my anti-war policies, including Joint Resolutions of Disapproval to block weapons from being used in war crimes and the Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act. Our government always finds money for bombs, but none to end homelessness in our country. We’re pushing to change that. The Trump administration is run by billionaires, for billionaires. Along with a cabinet full of billionaires, the richest man in the world is trying to take over our government to get rich while stealing from working families. They’re trying to distract and divide us by attacking marginalized people, but we will push back and speak out against fascist fear-mongering and dehumanization. We will use every tool at our disposal to fight back in Congress, and we will partner with grassroots movements building necessary power outside of Congress. We will keep fighting for our shared humanity and dignity for all. Delia told her constituents recently: “Together, in the streets and in Congress, we remain courageous and organized; they will not break us.” With you in this fight, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Leaders We Deserve HQ
subject: 🚨 Working families are leaving blue states
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
If blue states stay unaffordable, we’ll lose more than people — we’ll lose power.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250322-1&t=1&akid=1886%2E587540%2EZX04j8)
Hi Peter,
Blue states are losing working-class families — not because they want to leave, but because _they can’t afford to stay._ And if we don’t fix this, **we’re handing power straight to Republicans.**
Here’s the reality:
🚨 Rising costs of living outpace wage growth, increasing financial strain

🚨 Childcare, rent, and home prices are crushing working families

🚨 Long commutes steal time from loved ones
The 2030 Census will decide the future of political power in America. **If we don’t act now, red states will gain influence, and Democrats will keep losing ground.**
**_We need leaders who will fight for affordable housing, better transit, and an economy that works for working people — *not* just the wealthy._**
That’s why we’re building a movement to elect the next generation of leaders we deserve. But right now, we’re falling short — without action, these issues will continue to worsen, and working families will keep struggling.
**[Can you chip in $5 or more today to help us elect young leaders to fight for a future where working people can thrive?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250322-1?refcode=em20250322-1886&amount=5&refcode2=1886_587540_ZX04j8&akid=1886%2E587540%2EZX04j8)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250322-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250322-1886&refcode2=1886_587540_ZX04j8&akid=1886%2E587540%2EZX04j8)**
Every dollar counts.
Let’s make sure Democrats don’t just hold power — __but use it.__
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve HQ
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250322-1&t=2&refcode2=1886_587540_ZX04j8&akid=1886%2E587540%2EZX04j8)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1886%2E587540%2EZX04j8)

name: Lara Trump
subject: If you want truth to win, please open this email.
body:
You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology.

| | | You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology. [Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmorwveyh3gsrekb0t3do5if6qkc5f4qfejawawc36cpzzmk3g9x7b2q8ikoubze1osqoth7bx9qkxs8p7&__stmp=stjrwn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
| |
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h)
---
Dear Fellow American, You may know me as President Trump's daughter-in-law but this morning I'm writing you as a mother with one mission on my mind: To protect our children from the poison of woke ideology. And to accomplish that, **[I need you to join the fight.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h)** Make no mistake, this is about all of America's children. And how the Left is reaching right into our homes -- yours, mine, everyone's -- and luring our little ones into their anti-God, anti-America army. Before I go any further, if you're like many of the folks I've met across the country who've already raised their children, right now you may be thinking: "This is a parenting issue. Parents should just say, 'No!'" I understand. And I agree. But here's the reality. So many parents work hard every day to instill good, American values in our children. But the Left has its tentacles everywhere. I'm sure you know already how schools -- private and taxpayer funded -- are brimming with radicals trying to indoctrinate our children's minds and hearts. And you know that TV, movies, and music have all been hijacked by the Left. In nearly every space, the leftist messages creep in. Whether it's books the kids bring home from school, TV shows that claim to be "harmless," or even every other commercial pushing the leftist agenda... ...it's nearly impossible to keep the indoctrination out. That's why, together, you and I must do everything in our power to counter the Left's lies with THE TRUTH. **[**And that's why your support to Brave Books today is so critical.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h)** I'm going to tell you more about their critical mission in a minute but first I have to tell you about the most alarming thing parents are facing right now. Despite all parent's efforts, if their child takes the bait and latches onto a leftist lie... ...if parents show any opposition, the Left brings down all its might against them. Right now, Illinois is debating a bill that changes the definition of child abuse to include parents who refuse to let their minor children change genders. That is what we're up against. And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. **[**And the #1 thing you can do today is help by giving your best donation to Brave Books right now.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h)** If you've heard of **Brave Books** , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values. Maybe you’ve seen them featured on _Fox News_ for countering the Left's horrible poison. **Brave Books** fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian **Kirk Cameron** (_Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof_) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country. "See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great **Brave Books** with conservative messages such as:
---
* _The Test of Lionhood_ by **Kevin Sorbo --** Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good.
* _The Night the Snow Monster Attacked_ by **General Michael Flynn --** Shows children what it takes to be a good leader.
* _Happy No Snake Day_ by**Riley Gaines --** Encourages children to stand up for the truth.
* _Because You're My Family_ by **Missy Robertson --** Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love.

---
| | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several **Brave Books**. But my favorite is _Pride Comes Before the Fall_ which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at **Brave Books** aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on! That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance. My **Brave Book** , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them. In _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side. Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. **[That's why I hope you’ll support Brave Books today by giving a gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, or more.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h)** Your gift helps **Brave Books** create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies. **I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your[gift of $100 or more](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h), I'll send you a copy of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ as a special "Thank you" from me.** Sharing the lessons of _The Never-Give-Up Pup_ with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side. For America and America's Children,
---
| | Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h)
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h)
---
**Lara Trump** **Wife, Mother, and Author**
---
|
---
| | **P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left.[Please help me fight by giving to Brave Books to protect our children today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h) **Thank you! - Lara
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h) [**DONATE**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304
---

To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. [Unsubscribe from all communications](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmorwveyh3gsrekb0t3do5if6qkc5f4qfejawawc36cpzzmk3g9x7b2q8ikoubze1osqoth7bx9qkxs8p7&__stmp=stjrwn&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh).

[Privacy Policy](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=33g5tc4p3hfrv4v1pl5abnibfkzitvzx2e88dv9cbgo7j9tpbyfpts9phafslt2e3gx9mvquhnsrr67idol4y6ylicul1bli28ryc04t3gly61oxgtkb1a964kqshkim9b0g3zq1jfm8cp7r25s8ph&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=stjrwn&__onlt=h)

And so, all of us who love God and love our country must work together right now to instill rock-solid, armor of TRUTH into our children so they never fall for the Left's insane lies. If you've heard of Brave Books , you know they're a mission-based company that arms pro-God, pro-American parents and grandparents with quality children’s books that captivate young minds and hearts with lessons in conservative values. Maybe you’ve seen them featured on Fox News for countering the Left's horrible poison. Brave Books fought back by enlisting the help of actor, father, soon-to-be grandad, and Christian Kirk Cameron (Growing Pains, Left Behind, Fireproof) to host family friendly "See You at the Library" events across the country. "See you at the Library" events proudly start with the Pledge of Allegiance followed by story time featuring great Brave Books with conservative messages such as: The Test of Lionhood by Kevin Sorbo -- Teaches children that masculinity and bravery are good. The Night the Snow Monster Attacked by General Michael Flynn -- Shows children what it takes to be a good leader. Happy No Snake Day byRiley Gaines -- Encourages children to stand up for the truth. Because You're My Family by Missy Robertson -- Teaches children the importance of family and unconditional Christian love. | | Kirk Cameron himself has authored several Brave Books. But my favorite is Pride Comes Before the Fall which teaches the beauty of humility in the eyes of God. The folks at Brave Books aren’t afraid to confront the "woke" Left head on! That's why when they asked me to partner with them on a book of my own, I jumped at the chance. My Brave Book , inspired in part by my father-in-law, is entitled The Never-Give-Up Pup and it teaches the importance of hard work and perseverance. The Left wants kids lazy and unmotivated so they can control them. In The Never-Give-Up Pup , kids learn how good it feels to put in a hard day’s work and see the results on the other side. Strong kids, brave kids, Godly kids are who Eric and I are trying to raise. And I think you feel the same way. Your gift helps Brave Books create and distribute these powerful lessons to America's children, so they never fall for leftist lies. I believe so much in this great American company and what they're doing for our children and our country that in appreciation of your, I'll send you a copy of The Never-Give-Up Pup as a special "Thank you" from me. Sharing the lessons of The Never-Give-Up Pup with your children or grandchildren is a priceless gift. Or if you prefer, you can donate it to your local library or leave it in the waiting room at your next doctor's appointment so children who aren't growing up in conservative homes can get its message. My fellow conservative, thank you for reading my email today. I feel so blessed to have a small role in fighting for our children and our country and I'm honored to have you on our side. For America and America's Children, | | Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | Lara Trump Wife, Mother, and Author | | | P.S. If we do nothing, we're just handing America's children over to the Left. Thank you! - Lara | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302 Conroe, TX 77304 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=50]

Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
